jobs.title: Apprenti(e) Employé(e) de Commerce 2026-2029
jobs.description:
Mission 
 L'UBP vous permet d'avoir une vue d'ensemble du domaine bancaire et d'acquérir des compétences précieuses pour votre future carrière. 
 
 Main responsibilities 

Durant vos 3 années d'apprentissage, vous aurez l'opportunité de découvrir divers métiers de la banque privées, tels que les Opérations, les Crédits, le conseil à la clientèle ou la Salle des marchés. Ce sont les compétences de ses collaborateurs qui font le succès d'une entreprise et nous vous offrirons les outils, les connaissances, le support et les formations nécessaires pour réussir dans le monde bancaire et au-delà.
L'UBP est une banque de premier ordre en matière d'apprentissage, cela se traduit notamment par un taux élevé de réussite aux examens finaux. 
 
 Your Profile 
 
• Vous allez obtenir le certificat de fin d'école obligatoire à la fin de cette année scolaire ou l'avez obtenu récemment;

• Très bonne capacités d'apprentissage et d'organisation;

• Bon relationnel;

• Bonne maîtrise du français et de l'anglais, toute autre langue étant un atout. 
 
 Others 
 
• Swiss Residence 

• Votre candidature doit impérativement comporter: 
• Lettre de motivation 

• Curriculum vitae 

• Bulletins scolaires de l'enseignement secondaire (ou équivalent) des 3 dernières années, y compris celui de l'année en cours 

• Attestation de stage ou certificat de travail (si disponible) 

• Copies des diplômes obtenus (si disponible) 

• Résultat de tout test effectuté (EVA, Multicheck, etc.) 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Mission UBP ti permette di avere una panoramica del campo bancario e acquisire competenze preziose per la tua futura carriera. ## Principali responsabilitÃ Durante i tuoi 3 anni di apprendimento, avrai l'opportunitÃ di scoprire varie professioni private bancarie, come operazioni, crediti, consulenza clienti o il Market Hall. Sono le competenze dei suoi dipendenti che rendono un'azienda di successo e vi offriremo gli strumenti, la conoscenza, il supporto e la formazione necessari per avere successo nel mondo bancario e oltre. UBP è una banca di apprendimento leader, con un alto tasso di successo negli esami finali. ## Il tuo profilo Otterrete il certificato di partenza della scuola obbligatoria alla fine di questo anno scolastico o l'avete recentemente ottenuto; Buona relazione; buon comando di francese e inglese, qualsiasi altra lingua è un bene. ## Other Swiss Residence ## La tua domanda deve includere: Curriculum vitae Secondary (o equivalente) bollettini scolastici per gli ultimi 3 anni, compreso il Certificato di Internship o Work Certificate (se disponibile) Copie di diplomi ottenuti (se disponibile) Risultato di qualsiasi test eseguito (EVA, Multicheck, ecc.) ## Competenze di base Aderenza alla società
descriptionByLocale.en: Mission UBP allows you to have an overview of the banking field and gain valuable skills for your future career. ## Main responsibilities During your 3 years of learning, you will have the opportunity to discover various private banking professions, such as Operations, Credits, Customer Advice or the Market Hall. It is the skills of its employees that make a company successful and we will offer you the tools, knowledge, support and training necessary to succeed in the banking world and beyond. UBP is a leading learning bank, with a high success rate in the final exams. ## Your Profile You will obtain the compulsory school leaving certificate at the end of this school year or have recently obtained it; Very good learning and organizational skills; Good relationship; Good command of French and English, any other language being an asset. ## Other Swiss Residence ## Your application must include: Curriculum vitae Secondary (or equivalent) school bulletins for the last 3 years, including the current year's Certificate of Internship or Work Certificate (if available) Copies of diplomas obtained (if available) Result of any test performed (EVA, Multicheck, etc.) ## Core Competencies Adherence to the company
descriptionByLocale.de: Mission UBP ermöglicht es Ihnen, einen Überblick über das Bankenfeld zu haben und wertvolle Fähigkeiten für Ihre zukünftige Karriere zu gewinnen. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Während Ihres 3jährigen Lernens haben Sie die Möglichkeit, verschiedene private Bankenberufe wie Operationen, Credits, Kundenberatung oder die Markthalle zu entdecken. Es sind die Fähigkeiten seiner Mitarbeiter, die ein Unternehmen erfolgreich machen und wir bieten Ihnen die Werkzeuge, Wissen, Unterstützung und Ausbildung notwendig, um in der Bankenwelt und darüber hinaus erfolgreich zu sein. UBP ist eine führende Lernbank mit einer hohen Erfolgsquote in den Abschlussprüfungen. Ihr Profil Sie erhalten das Pflichtschulzeugnis am Ende dieses Schuljahres oder haben es vor kurzem erworben; Sehr gutes Lernen und organisatorische Fähigkeiten; Gute Beziehung; Gutes Kommando von Französisch und Englisch, jede andere Sprache ist ein Vermögen. jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Banking Operations Officer
jobs.description:
• Main Responsibilities 

• The banking operations officer is responsible for the day-to-day activity, control and oversight of the BAU activity as directed by their reporting line. 

• The role requires the candidate to support the banking operations department across numerous activities as required by their manager, to deliver high quality standards of work. This presents the opportunity to demonstrate existing knowledge, in addition to being presented with the opportunity to upskill on other areas within the department. 

• It is critical to remain positive and proactive in this role, supporting colleagues and having a desire to increase their own knowledge and support others. 

• Support of constant improvement initiatives and projects will be required from time to time. 

• Role Duties 

• The local Banking Operation department is divided into two separate teams as detailed below : 
• Banking & Treasury 
• UK Domestic payments (Sterling) 

• Direct Debits & Standing orders 

• Cheque clearing 

• Treasury support activities 
 

• Client reporting, online banking & Debit cards 
• Client reporting, including valuations and mailings 

• Individual Savings Account controls - ISA 

• Client debit card support and helpline 

• Online banking support and helpline 

• Management of physical documents (mail / archives) 
 
 

• The successful candidate will initially join an area which makes best use of their skillset and experience, with a later consideration to crosstrain as required by the bank. 

• Important to support colleagues within banking operations and work with a one team approach. 

• Proactively manage Risks and Issues arising within the banking operations scope 

• Produce KPI’s for banking operations and provide periodic reporting against KPI’s for Senior Management as defined 

• Support the business with development of operational solutions for new products or services in conjunction with the Operational teams at Union Bancaire Privee SA 

• Ensure operational functions meet relevant regulatory requirements at all times 

• Perform all duties in accordance with the principles outlined in the UBP UK Code of Conduct, as well as the policies and procedures relevant to the role, adhering to a culture that focuses on minimising risks and delivering value 

• Ensure adherence to UBP Internal controls standards, systems and procedures that appropriate standards are maintained in all aspects of operational risk and compliance which are endorsed by subsequent audits. 
 

• The job description is not exhaustive and may include other duties as assigned from time to time by management. 

• Committee Membership 

• None 

• Conduct Rules 

• This role is required to comply with the Financial Conduct Authority’s (FCA) Individual Conduct Rules, which are: 

• 

• To act with integrity; 

• To act with due skill, care and diligence; 

• To be open and cooperative with the FCA, the Prudential Regulation Authoritity (PRA) and other regulators; 

• To pay due regard to the interests of customers and treat them fairly; 

• To observe proper standards of market conduct; and 

• To act to deliver good outcomes for retain customers. 

• 

• Person Specification 

• Knowledge, Skills & Experience 

• At least 8 years working in a similar operational role, able to demonstrate technical knowledge across banking operations. 

• A min of 3 years working with critical outsource/service providers. 

• Able to engage at all levels and build strong relationships across jurisdictions. 

• Proactive, positive and solutions focused. 

• Competencies and Values Required Level 

• 

• Shows the drive to perform and be successful 5 
 Persistent in following up on issues 5 
 Upholds the legal, regulatory and ethical standard of the UBP Group 4 
 Good product knowledge 4 
 Knowledge of legal regulatory and industry requirements 4 
 Business Development 4 
 Communication - listening, written and verbal with clients 4 
 Influencing 4 
 Knowledge of Products and Services 4 
 Relationship Building - internal and external 4 
 Strategic & commercial awareness 4 
 Planning & organising 4 
 Ethics and values 4 
 Customer focus 4 
 

• Explanation: 1: low level of competence / skill required, 2-3: average level of competence / skill required, 4-5: high level of competence skill required 

•

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: IT Business Analyst - Risk Management

titleByLocale.fr: Analyste des activités de TI - Gestion des risques

jobs.description:
• Mission 

• The mission consists in performing the role of IT business analyst for Risk applications, in particular for subjects related to Balance Sheet Management, Value At Risk (VaR), Reconciliation and IRRBB / CSRBB regulations. 

• The candidate needs to have an extensive IT risk management banking background as well as a strong BA experience. 
 

• Main responsibilities 

• Reporting to the Team Lead of IT Risk, Credit & ESG, the consultant will work on risk application projects. 
 
 
• IT BA Responsibilities 

• Analyse regulation, business scenarios/cases and contribute to business / regulatory requirements definition. 
• Eg : Impact of products evolution (Acumulator / Decumulator, Deposits, Credit and Mortgages) on the Balance Sheet Management (BSM) IT treatment 
 

• Define Functional Design Specification. 

• Manage vendor (FIS) application relationship (software package). 

• Execute database scripts and queries (SQL) to validate data integrity and ensure alignment with regulatory requirements. 

• Install and test new versions of BSM and VaR Hedge Funds Applications and exploit the applications in production (batch error management). 

• Liaise with the business to provide guidance from an IT point of view. 

• Provide guidance for business analysts, developers, and testers assigned to the projects and ensure good project management practices are employed throughout the project lifecycle. 

• Identify key risks and issues and define mitigation scenarios. 
 

 

• Your Profile 

• 5 to 10 years of experience 

• Education : Master Degree in IT 
 

• Experience required 

• IT Business Analyst with strong technical and functional skills on Risk Management – FIS Balance Sheet Manager – Var HF & Reconciliation (based on MATLAB) 

• Proficient in SQL and database scripting for risk data analytics. 

• Good understanding of the bank’s business processes 

• Good operational experience in the implementation of various IT Risk Management projects in banking or financial sectors related to risk management, VaR reconciliation, IRRBB (Interest Rate Risk in the Banking Book) / CSRBB (Credit Spread Risk in the Banking Book) regulations. 

• Good practrice of IT BA activities and knowledge of IT project management 
 

• Languages: 

• French mandatory and English (C1) 
 

• Others 

• Swiss residency: Optional

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione - La missione consiste nel ricoprire il ruolo di IT business analyst per le applicazioni di rischio, in particolare per quanto riguarda la Gestione del Bilancio, al Value At Risk (VaR), alla Reconciliazione e alle normative IRRBB / CSRBB. ## Mansioni pr - Reporting al Team Lead di IT Risk, Credit & ESG, il consulente lavorerà su progetti di applicazioni di rischio. ## Responsabilità di IT Business Analyst - Analizzare le normative, le scene/casi aziendali e contribuire alla definizione dei requisiti di business/regolatori. Esempio: Impatto dell'evoluzione dei prodotti (Acumulator / Decumulator, Depositi, Crediti e Mutui) sul trattamento IT della Gestione del Bilancio (BSM) - Definire le Specifiche di Progettazione Funzionale. - Gestire la relazione con il fornitore (FIS) dell'applicazione software (software package). - Eseguire script e query di database (SQL) per validare l'ordine dei dati e garantire l'allineamento con i requisiti regolatori. - Installare e testare le nuove versioni delle Applicazioni BSM e VaR Hedge Funds e sfruttarle in produzione (gestione degli errori batch). - Collaborare con il business per fornire indicazioni dal punto di vista IT. - Fornire indicazioni agli analisti di business, agli sviluppatori e ai tester assegnati ai progetti e assicurarsi che le buone pratiche di gestione di progetto devono essere prese durante tutto il ciclo di vita del progetto. - Identificare i rischi e le problematiche chiave e definire scenari di mitigazione. ## Profilo richiesto - 5 a 10 anni di esperienza - Laurea magistrale in IT ## Esperienza richiesta - IT Business Analyst con competenze tecniche e funzionali in Gestione del Rischio – FIS Balance Sheet Manager – Var HF & Reconciliation (basato su MATLAB) - Competenza in SQL e scripting di database per l'analisi dei dati di rischio. - Buona conoscenza dei processi bancari - Buona esperienza operativa nell'implementazione di vari progetti di Gestione del Rischio IT in settori bancari o finanziari alla gestione del rischio, alla riconciliazione del VaR, alle normative IRRBB (Interest Rate Risk in Banking Book) / CSRBB (Credit Spread Risk in the Banking Book). - Buone pratiche di attività di IT BA e conoscenza della gestione di progetti IT # Lingue - Francese legale e inglese (C1) ## Altro - Residenza svizzera: Opzionale

with regulatory requirements. • Install and test new versions of BSM and VaR Hedge Funds Applications and exploit the applications in production (batch error management). • Liaise with the business to descriptionByLocale.de: Missione - La missione consistse nel ricoprire il ruolo di IT business analyst per le applicazioni di rischio, in particolare per argomenti relativi alla Gestione del Bilancio, al Value At Risk (VaR), alla Reconciliazione e alle normative IRRBB / CSRBB. Mansioni principali - Reporting al Team Lead di IT Risk, Credit & ESG, il consulente lavorerà su progetti di applicazioni di rischio. Responsabilità di IT Business Analyst - Analizzare le normative, le scenari/casi aziendali e contribuire alla definizione dei requisiti di business/regolatori. Esempio: Impatto dell'evoluzione dei prodotti (Acumulator / Decumulator, Depositi, Crediti e Mutui) sul trattamento IT della Gestione del Bilancio (BSM) - Definire le Specifiche di Progettazione Funzionale. - Gestire la relazione con il fornitore (FIS) dell'applicazione Software (Softwarepaket). - Eseguire Script e query di Datenbank (SQL) per validare l'integrità dei dati e garantire l'allineamento con i requisiti regolatori. - Installare e testare le nuove versioni delle Applicazioni BSM e VaR Hedge Funds e sfruttarle in produzione (gestione degli errori batch). - Collaborare con business per fornire indicazioni dal punto di vista IT. - Fornire indicazioni agli analisti di business, agli sviluppatori e ai tester assegnati ai progetti e assicurarsi che le buone pratiche di gestione di progetto siano adottate durante tutto il ciclo di vita del progetto. - Identificare i rischi e le problematiche chiave e definire scenari di mitigazione. Profilo richiesto - 5 a 10 anni di esperienza - Laurea magistrale in IT Esperienza richiesta - IT Business Analyst con forti konkurrierennze tecniche e funzionali in Gestione del Rischio – FIS Balance Sheet Manager – Var HF & Reconciliation (basato su MATLAB) - Competenio in SQL e scripting di Datenbank per l'ti - Buona conoscenza dei processi aziendali bancari - Buona esperienza operativa nell'implementazione di vari progetti di Gestione del Rischio IT in settori bancari o finanziari relativi alla gestione del rischio, alla riconciliazione del VaR, alle normative IRRBB (Interest Rate Risk in the Banking Booking) - Buone pratiche di attività di IT BA e conoscenza della gestione di progetti IT Lingue - Francese obbligatorio e inglese (C1)

jobs.title: IT Business Analyst - Credit (IT)
jobs.description:
• Mission 

• The mission consists in performing the role of IT business analyst for key credit applications and projects 
 
 Main responsibilities: 

• Reporting to the Team Lead of IT Risk, Credit & ESG, the consultant will work on key credit applications projects. 
 

 BA Responsibilities: 
 
• Analyse business scenarios/cases and contribute to business requirements definition. 

• Define Functional Design Specification. 

• Manage vendor application (SpeciTec) relationship (software package Specicred ). 

• Install and test new version of Specicred. 

• Execute database scripts and queries (SQL) to validate data integrity and ensure alignment with regulatory requirements. 

• Liaise with the business to provide guidance from an IT point of view. 

• Provide guidance for business analysts, developers, and testers assigned to the projects and ensure good project management practices are employed throughout the project lifecycle. 

• Identify key risks and issues and define mitigation scenarios. 
 

• Your Profile 

• 5 to 10 years of experience 

• Education : Master Degree in IT 
 

• Experience required 

• Strong experience required: IT Business Analyst with strong technical and functional skills on Credit projects 

• Good understanding of the bank’s business processes 

• Good operational experience in the implementation of various IT Credit projects 
 

• Languages: 

• French mandatory and English (C1) 
 

• Others 

• Swiss residency: Mandatory

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Team leader - IT Compliance
jobs.description:
• Mission: 

• Team leader of the IT Compliance unit ensuring the delivery and operations of all the services used by the bank Compliance entities at Group and Branch levels 

• In charge of managing a team of 11 IT specialists composed of business analysts and project managers 
 

• Key responsibilities: 

• Manage the daily operations of the team and the related services to meet the expected level of quality 

• Manage the portfolio of projects and ensure the proper delivery on time by meeting the business requirements within the approved budget 

• Manage the team OPEX and CAPEX budgets within the approved envelopes 

• Manage the team resources by setting individual objectives and developing their career path 
 

• Specific Competencies and other Skills/Abilities: 

• Master Degree in IT Engineering or equivalent. 

• A minimum of 10 years’ experience as IT Team Lead in a banking organization 

• Functional knowledge of Compliance, KYC, AML and regulatory reporting topics in the context of Private Banking 

• Technical knowledge of the IMTF AML and risk scoring solutions 

• Capacity to deal with several matters simultaneously 

• Ability to work independently, take decisions and set priorities 

• Pragmatic and solution oriented 

• Strong leadership, analytical and communication skills, ability to interact at management level with key bank stakeholders 

• Fluent in French and English; additional languages are considered an asset 

• Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility 
 
 
• Others 
• Swiss Residence 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione - Team leader dell'unità IT Compliance che garantisce la consegna e le operazioni di tutti i servizi utilizzati dagli enti bancari Compliance a livello di Gruppo e Branch - Responsabile della gestione di un team di 11 specialisti IT composto da analisti di business e project manager ## Mansioni pr - Gestire le operazioni quotidiane del team e i relativi servizi per soddisfare il livello di qualità previsto - Gestire il portafoglio di progetti e garantire la corretta consegna in tempo soddisfando i requisiti aziendali all'interno del budget approvato - Gestire il team OPEX e CAPEX budget all'interno delle buste approvate - Gestire le risorse del team impostando obiettivi individuali e sviluppando il percorso di carriera equivalente - Un’esperienza minima di 10 anni come IT Team Lead in un’organizzazione bancaria - Conoscenza funzionale delle soluzioni di Compliance, KYC, AML e reportistica regolamentare nel contesto di Private Banking - Conoscenza tecnica delle soluzioni IMTF AML e risk scoring - Capacità di affrontare diverse questioni contemporaneamente - Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente, prendere decisioni e impostare le priorità - Pragmatic and Solution oriented - Forte leadership, capacità di analisi e di comunicazione

descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission - Chef d'équipe de l'unité de conformité des TI assurant la prestation et le fonctionnement de tous les services utilisés par les entités de conformité des banques au niveau du groupe et de la direction générale - Responsable de la gestion d'une équipe de 11 spécialistes de la TI composée d'analystes d'affaires et de gestionnaires de projets ## Mansioni principali - Gérer les opérations quotidiennes de l'équipe et les services connexes pour répondre au niveau de qualité attendu - Gérer le portefeuille de projets et assurer la bonne exécution à temps en satisfaisant aux exigences opérationnelles dans le budget approuvé - Gérer les budgets de l'équipe OPEX et CAPEX dans les enveloppes approuvées - Gérer les ressources de l'équipe en fixant des objectifs individuels et en développant leur cheminement de carrière ## Competenze e abilità specifiche - Maîtrise en génie informatique ou équivalent. - Un minimum de 10 ans d'expérience en tant qu'équipe de TI Dirigeant dans une organisation bancaire - Connaissance fonctionnelle de la conformité, KYC, AML et sujets de rapport réglementaires dans le contexte de Private Banking - Connaissance technique de la LMA de l'IMTF et des solutions de notation des risques - Capacité de traiter plusieurs questions simultanément - Capacité de travailler de manière indépendante, de prendre des décisions et de fixer des priorités - Pragmatique et axée sur la solution - Forte capacité de leadership, d'analyse et de communication, capacité d'interagir au niveau de la gestion avec les principaux intervenants bancaires - Fluent en français et en anglais; langues additionnelles sont considérées comme un atout - Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise - Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité ## Altri requisiti - Swiss Residence ## Competenze chiave - Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise - Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Conformité aux règlements et directives internes

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Middle Officer
jobs.description:
• Mission 

• The Middle Officer in Asset Management acts as the central point of contact for operational queries, ensuring timely client responses and smooth transaction processing. Key responsibilities include trade matching, settlement follow-up, daily reconciliations, collateral management, and issue resolution. The role also involves producing activity reports, collaborating with counterparties, and implementing new processes to enhance operational efficiency. 
 

• Main responsibilities 

• Act as the central point of contact for operational queries, and always available to respond to our client queries in a timely manner 

• Securities & FX trade matching, instruction to relevant third parties and settlement follow-up 

• OTC & ETD trade matching, and clearing monitoring 

• Produce the daily activity reports to third parties 

• Perform daily reconciliations of portfolio positions, cash balances and transactions. 

• Breaks analysis, investigation until resolution 

• Participation in the implementation of new processes and controls 

• Oversee the daily management of collateral for derivatives 

• Perform daily reconciliations of collateral balances with counterparties, resolving discrepancies in a timely manner. 

• Collaborate with counterparties, clearing brokers, and custodians to ensure smooth collateral movements and settlements. 
 

• Your Profile 

• +5 years of experience in Asset Management / Operations or FX activities 

• University degree(s) in accounting, finance and/or business management 

• Strong knowledge of fund structures, share class operations, and regulatory frameworks (e.g., EMIR, UCITS, AIFMD). 

• Deep understanding of currency markets, hedging instruments (e.g., forwards, swaps), and collateral management practices. 

• Specific competencies 
 
• Strong Analytical skills and problem-solving skills. 

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate across teams. 

• High attention to detail and ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment. 

• Awareness of risks and focus on risks mitigation techniques 

• Rigour and organization skills 

• Result oriented, driven to succeed 

• Ability to work in a dynamic, high demand environment 

• Fluent in French and English, other language(s) a plus 

• Ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver results within tight deadlines. 

• Proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement and innovation. 

• Swiss residency 
 

 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Il Middle Officer in Asset Management funge da punto di contatto centrale per le richieste operative, garantendo risposte tempestive ai clienti e un'elaborazione fluida delle transazioni. Le responsabilità principali includono l'abbinamento commerciale, il follow-up del regolamento, le riconciliazioni quotidiane, la gestione delle garanzie e la risoluzione dei problemi. Il ruolo prevede anche la produzione di report di attività, la collaborazione con le controparti e l'implementazione di nuovi processi per migliorare l'efficienza operativa. ## Mansioni principali - Agire come punto di contatto centrale per le richieste operative e sempre disponibile a rispondere alle richieste dei nostri clienti in modo tempestivo - Confronto tra titoli e FX, istruzioni a terze parti rilevanti e follow-up del regolamento - Confronto commerciale OTC e ETD e monitoraggio della compensazione - Produrre i rapporti giornalieri di attività a terzi - Eseguire riconciliazioni giornaliere di posizioni di portafoglio, saldi di cassa e transazioni - Analisi delle rotture, indagini fino alla risoluzione - Partecipazione all'implementazione di nuovi processi e controlli - Sorvegliare la gestione quotidiana delle garanzie per i derivati - Eseguire riconciliazioni giornaliere dei saldi delle garanzie con le controparti, risolvere le discrepanze in modo tempestivo - Collaborare con le controparti, i broker di compensazione e i custodi per garantire movimenti e regolamenti delle garanzie senza intoppi ## Il profilo tuo - +5 anni di esperienza in gestione patrimoniale/ operazioni o attività FX - Diploma universitario in contabilità, finanza e/o gestione aziendale

descriptionByLocale.de: Missione Der Middle Officer im Asset Management fungiert als zentrale Anlaufstelle für operative Fragen und sorgt für zeitnahe Kundenantworten und eine reibungslose Transaktionsabwicklung. Zu den Hauptaufgaben gehören der Handelsabgleich, die Nachverfolgung der Abwicklung, die täglichen Abstimmungen, das Sicherheitenmanagement und die Problemlösung. Die Rolle umfasst auch die Erstellung von Tätigkeitsberichten, die Zusammenarbeit mit Gegenparteien und die Implementierung neuer Prozesse zur Verbesserung der betrieblichen Effizienz. ## Mansioni principali - Handeln Sie als zentraler Ansprechpartner für operative Fragen und stehen Sie unseren Kunden jederzeit zeitnah zur Verfügung - Wertpapier- und Devisenhandelsabgleich, Anweisung an relevante Dritte und Nachverfolgung der Abwicklung - OTC- und ETD-Handelsabgleich und Clearing-Überwachung - Erstellen Sie die täglichen Tätigkeitsberichte an Dritte - Führen Sie tägliche Abgleiche von Portfolio-Positionen, Kassenbeständen und Transaktionen durch - Pannenanalyse, Untersuchung bis zur Auflösung - Teilnahme an der Implementierung neuer Prozesse und Kontrollen - Überwachen Sie die tägliche Verwaltung von Sicherheiten für Derivate - Führen Sie tägliche Abgleiche von Sicherheitenbeständen mit Gegenparteien durch, beheben Sie Diskrepanzen rechtzeitig - Arbeiten Sie mit Gegenparteien, Clearing-Brokern und Verwahrstellen zusammen, um reibungslose Sicherheitenbewegungen und -abwicklungen zu gewährleisten ## Il tuo profilo - +5 Jahre Erfahrung im Asset Management / Betrieb oder Devisenaktivitäten - Hochschulabschluss(e) in Buchhaltung, Finanzen und/oder Geschäftsmanagement
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission L'agent intermédiaire de la gestion des biens est le point de contact central pour les demandes de renseignements opérationnels, assurant la rapidité des réponses des clients et le traitement des transactions. Les principales responsabilités comprennent l'appariement des échanges, le suivi des règlements, les rapprochements quotidiens, la gestion des garanties et la résolution des problèmes. Le rôle consiste également à produire des rapports d'activités, à collaborer avec les contreparties et à mettre en oeuvre de nouveaux processus pour améliorer l'efficacité opérationnelle. ## Mansioni mainti - Agir comme point de contact central pour les demandes opérationnelles, et toujours disponible pour répondre à nos demandes de clients en temps opportun - Apparitions de titres et de FX, instructions aux tiers concernés et suivi des règlements - Correspondance de l'OTC et de l'ETD et contrôle des compensations - Produire des rapports d'activité quotidiens à des tiers - Effectuer des rapprochements quotidiens des positions de portefeuille, des soldes de trésorerie et des transactions - Analyse des ruptures, des enquêtes jusqu'à la résolution - Participation à la mise en oeuvre de nouveaux processus et contrôles - Superviser la gestion quotidienne des garanties pour les produits dérivés - Effectuer des rapprochements quotidiens des soldes de garantie avec les contreparties, résoudre les divergences en temps opportun - Collaborer avec les contreparties, les courtiers de compensation et les dépositaires pour assurer des mouvements et des règlements sans heurts des garanties ## Il tuo profilo - +5 ans d'expérience dans la gestion des actifs / opérations ou activités FX - Compétences universitaires en comptabilité, gestion des finances et/ou gestion des entreprises - Forte connaissance des structures de fonds, des opérations de classe et des cadres de réglementation (par exemple

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Investment Advisor
jobs.description:
Mission 
 The Investment Advisor is responsible for delivering tailored investment advice and portfolio strategies to high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth individuals. Working closely with Relationship Managers (RMs), the IA ensures client receive comprehensive, risk-appropriate investment solutions aligned with their goals, profile, and the Bank’s values.
 
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Provide customized investment advice based on client objectives, risk appetite and market conditions

• Construct and optimize investment portfolios using a broad range of asset classes

• Present investment strategies clearly and transparently, including expected returns, risks and associated costs

• Conduct regular portfolio reviews and rebalancing recommendations

• Act as the trusted investment contact for existing clients, in partnership with RMs

• Support in deepening client relationships and enhancing retention through proactive investment insight and performance monitoring

• Assist in client meetings, prepare proposals and contribute to the acquisition and onboarding of new clients as well as for business retention

• Stay abreast of macroeconomic trends, financial markets and geopolitical developments

• Work closely with internal teams to align with the Bank’s investment strategy and core values

• Promote and explain investment products to RMs and relevant target advisory client groups

• Ensure full compliance with Swiss regulatory frameworks
 

 Your Profile 
 
• University degree in Finance, economics or related field, or a qualification considered equivalent 

• CFA, CIIA, CWMA or similar certification is a strong asset 

• Strong knowledge of investment products and ability to execute trades for equities, derivatives, fixed income, bonds, warrants and mutual funds 

• Min 5 years of experience in a similar position in Private Banking or a Financial Institution 

• Strong communication and interpersonal skills, client focus, reliability, flexibility and stress resistant 

• Good command of MS Office suite, portfolio analysis tools and banking software 

• Perfectly fluent in French and English. Very good knowledge of Russian and any additional language skill would be an added value. 

• Adaptability to work in an agile organization 
 
 Others 
 
• Swiss Residence 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Il Consulente per gli Investimenti è responsabile per la fornitura di consulenza di investimento su misura e strategie di portafoglio per gli individui ad alto valore di rete e ultra-high-net-worth. Lavorando a stretto contatto con Relationship Managers (RM), l'IA assicura al cliente di ricevere soluzioni di investimento complete e appropriate al rischio allineate con i loro obiettivi, profilo e valori della Banca. ## Mansioni - Fornire consulenza di investimento personalizzata in base agli obiettivi del cliente, all'appetito del rischio e alle condizioni di mercato - Costruisci e ottimizza i portafogli di investimento utilizzando una vasta gamma di classi di asset - Presentare strategie di investimento in modo chiaro e trasparente, compresi i ritorni attesi, i rischi e i costi associati - Condurre regolari recensioni di portafoglio e raccomandazioni di riequilibrio - Atto come il contatto di investimento fidato per i clienti esistenti, resistente ai RM - Sostegni Molto buona conoscenza del russo e di qualsiasi abilità linguistica aggiuntiva sarebbe un valore aggiunto - Adattabilità al lavoro in un'organizzazione agile ## Cosa offriamo - Swiss Residence ## Competenze chiave - Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with Regulations and Internal Directive ## Contatto Nessuna informazione di contatto fornita.

descriptionByLocale.de: Missione Der Anlageberater ist verantwortlich für die Bereitstellung maßgeschneiderter Anlageberatungs- und Portfoliostrategien für vermögende und vermögende Privatpersonen. In enger Zusammenarbeit mit Relationship Managern (RMs) stellt die Folgenabschätzung sicher, dass Kunden umfassende, risikogerechte Anlagelösungen erhalten, die auf ihre Ziele, ihr Profil und die Werte der Bank abgestimmt sind. ## Mansioni - Individuelle Anlageberatung auf der Grundlage von Kundenzielen, Risikobereitschaft und Marktbedingungen - Aufbau und Optimierung von Anlageportfolios unter Verwendung eines breiten Spektrums von Anlageklassen - Klare und transparente Darstellung von Anlagestrategien, einschließlich erwarteter Renditen, Risiken und damit verbundener Kosten - Durchführung regelmäßiger Portfolioüberprüfungen und Empfehlungen zur Neugewichtung - In Partnerschaft mit RMs als vertrauenswürdiger Anlagekontakt für bestehende Kunden fungieren - Unterstützung bei der Vertiefung der Kundenbeziehungen und Verbesserung der Bindung durch proaktive Anlageeinblicke und Leistungsüberwachung - Unterstützung bei Kundenbesprechungen, Erstellung von Vorschlägen und Beitrag zur Akquisition und Onboarding neuer Kunden sowie zur Geschäftsbindung - Informieren Sie sich über makroökonomische Trends, Finanzmärkte und geopolitische Entwicklungen - Arbeiten Sie eng mit internen Teams zusammen, um sich an der Anlagestrategie und den Kernwerten der Bank auszurichten - Fördern und erklären Sie RMs und relevanten Zielberatungskundengruppen Anlageprodukte - Gewährleisten Sie die vollständige Einhaltung der Schweizer regulatorischen Rahmenbedingungen ## Requisiti - Hochschulabschluss in Finanzen, Wirtschaft
descriptionByLocale.fr: Missione Le conseiller en investissement est chargé de fournir des conseils sur mesure en matière d'investissement et des stratégies de portefeuille aux personnes à valeur élevée et à valeur élevée. En travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les gestionnaires de relations (GR), l'IV s'assure que le client reçoit des solutions d'investissement complètes et adaptées au risque, alignées sur ses objectifs, son profil et les valeurs de la Banque. ## Mansioni - Fournir des conseils personnalisés en matière d'investissement en fonction des objectifs du client, de l'appétit pour les risques et des conditions du marché - Construire et optimiser des portefeuilles d'investissement en utilisant un large éventail de classes d'actifs - Présenter des stratégies d'investissement de façon claire et transparente, y compris les rendements attendus, les risques et les coûts connexes - Effectuer régulièrement des examens de portefeuille et des recommandations de rééquilibrage - Agir en tant que contact de confiance en matière d'investissement pour les clients existants, en partenariat avec les RM - Soutenir l'approfondissement des relations avec les clients et le renforcement de la rétention grâce à une analyse proactive de l'investissement et au suivi des performances - Aider les clients à se réunir, à préparer des propositions et à contribuer à l'acquisition et à l'embarquement de nouveaux clients ainsi qu'à la rétention des entreprises - Rester au fait des tendances macroéconomiques, des marchés financiers et des développements géopolitiques - Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes internes pour s'aligner sur la stratégie d'investissement et les valeurs de base de la Banque - Promouvoir et expliquer les produits d'investissement aux RM et aux groupes clients cibles pertinents - Assurer le plein respect des cadres réglementaires Très bonne connaissance du russe et de toute compétence linguistique supplémentaire serait une valeur ajoutée - Adaptabilité au travail dans une organisation agile ## Cosa offriamo - Swiss Residence ## Competenze chiave - Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Conformité aux règlements et directives internes ## Contatto Aucune information de contact fournie.

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Corporate Actions Specialist (6 months)
jobs.description:
TEMPORARY MISSION - 6 MONTHS
 
• Mission 
 Ensure the accurate and timely processing of income payments for all bank accounts while maintaining compliance with regulatory requirements and internal controls. Provide exceptional service to clients and stakeholders, ensuring smooth operations within the income processing function.
 
• Main responsibilities 
 Income Processing 
 
• Process income-related transactions, including dividends, interest payments, and other distributions.

• Ensure accuracy and timeliness in accordance with established procedures and regulations.
 Reconciliation and Verification 
 
• Reconcile and verify income transactions, ensuring correct allocation to client accounts.

• Investigate and resolve discrepancies or exceptions.

• Manage market claims and liaise with external brokers and counterparties.
 Client Communication 
 
• Address inquiries from Relationship Managers, internal stakeholders, and external parties (e.g., custodians, issuers, agents).

• Provide updates and maintain a high level of professionalism and customer service.
 Documentation and Recordkeeping 
 
• Maintain accurate records of income transactions and related documentation.

• Ensure proper documentation for audit and regulatory purposes.
 Regulatory Compliance 
 
• Stay informed on relevant regulations, industry practices, and internal policies
 

• Your Profile 

• Languages: French, English 
 
 Personal skills: 
 
• Think in "Problem-Action-Results" terms 

• Be proactive and driven 

• Show strong client service ethic 

• Maintain quality standards despite schedule pressures 

• Highly organized, manage tight deadlines within a high-risk environment, ability to work under pressure 

• Strong analytical skills with an ability to identify problems and propose solutions. 

• Express opinions and criticism in a constructive way 

• Be a continuous learner 

• Adaptability, self-motivation and teamwork 

• Good understanding of the risks inherent to the corporate actions environment and demonstrate good discipline around control and escalation. 

• Build lasting client relationships 

• Consistently comply with internal & external regulations 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione temporanea - 6 mesi ## Missione - Garantire l'elaborazione accurata e tempestiva dei pagamenti di reddito per tutti i conti bancari, mantenendo il rispetto dei requisiti normativi e dei controlli interni - Offrire un servizio eccezionale ai clienti e agli stakeholder, garantendo operazioni fluide all'interno della funzione di elaborazione dei redditi ## Principali responsabilità ### Elaborazione redditi - Elaborare le transazioni relative ai redditi, inclusi dividendi, interessi e altre distribuzioni - Garantire accuratezza e tempestività in conformità con le procedure e le normative stabilite ### Reconciliazione e verifica - Reconciliare e verificare le transazioni di reddito, assicurando la corretta allocazione ai conti dei clienti - Investigare e risolvere discrepanze o eccezioni - Gestire le rivendicazioni di mercato e collaborare con broker esterni e controparti ### Comunicazione con i clienti - Rispondere alle interrogazioni dei Relationship Managers, degli stakeholder interni ed esterni (es. custodi, emittenti, agenti) - Fornire aggiornamenti e mantenere un alto livello di professionalità e servizio clienti ### Documentazione e conservazione - Conservare registrazioni accurate delle transazioni di reddito e della documentazione correlata - Assicurare una documentazione adeguata per fini di audit e normativi ### Conformità normativa - Tenersi informati sulle normative rilevanti, sulle pratiche di settore e sulle politiche interne ## Profilo richiesto ###

jobs.title: Assistant Relationship Manager Emerging Markets

titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire adjoint des relations Marchés émergents

jobs.description:
Mission 
 Assist the relationship manager(s) in opening new relationships and serving clients, in compliance with 
 the Bank’s internal regulations and guidelines within the Eastern Europe region. 
 
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Prepare the necessary documentation for client meetings and business trips for relationship managers 

• Execute and monitor stock exchange orders, forex transactions, fiduciary relationships, loans, payment orders and credit card applications 

• Provide administrative support to the Team Head 

• Cash Management 

• Assist in AML clarifications and prepare clients KYC and related updates with direct line contact 

• Direct interaction with clients by phone, e-mail and, occasionally in meetings 

• Prepare and monitor account openings, closings and mutations 

• Maintain records in compliance with internal and external regulation (for example: portfolio reviews, AML, KYC, etc.) 

• Perform other administrative tasks as needed (for example: preparing presentations, travel arrangements, helping clients with any requests, banking and non-banking, etc.) 

• Deputy of other assistants if needed 
 

 Your Profile 
 
• Degree in a related field (banking apprenticeship, CYP, banking internship or similar) 

• Private Banking certificate, CWMA or other equivalent certification a plus 

• Minimum 5 years of experience in a similar role in a Private Bank 

• Strong banking and KYC knowledge 

• Strong team spirit, inter-personal skills, open-minded, highly service and client oriented as well as excellent communication skills 

• Fluent in French and English. Russian would be a strong added value 
 
 Others 
 
• Swiss Residence mandatory 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione - Assistere il responsabile dei rapporti nell’apertura di nuove relazioni e servire i clienti, nel rispetto delle normative e delle linee guida interne della Banca nell’Europa orientale. ## Principali responsabilitÃ - Preparare la documentazione necessaria per le riunioni dei clienti e viaggi di lavoro per i responsabili delle relazioni - Eseguire e monitorare gli ordini di borsa, le transazioni forex, le relazioni fiduciarie, i prestiti, gli ordini di pagamento e le applicazioni della carta di credito - Fornire supporto amministrativo al Team Head - Cash Management - Assist in AML chiarimenti e preparare i clienti KYC e relativi aggiornamenti con il contatto diretto linea - Interazione diretta con i clienti per telefono, e-mail e-mail e-mail, e-mail, e-mail e-mail, occasionalmente in riunioni, - Eseguire altri compiti amministrativi necessari (ad esempio: preparare presentazioni, organizzare viaggi, aiutare i clienti con qualsiasi richiesta, bancario e non bancario, ecc.) - Deputato di altri assistenti se necessario ## Il tuo profilo - Laurea in un campo correlato (apprendistato bancario, CYP, stage bancari o simili) - Certificato bancario privato, CWMA o altro equivalente certificazione un plus - Minimo 5 anni di esperienza in un ruolo simile Il russo sarebbe un forte valore aggiunto ## Altri - Swiss Residence obbligatorio ## Core Competencies - Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Rispetto alle normative e alle direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission - Betreuen Sie die Beziehungsmanager bei der Eröffnung neuer Beziehungen und Servieren von Kunden in Übereinstimmung mit den internen Vorschriften und Richtlinien der Bank in der Region Osteuropa. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten - Bereiten Sie die notwendige Dokumentation für Kundensitzungen und Geschäftsreisen für Beziehungsmanager vor - Erfassen und überwachen Sie Börsenaufträge, Forex-Transaktionen, fiduziäre Beziehungen, Kredite, Zahlungsaufträge und Kreditkarten-Anwendungen - Stellen Sie administrative Unterstützung für das Team Head - Cash Management - Assist in AML Klärungen und bereiten Sie Kunden KYC und damit zusammenhängende Updates mit direktem Leitungskontakt - Direkte Interaktion mit Kunden per Telefon, E-Mail und Öffnungen, gelegentlich in Sitzungen - Vorbereitung - Vorbereitungen - Führen Sie andere administrative Aufgaben nach Bedarf durch (z.B. Vorbereitung von Präsentationen, Reisevereinbarungen, Unterstützung von Kunden bei Anfragen, Banking und Nicht-Banking, etc.) - Stellvertretender anderer Assistenten, wenn erforderlich Ihr Profil - Grad in einem verwandten Bereich (Banking, CYP, Banking Praktika oder ähnliches) - Private Banking Certificate, CWMA oder andere gleichwertige Zertifizierung a plus - Mindesten 5 Jahre Erfahrung in einer ähnlichen Rolle in einer privaten Bank - Russisch würde ein starker Mehrwert sein: Swiss Residence obligatorische Kernkompetenzen - Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission - Aider le ou les gestionnaires de relations à ouvrir de nouvelles relations et à servir les clients, conformément aux règlements et lignes directrices internes de la Banque dans la région de l'Europe de l'Est. ## Principales responsabilités - Préparer la documentation nécessaire pour les réunions de clients et les voyages d'affaires pour les gestionnaires de relations - Exécuter et surveiller les ordres boursiers, les transactions de forex, les relations fiduciaires, les prêts, les ordres de paiement et les demandes de cartes de crédit - Fournir un soutien administratif au chef d'équipe - Gestion de la trésorerie - Aider à clarifier la LPA et préparer les clients KYC et les mises à jour connexes avec contact direct - Interaction directe avec les clients par téléphone, courriel et, occasionnellement, lors de réunions - Préparer et surveiller les ouvertures de compte, les fermetures et les mutations - Maintenir les dossiers conformément à la réglementation interne et externe (par exemple : examens de portefeuille, LPA, CJA, etc.) - Exécuter d'autres tâches administratives au besoin (par exemple : préparer des présentations, organiser des voyages, aider les clients pour toute demande, services bancaires et non bancaires, etc.) - Adjoint d'autres assistants au besoin ## Votre profil - Diplôme dans un domaine connexe (apprentissage bancaire, CYP, stage bancaire ou similaire) - Certificat de banque privée, CWMA ou autre certification équivalente a plus - Au moins 5 ans d'expérience dans un rôle similaire dans une banque privée - Forte connaissance des services bancaires et du KYC - Fort esprit d'équipe, compétences interpersonnelles, ouverture d'esprit, service élevé et orientation client ainsi qu'excellentes compétences en communication - Fluent en français et en anglais. Le russe serait une forte valeur ajoutée ## Autres - Résidence suisse obligatoire ## Compétences de base - Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Conformité aux règlements et directives internes

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Structured Product Engineer
jobs.description:
Mission & Main responsibilities 
 
• Product Management: 
• Oversee the booking process for new structured products and ensure effective life cycle monitoring of existing products.

• Manage post-trade services for the EMEA team, including the creation of products in internal systems and mapping products into team tools.

• Act as a liaison between Bankers, Advisors, Middle Office, and Back Office teams to ensure seamless communication and coordination.
 
 
 
• Digital Development and Process Optimization: 
• Identify opportunities for improvement in both automated and manual tasks, providing actionable feedback and suggestions.

• Design, develop, and maintain Excel-based tools to support the Structured Products team in their daily operations.

• Contribute to the enhancement of digital processes to improve efficiency and accuracy in team workflows.

• Contribute to automation of the booking process.
 
 
 
• Ensure the best execution in a secure framework in open architecture 
• Pricing of structured products in a secure operational framework

• Focus on flow products (in comparison to solution products)

• Ensure best execution in accordance with regulatory requirements

• Management of the Issuer relationship, with a focus on the search for internal group synergies

• Back up of the Solutions activity in case of needs
 
 
 
• Development of tactical trade ideas 
• Design, analysis, and selection of SP tactical ideas (trading axis, market opportunities etc.)

• Promotion of new payoffs within subscription products
 
 
 
• Client focus: 
• Provide expertise and support to internal partners and clients

• Take initiatives to achieve quantitative objectives for the structured products business

• Build relationship with private bankers

• Favour internal synergies
 
 
 Your Profile 
 
• Education: Master degree in Financial Markets

• Experience Technical skills - 5y of experience on Structured Products field

• Languages - English, French, German, others

• Personal skills - Team player, agile, Pro active, ability to take initiatives, business developpement & service oriented

• IT skills: Programming proficiency with at least one major language, such as Python. Excellent knowledge of the Pandas and NumPy packages. Proven experience in project development or automation using this expertise / data management and data analysis.

• Others: Swiss Residence

jobs.title: Securities Master File Specialist
jobs.description:
• Job Summary 

• The Securities Master File Specialist is a critical role within the bank, responsible for managing and maintaining the integrity of financial instrument data across Wealth Management and Asset Management businesses. This role ensures the accurate and timely setup, maintenance, and monitoring of securities and benchmarks, supporting front office teams, risk management, operations, and client reporting. 

• In addition to the core responsibilities, the Securities Master File Specialist will play a pivotal role in the project to replace the current tool managing the securities master file . This includes contributing significantly to the success of the project by actively participating in testing, data migration validation, and supporting the adoption of the new platform. 

• The ideal candidate will have a strong attention to detail, excellent analytical skills, and the ability to collaborate effectively with internal and external stakeholders. The role also involves active participation in project management initiatives to enhance processes, systems, and data quality. 
 

• Key Responsibilities 

• Securities and Prices Management 

• Open and update financial instruments in the database, ensuring accuracy and completeness. 

• Process requests for new instrument setups from various business units, including Private Banking, Asset Management, Treasury, and Trading. 

• Conduct thorough analysis and research of additional information (e.g., prospectuses, offering documents, term sheets, and data providers). 

• Enter and maintain additional information in the Instruments Database. 

• Manage and monitor prices and Net Asset Values (NAV) per share. 

• Perform regular controls to ensure data quality and integrity. 

• Data Quality Assurance 

• Execute daily, weekly, and monthly processes and controls to maintain a high level of data quality service. 

• Ensure data accuracy to support front office teams, risk management, and operations. 

• Participate in the implementation of new procedures, projects, and controls. 

• Document all processes with operational procedures (including process flows, risks, controls, and key performance indicators). 
 

• Role in the Securities Master File tool replacement project 

• Testing and Validation: 
• Actively participate in defining and executing test cases for the new platform. 

• Analyze test results, identify anomalies, and collaborate with project teams to resolve issues. 

• Ensure the new tool meets functional and operational requirements. 
 

• Data Migration and Quality Control: 
• Validate the accuracy and completeness of data migrated to the new platform. 

• Perform detailed checks to identify and address discrepancies in the migrated data. 
 

• Change Management and User Support: 
 
• Contribute to the development of user guides, training materials, and process documentation for the new tool. 

• Provide training and support to end-users to ensure a smooth transition to the new platform. 

• Act as a key point of contact for feedback and troubleshooting during the implementation phase. 
 

• Core competencies 

• Behave Ethically 

• Communicate Effectively 

• Foster Teamwork 

• Creativity/Innovation 

• Organize 

• Plan 

• Lead / Manage 

• Make Decisions 

• Solve Problems 

 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione The Securities Master File Specialist è un ruolo fondamentale all'interno della banca, responsabile della gestione e del mantenimento dell'integrità dei dati degli strumenti finanziari nelle aziende di Gestione della ricchezza e Gestione delle risorse. Questo ruolo garantisce l'accurata e tempestiva configurazione, manutenzione e monitoraggio dei valori mobiliari e dei benchmark, supportando i team di front office, la gestione dei rischi, le operazioni e il reporting dei clienti. Oltre alle responsabilità principali, il Securities Master File Specialist svolgerà un ruolo fondamentale nel progetto per sostituire l'attuale strumento di gestione del file master titoli. Ciò include contribuire in modo significativo al successo del progetto partecipando attivamente ai test, alla convalida della migrazione dei dati e supportando l'adozione della nuova piattaforma. Il candidato ideale avrà una forte attenzione ai dettagli, ottime capacità analitiche e la capacità di collaborare efficacemente con gli stakeholder interni ed esterni. Il ruolo coinvolge anche la partecipazione attiva alle iniziative di project management per migliorare processi, sistemi e qualità dei dati. ## Responsabilità chiave ### Securities and Price Management - Aprire e aggiornare gli strumenti finanziari nel database, garantendo accuratezza e completezza. - Richieste di processo per nuove configurazioni di strumenti da varie unità aziendali, tra cui Private Banking, Asset Management, Tesoro e Trading. - condurre un'analisi approfondita e una ricerca di ulteriori informazioni (ad esempio, prospezioni, documenti, schede di termine e fornitori di dati). - Inserisci e conserva ulteriori informazioni nel database degli strumenti. - Gestione e monitoraggio dei prezzi e dei valori patrimoniali netti (NAV) per azione. - Eseguire controlli regolari per garantire la qualità e l'integrità dei dati. ### Data Quality Assurance - Eseguire processi e controlli giornalieri, settimanali e mensili per mantenere un alto livello di servizio di qualità dei dati. - Assicurare l'accuratezza dei dati per supportare i team di front office, la gestione dei rischi e le operazioni. - Partecipazione all'attuazione di nuove procedure, progetti e controlli. - Documentare tutti i processi con procedure operative (compresi flussi di processo, rischi, controlli e indicatori chiave delle prestazioni). #### Ruolo nel progetto di sostituzione dello strumento Securities Master File ### Testing and Validation: - Partecipa attivamente alla definizione e all'esecuzione dei casi di prova per la nuova piattaforma. - No. Analizzare i risultati dei test, identificare le anomalie e collaborare con i team di progetto per risolvere i problemi. - Assicurarsi che il nuovo strumento soddisfi requisiti funzionali e operativi. #### Data Migration and Quality Control: - Convalida l'accuratezza e la completezza dei dati migrati alla nuova piattaforma. - Eseguire controlli dettagliati per identificare e affrontare discrepanze nei dati migrati. ##### Change Management and User Support: - Contribuire allo sviluppo di guide utente, materiali di formazione e documentazione di processo per il nuovo strumento. - Fornire formazione e supporto agli utenti finali per garantire una transizione regolare alla nuova piattaforma. - Agire come punto chiave di contatto per il feedback e la risoluzione dei problemi durante la fase di attuazione. ## Core Competencies - Behave Ethically - Communicate Effectively - Foster Teamwork - Creativity/Innovation - Organizza - Plan - Lead / Manage - Fai decisioni - Solve Problems ### Core Competencies: Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda - Dedication - Conviction - Agility - Responsibility - Competenza con regolamenti e direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Der Securities Master File Specialist ist eine wichtige Rolle innerhalb der Bank, die für die Verwaltung und Aufrechterhaltung der Integrität von Finanzinstrumentendaten in den Bereichen Wealth Management und Asset Management verantwortlich ist. Diese Rolle gewährleistet die genaue und zeitnahe Einrichtung, Wartung und Überwachung von Wertpapieren und Benchmarks, die Unterstützung von Front-Office-Teams, Risikomanagement, Operationen und Kundenberichterstattung. Neben den Kernaufgaben wird der Securities Master File Specialist eine zentrale Rolle im Projekt spielen, um das aktuelle Tool, das die Wertpapiermasterdatei verwaltet, zu ersetzen. Dazu gehört auch ein wesentlicher Beitrag zum Erfolg des Projekts durch aktive Teilnahme an Tests, Datenmigrationsvalidierung und Unterstützung der Einführung der neuen Plattform. Der ideale Kandidat wird eine starke Liebe zum Detail, exzellente analytische Fähigkeiten und die Fähigkeit haben, effektiv mit internen und externen Akteuren zusammenzuarbeiten. Die Rolle beinhaltet auch eine aktive Beteiligung an Projektmanagementinitiativen zur Verbesserung von Prozessen, Systemen und Datenqualität. ### Wertpapier- und Preismanagement - Offene und aktualisierte Finanzinstrumente in der Datenbank, um Genauigkeit und Vollständigkeit zu gewährleisten. - Prozessanfragen für neue Instrumenten-Setups aus verschiedenen Geschäftsbereichen, darunter Private Banking, Asset Management, Treasury und Trading. - Durchführung einer gründlichen Analyse und Erforschung zusätzlicher Informationen (z.B. Prospekte, Angebotsunterlagen, Terminblätter und Datenanbieter). - Geben Sie zusätzliche Informationen in die Instrumentendatenbank ein und pflegen Sie. - Verwalten und überwachen Sie Preise und Net Asset Values (NAV) pro Aktie. - Regelmäßige Kontrollen durchführen, um die Datenqualität und Integrität zu gewährleisten. ### Data Quality Assurance - Execute tägliche, wöchentliche und monatliche Prozesse und Kontrollen, um ein hohes Maß an Datenqualität zu erhalten. - Stellen Sie die Datengenauigkeit sicher, um Front-Office-Teams, Risikomanagement und Operationen zu unterstützen. - Nehmen Sie an der Umsetzung neuer Verfahren, Projekte und Kontrollen teil. - Erfassen Sie alle Prozesse mit operativen Verfahren (einschließlich Prozessflüsse, Risiken, Kontrollen und Schlüsselindikatoren). ### Rolle im Securities Master File Tool Ersatzprojekt Testen und Validierung: - aktiv an der Definition und Durchführung von Testfällen für die neue Plattform beteiligt. - Ja. Testergebnisse analysieren, Anomalien identifizieren und mit Projektteams zusammenarbeiten, um Probleme zu lösen. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass das neue Werkzeug funktionale und betriebliche Anforderungen erfüllt. Datenmigration und Qualitätskontrolle: - Die Genauigkeit und Vollständigkeit der Daten, die auf die neue Plattform migriert werden. - Durchführung detaillierter Kontrollen zur Identifizierung und Adressierung von Abweichungen in den migrierten Daten. Change Management and User Support: - Beitrag zur Entwicklung von Benutzerführungen, Trainingsmaterialien und Prozessdokumentationen für das neue Tool. - Ausbildung und Unterstützung für Endbenutzer, um einen reibungslosen Übergang zur neuen Plattform zu gewährleisten. - Aktivieren Sie als zentrale Anlaufstelle für Feedback und Fehlersuche während der Umsetzungsphase. Kernkompetenzen - Ethisch verhalten - Kommunizieren Sie effektiv - Foster Teamwork - Kreativität/Innovation - Organisieren - Plan - Lead / Manage - Entscheidungen treffen - Probleme lösen ### Kernkompetenzen: Adherence to the company's value - Dedication - Conviction - Agility - Responsibility - Compliance mit Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Le Securities Master File Specialist est un rôle essentiel au sein de la banque, responsable de la gestion et du maintien de l'intégrité des données d'instruments financiers dans les entreprises de gestion de patrimoine et de gestion d'actifs. Ce rôle assure la mise en place, la maintenance et la surveillance précises et opportunes des valeurs mobilières et des points de repère, appuie les équipes de front, la gestion des risques, les opérations et les rapports des clients. En plus des responsabilités fondamentales, le spécialiste du fichier principal des valeurs mobilières jouera un rôle central dans le projet pour remplacer l'outil actuel de gestion du fichier principal des valeurs mobilières. Cela comprend une contribution importante au succès du projet en participant activement aux essais, à la validation de la migration des données et en appuyant l'adoption de la nouvelle plateforme. Le candidat idéal accordera une grande attention aux détails, aux excellentes compétences analytiques et à la capacité de collaborer efficacement avec les intervenants internes et externes. Le rôle consiste également à participer activement aux initiatives de gestion de projet visant à améliorer les processus, les systèmes et la qualité des données. ## Principales responsabilités ### Gestion des valeurs mobilières et des prix - Ouvrir et mettre à jour les instruments financiers dans la base de données, en assurant l'exactitude et l'exhaustivité. - Traiter les demandes de nouvelles configurations d'instruments provenant de diverses unités commerciales, y compris la banque privée, la gestion d'actifs, le Trésorerie et la négociation. - Procéder à une analyse approfondie et à une recherche d'informations supplémentaires (p. ex. prospectus, documents d'offre, fiches terminologiques et fournisseurs de données). - Entrez et maintenez des informations supplémentaires dans la base de données Instruments. - Gérer et surveiller les prix et les valeurs nettes d'actifs (VAN) par action. - Effectuer des contrôles réguliers pour assurer la qualité et l'intégrité des données. ### Assurance de la qualité des données - Exécuter des processus et des contrôles quotidiens, hebdomadaires et mensuels pour maintenir un niveau élevé de service de qualité des données. - Assurer l'exactitude des données pour appuyer les équipes de front, la gestion des risques et les opérations. - Participer à la mise en oeuvre de nouvelles procédures, projets et contrôles. - Documenter tous les processus avec les procédures opérationnelles (y compris les flux de processus, les risques, les contrôles et les indicateurs de rendement clés). ### Rôle dans le projet de remplacement de l'outil Master File de valeurs mobilières #### Test et validation : - Participer activement à la définition et à l'exécution des cas de test pour la nouvelle plateforme. - Oui. Analyser les résultats des tests, identifier les anomalies et collaborer avec les équipes de projet pour résoudre les problèmes. - Veiller à ce que le nouvel outil réponde aux exigences fonctionnelles et opérationnelles. #### Migration de données et contrôle de la qualité : - Valider l'exactitude et l'exhaustivité des données migrées vers la nouvelle plateforme. - Effectuer des vérifications détaillées pour identifier et corriger les écarts dans les données migrées. #### Gestion du changement et soutien aux utilisateurs : - Contribuer à l'élaboration de guides d'utilisateur, de matériel de formation et de documentation sur les processus pour le nouvel outil. - Offrir une formation et un soutien aux utilisateurs finals pour assurer une transition sans heurt vers la nouvelle plateforme. - Agir en tant que point de contact clé pour la rétroaction et le dépannage pendant la phase de mise en œuvre. ## Compétences de base - Être éthique - Communiquer efficacement - Favoriser le travail d'équipe - Créativité/innovation - Organiser - Plan - Responsable / Gérer - Prendre des décisions - Résoudre les problèmes ### Compétences de base : Respect des valeurs de l'entreprise - Dédicace - Conviction - Agilité - Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.title: Team Head Cash Services
jobs.description:
• Mission 
 Within the COO division, part of the Group Operations, the Cash Services Department covers the following areas:
- Transfers & payments; 
- Cash counter, Clients’ safes and Client care center (CCC); 
- The Money Market & FX transactions; 
- The Cards activity. 
The mission of the department is to make sure that the bank’s, contractual or regulatory, obligations are fulfilled, in line with its policies and procedures, especially in a more and more strict and complex environment but also bearing in mind the excellence in the service to clients.
The mission of the Head of Cash Services is to provide proper guidance and support to the teams to achieve this goal.

 
 
• Main responsibilities 
• Coordinate and organise the work of the department 
• Delegate appropriately the tasks to each team leader.

• Provide guidance based on the top management direction.

• Make sure, with a clear communication of the bank’s policies and procedures, that a correct risk assessment is made and, if need be, escalation is timely done according to the level of risk.
 

• Implement relevant monitoring and controls framework 
• Identify any risk (operational and regulatory)

• Identify, implement and report quantitative and qualitative reporting

• Challenge procedures and routines. 
 

• Coordinate with internal or external counterparties 
• Act as an advisor and coordinator vis-à-vis branches and subsidiaries across the Group, sharing best practices, standardising processes and controls when possible. 

• Maintain good relationship with all stakeholders of the bank to provide support and advise. 

• Develop a network of professionals with other institutions to keep abreast of systems and regulations evolutions. 
 

• Continuously improve the set up 
• Be actively involved in all projects impacting the department from TOM definition to tests and implementation 

• Propose measures to increase efficiency, quality and productivity.
 

• Provide team leadership and coaching 
• Lead by example: behaviour consistent with words

• Adopt change with a positive attitude. Express opinions and criticism in a constructive way

• Communicate effectively and be able to take decisions including in difficult situations 

• Coach and help develop team members: identify good and low performers and take appropriate actions to develop them or solve dysfunctional behaviour
 
 
 
 
 
• Your Profile 
• Strong knowledge in Cash Services activities and processes 

• MS Office and major banking software

• Experience and proven success in running similar position 

• English is a requirement, other languages a plus
 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione All’interno della divisione COO, parte del Gruppo Operazioni, il Dipartimento dei Servizi Contanti copre le seguenti aree: - Trasferimenti e pagamenti; - Contante di cassa, Cassetta di sicurezza dei Clienti e Centro Assistenza Clienti (CCC); - Le transazioni Money Market & FX; - L’attività Cards. La missione del dipartimento è assicurarsi che gli obblighi della banca, contrattuali o regolamentari, siano adempiuti, in linea con le sue politiche e procedure, soprattutto in un ambiente sempre più rigido e complesso, ma anche tenendo presente l’eccellenza nel servizio ai clienti. La missione del Capo dei Cash Services è di fornire una corretta guida e supporto alle squadre per raggiungere questo obiettivo. Coordinare e organizzare il lavoro del Dipartimento in modo appropriato i compiti di ogni capo squadra. Fornire una guida in base alla direzione di gestione superiore. Assicurarsi, con una chiara comunicazione delle politiche e delle procedure della banca, che viene effettuata una corretta valutazione del rischio e, se necessario, l’escalation viene eseguita puntualmente in base al livello di rischio. Implementare il quadro di monitoraggio e controlli pertinenti Identificare qualsiasi rischio (operativo e normativo) Identificare, implementare e segnalare procedure e routine di report quantitativi e qualitativi. Coordinate con le controparti interne o esterne Act come consulente e coordinatore nei confronti delle filiali e delle filiali di tutto il Gruppo, condividendo le migliori pratiche, standardizzando i processi e i controlli quando possibile. Mantenere un buon rapporto con tutti gli stakeholder della banca per fornire supporto e consulenza. Sviluppare una rete di professionisti con altre istituzioni per mantenere il rispetto dei sistemi e delle evoluzioni dei regolamenti. Migliorare costantemente l'impostazione Essere attivamente coinvolti in tutti i progetti che influenzano il dipartimento dalla definizione TOM ai test e all'implementazione Proporre misure per aumentare l'efficienza, la qualità e la produttività. Fornire leadership di squadra e coaching Lead per esempio: comportamento coerente con le parole Modificare con un atteggiamento positivo. Esprimere opinioni e critiche in modo costruttivo Comunicare efficacemente ed essere in grado di prendere decisioni anche in situazioni difficili Coach e aiutare a sviluppare i membri del team: identificare i buoni e bassi interpreti e prendere le azioni appropriate per svilupparli o risolvere il comportamento disfunzionale Il tuo profilo Conoscenza forte nelle attività e processi di MS Office e importanti software bancari Esperienza e il successo dimostrato nell'esecuzione di una posizione simile inglese è un requisito, altre lingue un plus Core Competencies:

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Im Geschäftsbereich COO, Teil des Konzernbetriebs, deckt die Abteilung Cash Services die folgenden Bereiche ab: - Transfers & Zahlungen; - Cash-Zähler, Clients’ Safes und Client Care Center (CCC); - The Money Market & FX Transaktionen; - The Cards Aktivität. Die Aufgabe der Abteilung besteht darin, sicherzustellen, dass die Verpflichtungen der Bank im Einklang mit ihren Politiken und Verfahren, insbesondere in einem immer strengeren und komplexeren Umfeld, aber auch mit Blick auf die Exzellenz im Service für Kunden erfüllt werden. Die Aufgabe des Leiters der Cash Services ist es, den Teams eine angemessene Beratung und Unterstützung zu bieten, um dieses Ziel zu erreichen. Hauptverantwortliche Koordination und Organisation der Arbeit der Abteilung Entscheiden Sie die Aufgaben jedem Teamleiter entsprechend. Beratung auf Basis der Top-Management-Richtung. Stellen Sie sicher, dass mit einer klaren Mitteilung der Politiken und Verfahren der Bank eine korrekte Risikobewertung vorgenommen wird und gegebenenfalls die Eskalation entsprechend dem Risikoniveau rechtzeitig erfolgt. Umsetzung eines relevanten Überwachungs- und Kontrollrahmens Identifizierung eines Risikos (Betrieb und Regulierung) Identifizieren, implementieren und berichten quantitative und qualitative Berichterstattung Herausforderung Verfahren und Routinen. Koordiniert mit internen oder externen Gegenparteien Gesetz als Berater und Koordinator gegenüber Zweigen und Tochtergesellschaften im gesamten Konzern, teilen Sie Best Practices, Standardisierung Prozesse und Kontrollen, wenn möglich. Bewahren Sie gute Beziehungen zu allen Interessengruppen der Bank, um Unterstützung und Beratung zu bieten. Entwickeln Sie ein Netzwerk von Fachleuten mit anderen Institutionen, um die Entwicklung von Systemen und Vorschriften zu halten. Kontinuierlich verbessern Sie die Einrichtung aktiv in alle Projekte, die die Abteilung von TOM-Definition bis zu Tests und Umsetzung beeinflussen.
