descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission Au sein de la division COO, qui fait partie des Opérations du Groupe, le Département des services en espèces couvre les domaines suivants : - Transferts et paiements; - Comptoir de caisse, coffres-forts des clients et centre de soins aux clients (CCC); - Le marché monétaire et les transactions FX; - L'activité Cartes. La mission du département est de s'assurer que les obligations de la banque, contractuelles ou réglementaires, sont remplies, conformément à ses politiques et procédures, en particulier dans un environnement de plus en plus strict et complexe, mais aussi en gardant à l'esprit l'excellence du service aux clients. Le chef des services de trésorerie a pour mission de fournir aux équipes des conseils et un appui appropriés pour atteindre cet objectif. Principales responsabilités Coordonner et organiser le travail du département Délégué les tâches à chaque chef d'équipe. Fournir des conseils fondés sur l'orientation de la haute direction. Assurez-vous, avec une communication claire des politiques et des procédures de la banque, qu'une évaluation correcte des risques est faite et, au besoin, que l'escalade est effectuée en temps opportun en fonction du niveau de risque. Mettre en oeuvre le cadre de surveillance et de contrôle pertinent Identifier tout risque (opérationnel et réglementaire) Déterminer, mettre en oeuvre et rapporter les rapports quantitatifs et qualitatifs Procédures et routines du Défi. Coordonner avec les contreparties internes ou externes Act en tant que conseiller et coordonnateur auprès des succursales et filiales du Groupe, en partageant les meilleures pratiques, en standardisant les processus et les contrôles lorsque c'est possible. Maintenir de bonnes relations avec tous les intervenants de la banque afin de fournir soutien et conseils. Développer un réseau de professionnels avec d'autres institutions pour se tenir au courant de l'évolution des systèmes et des règlements. Améliorer continuellement la structure Être activement impliqué dans tous les projets touchant le Ministère de la définition TOM aux tests et à la mise en oeuvre Proposer des mesures pour accroître l'efficacité, la qualité et la productivité. Assurer le leadership et l'encadrement de l'équipe Diriger par exemple : comportement conforme aux mots Adopter le changement avec une attitude positive. Exprimer des opinions et des critiques de manière constructive Communiquer efficacement et être en mesure de prendre des décisions, y compris dans des situations difficiles Coach et aider à développer les membres de l'équipe: identifier les bons et les bas exécutants et prendre les mesures appropriées pour les développer ou résoudre les comportements dysfonctionnels Votre profil Forte connaissance des activités et des processus des services de trésorerie MS Office et des principaux logiciels bancaires Expérience et succès prouvé dans l'exécution d'un poste similaire L'anglais est une exigence, d'autres langues a plus Compétences de base : Adhérence à l'entreprise Valeurs : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Conformité aux règlements et directives internes

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Tax Specialist
jobs.description:
• Mission 
 We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Tax Specialist to join our Client Documentation and Tax Services Department.
As part of the Fiscal Reporting team, you will play a key role in ensuring the accuracy and quality of our clients’ tax statements, while collaborating with various departments and external providers.
This is a unique opportunity to grow in a fast-paced, stimulating environment and contribute to impactful projects across the bank.
 
 
• Main responsibilities 
• Tax Statement Review & Validation 
• Review and validate tax statements for over 20 international jurisdictions, including Switzerland, France, Portugal, Mexico, and others.

• Ensure that tax documents comply with local and international regulations before being sent to clients.
 

• Data Quality Assurance 
• Collaborate with our external provider to ensure the quality and accuracy of tax data before statement production.

• Identify and correct anomalies or inconsistencies in the data to ensure reliable reporting.
 

• Client Support & Front Office Interaction 
• Address inquiries and requests from the Front Office regarding tax statements, providing clear and precise explanations.

• Manage tax document orders in coordination with internal teams and external providers.
 

• Cross-Functional Collaboration 
• Work closely with Compliance, Operations, Front Office, and IT teams to ensure smooth management of tax processes.

• Actively participate in cross-functional projects involving process improvements, regulatory updates, or strategic initiatives.
 

• Project Management 
• Contribute to side projects related to tax data, information systems, and operational processes.

• Participate in the continuous improvement of tools and processes in collaboration with IT and other departments.
 

• Regulatory Compliance & Reporting 
• Stay updated on tax regulatory changes across the covered jurisdictions.

• Prepare detailed reports and maintain comprehensive documentation to meet audit and regulatory requirements.
 
 
 

• Your Profile 
• Experience : Minimum 2 years in banking, with a focus on tax services.

• Skills : Strong knowledge of financial instruments (Equities, Bonds, Structured Products, Derivatives – Listed or OTC) and their specific characteristics. Familiarity with European income and gains taxation is a plus. Proficiency in Microsoft Office is essential.

• Languages : Fluency in French and English is required; German, Italian, Spanish, or Portuguese is a plus.

• Mindset : Proactive, solution-oriented, and eager to learn. Strong problem-solving skills, ability to work quickly and efficiently, and a team player who thrives in a fast-paced environment.
 
 

• Why Join Us 
• Be part of a collaborative and innovative team.

• Work in a challenging yet rewarding environment.

• Develop your expertise and grow your career in a leading financial institution.

 
 

• 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Mansioni - Tax Statement Review & Validation - Valutazione e convalida delle dichiarazioni fiscali per oltre 20 giurisdizioni internazionali, tra cui Svizzera, Francia, Portogallo, Messico e altri. - Assicurarsi che i documenti fiscali siano conformi alle normative locali e internazionali prima di essere inviati ai clienti. ## Data Quality Assurance - Collabora con il nostro fornitore esterno per garantire la qualità e l'accuratezza dei dati fiscali prima della produzione delle dichiarazioni. - Identificare e correggere anomalie o incongruenze dei dati per garantire un report affidabile. ## Customer Support & Front Office Interaction - Richieste di indirizzo e richieste del Front Office relative alle dichiarazioni fiscali, fornendo spiegazioni chiare e precise. - Gestire gli ordini dei documenti fiscali in coordinamento con le squadre interne e i fornitori esterni. ## Cross-Functional Collaboration - Lavorare a stretto contatto con i team Compliance, Operations, Front Office e IT per garantire una gestione regolare dei processi fiscali. - Partecipa attivamente a progetti interfunzionali che coinvolgono miglioramenti di processo, aggiornamenti normativi o iniziative strategiche. ## Project Management - Contribuisci ai progetti collaterali relativi ai dati fiscali, ai sistemi informativi e ai processi operativi. - Partecipa al miglioramento continuo di strumenti e processi in collaborazione con IT e altri reparti. ## Normativa Compliance & Reporting - Resta aggiornato sulle modifiche normative fiscali nelle giurisdizioni coperte. - Preparare report dettagliati e mantenere una documentazione completa per soddisfare i requisiti di audit e regolamentazione. ## Requisiti - Esperienza: minimo 2 anni nel settore bancario, con un focus sui servizi fiscali. - Competenze: Forte conoscenza degli strumenti finanziari (Equità, Obbligazioni, Prodotti Strutturati, Derivati – Elencati o OTC) e delle loro caratteristiche specifiche. La familiarità con il reddito europeo e i guadagni fiscali è un plus. La competenza in Microsoft Office è essenziale. - Lingue: francese e inglese; tedesco, italiano, spagnolo o portoghese è un plus. - Mindset: Proattivo, orientato alla soluzione, e desideroso di imparare. Forte capacità di problem solving, capacità di lavorare in modo rapido ed efficiente, e un giocatore di squadra che prospera in un ambiente frenetico. # Cosa# offrendo - Fa parte di un team collaborativo e innovativo. - Lavorare in un ambiente stimolante ma gratificante. - Sviluppare la tua esperienza e crescere la tua carriera in un istituto finanziario leader. ## Contatto Nessuna informazione di contatto fornita. ## Core Competencies - Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility e Responsibility - Rispetto alle normative e alle direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: Mansioni - Tax Statement Review & Validation - Prüfung und Validierung von Steuererklärungen für über 20 internationale Gerichtsbarkeiten, darunter Schweiz, Frankreich, Portugal, Mexiko und andere. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass die Steuerdokumente den lokalen und internationalen Vorschriften entsprechen, bevor Sie an Kunden gesendet werden. Â Data Quality Assurance - Mit unserem externen Anbieter zusammenarbeiten, um die Qualität und Genauigkeit von Steuerdaten vor der Statement-Produktion zu gewährleisten. - Identifizierung und Korrektur von Anomalien oder Unstimmigkeiten in den Daten, um eine zuverlässige Berichterstattung zu gewährleisten. Â Client Support & Front Office Interaction - Adressenanfragen und Anfragen des Front Office bezüglich Steuererklärungen, die klare und präzise Erklärungen liefern. - Steuerbelegaufträge in Abstimmung mit internen Teams und externen Anbietern verwalten. Cross-Functional Collaboration - Arbeiten Sie eng mit Compliance-, Operations-, Front Office- und IT-Teams zusammen, um eine reibungslose Verwaltung von Steuerprozessen sicherzustellen. - Nehmen Sie aktiv an funktionsübergreifenden Projekten mit Prozessverbesserungen, regulatorischen Updates oder strategischen Initiativen teil. Projektmanagement - Nebenprojekte im Zusammenhang mit Steuerdaten, Informationssystemen und operativen Prozessen. - Erwarten Sie die kontinuierliche Verbesserung von Werkzeugen und Prozessen in Zusammenarbeit mit IT und anderen Abteilungen. Regulatory Compliance & Reporting - Bleiben Sie auf den Änderungen der Steuervorschriften in den gedeckten Zuständigkeiten aktualisiert. - Bereiten Sie detaillierte Berichte vor und pflegen Sie umfassende Dokumentationen, um die Prüfungs- und Regulierungsanforderungen zu erfüllen. Requisiti - Erfahrung: Mindestens 2 Jahre im Bankwesen, mit Schwerpunkt auf Steuerdienstleistungen. - Fähigkeiten: Starkes Wissen über Finanzinstrumente (Equities, Bonds, Structured Products, Derivatives – Listed or OTC) und deren spezifische Merkmale. Die Vertraulichkeit mit dem europäischen Einkommen und der Gewinnbesteuerung ist ein Plus. Die Effizienz in Microsoft Office ist unerlässlich. - Sprachen: Französisch und Englisch sind erforderlich; Deutsch, Italienisch, Spanisch oder Portugiesisch ist ein Plus. - Mindset: Proaktiv, lösungsorientiert und eifrig zu lernen. Starke Problemlösungsfähigkeiten, schnelles und effizientes Arbeiten und ein Teamplayer, der in einer schnelllebigen Umgebung lebt. Â Cosa offriamo - Sei Teil eines kollaborativen und innovativen Teams. - Arbeiten Sie in einer anspruchsvollen und dennoch lohnenden Umgebung. - Entwickeln Sie Ihr Know-how und wachsen Sie Ihre Karriere in einer führenden Finanzinstitution. (Contatto) Keine Kontaktinformationen zur Verfügung gestellt. Kernkompetenzen - Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mansioni - Examen et validation des déclarations fiscales - Examiner et valider les déclarations fiscales pour plus de 20 juridictions internationales, dont la Suisse, la France, le Portugal, le Mexique et d'autres. - Veiller à ce que les documents fiscaux soient conformes aux règlements locaux et internationaux avant d'être envoyés aux clients. ## Assurance de la qualité des données - Collaborer avec notre fournisseur externe pour assurer la qualité et l'exactitude des données fiscales avant la production des déclarations. - Identifier et corriger les anomalies ou les incohérences dans les données afin d'assurer la fiabilité des rapports. ## Client Support & Front Office Interaction - Adresser les demandes et les demandes du Front Office concernant les déclarations fiscales, en fournissant des explications claires et précises. - Gérer les commandes de documents fiscaux en coordination avec les équipes internes et les fournisseurs externes. ## Collaboration interfonctionnelle - Collaborer étroitement avec les équipes de conformité, d'exploitation, de front office et de TI pour assurer une gestion harmonieuse des processus fiscaux. - Participer activement à des projets interfonctionnels comportant des améliorations des processus, des mises à jour réglementaires ou des initiatives stratégiques. ## Gestion de projet - Contribuer aux projets parallèles liés aux données fiscales, aux systèmes d'information et aux processus opérationnels. - Participer à l'amélioration continue des outils et des processus en collaboration avec la TI et d'autres ministères. ## Conformité à la réglementation et rapports - Restez au courant des changements apportés à la réglementation fiscale dans les administrations visées. - Préparer des rapports détaillés et tenir à jour une documentation complète pour répondre aux exigences de la vérification et de la réglementation. ## Requisiti - Expérience : Minimum 2 ans en banque, avec un accent sur les services fiscaux. - Compétences : Forte connaissance des instruments financiers (actions, obligations, produits structurés, dérivés – cotés ou OTC) et de leurs caractéristiques spécifiques. La connaissance du revenu et des gains en Europe est un plus. La compétence dans Microsoft Office est essentielle. - Langues : L'allemand, l'italien, l'espagnol ou le portugais est un plus. - Mindset : Proactif, orienté vers la solution et désireux d'apprendre. Fortes compétences de résolution de problèmes, la capacité de travailler rapidement et efficacement, et un joueur d'équipe qui prospère dans un environnement rapide. ## Cosa offriamo - Faites partie d'une équipe collaborative et innovante. - Travailler dans un environnement stimulant mais gratifiant. - Développez votre expertise et développez votre carrière dans une institution financière de premier plan. Contatto Aucune information de contact fournie. ## Compétences de base - Respect des valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, condamnation, agilité et responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.title: Help Desk Officer - 1st level of support

titleByLocale.it: Help Desk Officer - 1° livello di supporto
titleByLocale.en: Help Desk Officer - 1st level of support

jobs.description:
Mission 
Based in our main office in Geneva, you will join the Global Service Desk team, providing first-line support to approximately 3,000 Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) colleagues worldwide.
 
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Answer to the Global Service Desk phone line for all UBP users worldwide.

• Manage emails sent to Global Service Desk.

• Manage workload from our self-ticketing tool.

• Provide remote assistance to users and try to resolve the problem on first call.

• Create incidents with clear and explicit information and assign to level 2 teams if necessary.

• Knowledge documentation and procedures updates.

• Working hours: Weekdays, shift coverage from 07:30 to 19:00.
 
 Your Profile 
 
• Help Desk Institute Certification (CFC) or equivalent.

• A first successful experience in a Help Desk service is mandatory.

• Microsoft Operating System Certification(s) will be an asset.

• ITIL Foundation Certification will be an asset.

• Expertise in Microsoft Windows 11 and Microsoft 365 (Office 365)

• Experience with Citrix and VDI environments and with Remote Access connection (RSA Secure ID, Citrix Workspace).

• Knowledge of, Active Directory, GPO, SCCM, Networking.

• Knowledge on Mobility: iOS and iPhone, iPad.

• JIRA service management tool knowledge.

• Fluent in French and English; additional languages considered an asset.
 
 Competencies 
 
• Excellent analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent oral and written communication skills.

• Highly customer service oriented.

• Priority setting, multitask ability.

• Team player willing to take ownership.

• Ability to work in a fast-changing environment.
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Con sede nella nostra sede principale a Ginevra, si unirà al team Global Service Desk, fornendo supporto di prima linea a circa 3.000 colleghi Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) in tutto il mondo. Risposta alla linea telefonica Global Service Desk per tutti gli utenti UBP in tutto il mondo. Gestire le email inviate a Global Service Desk. Gestisci il carico di lavoro dal nostro strumento di self-ticketing. Fornire assistenza remota agli utenti e cercare di risolvere il problema sulla prima chiamata. Creare incidenti con informazioni chiare ed esplicite e assegnare a squadre di livello 2 se necessario. Documentazione di conoscenza e aggiornamenti delle procedure. Ore lavorative: Weekdays, shift coverage from 07:30 to 19:00. Il tuo profilo Help Desk Institute Certificazione (CFC) o equivalente. Una prima esperienza di successo in un servizio Help Desk è obbligatoria. Microsoft Operating System Certification(s) sarà un bene. La certificazione ITIL Foundation sarà un bene. Esperienza in Microsoft Windows 11 e Microsoft 365 (Office 365) Esperienza con ambienti Citrix e VDI e con connessione di accesso remoto (RSA Secure ID, Citrix Workspace). Conoscenza di, Active Directory, GPO, SCCM, Networking. Conoscenza sulla mobilità: iOS e iPhone, iPad. JIRA conoscenza degli strumenti di gestione dei servizi. Fluente in francese e inglese; lingue aggiuntive considerate un bene. Competenze Eccellente pensiero analitico e capacità di problem solving. Eccellente capacità di comunicazione orale e scritta. Altamente orientato al servizio clienti. Impostazione prioritaria, capacità multitask. Giocatore di squadra disposto a prendere la proprietà. Capacità di lavorare in un ambiente in rapida evoluzione. Competenze fondamentali: Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità - Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne
descriptionByLocale.en: Mission Based in our main office in Geneva, you will join the Global Service Desk team, providing first-line support to approximately 3,000 Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) colleagues worldwide. Main responsibilities • Answer to the Global Service Desk phone line for all UBP users worldwide. • Manage emails sent to Global Service Desk. • Manage workload from our self-ticketing tool. • Provide remote assistance to users and try to resolve the problem on first call. • Create incidents with clear and explicit information and assign to level 2 teams if necessary. • Knowledge documentation and procedures updates. • Working hours: Weekdays, shift coverage from 07:30 to 19:00. Your Profile • Help Desk Institute Certification (CFC) or equivalent. • A first successful experience in a Help Desk service is mandatory. • Microsoft Operating System Certification(s) will be an asset. • ITIL Foundation Certification will be an asset. • Expertise in Microsoft Windows 11 and Microsoft 365 (Office 365) • Experience with Citrix and VDI environments and with Remote Access connection (RSA Secure ID, Citrix Workspace). • Knowledge of, Active Directory, GPO, SCCM, Networking. • Knowledge on Mobility: iOS and iPhone, iPad. • JIRA service management tool knowledge. • Fluent in French and English; additional languages considered an asset. Competencies • Excellent analytical thinking and problem-solving skills. • Excellent oral and written communication skills. • Highly customer service oriented. • Priority setting, multitask ability. • Team player willing to take ownership. • Ability to work in a fast-changing environment. Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives
descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Based in unserem Hauptbüro in Genf, Sie werden dem Global Service Desk Team beitreten und rund 3.000 Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) Kollegen weltweit unterstützen. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Antwort auf die Global Service Desk Telefonleitung für alle UBP-Nutzer weltweit. Verwalten Sie E-Mails an Global Service Desk. Verwalten Sie Workload von unserem selbstfahrenden Werkzeug. Bereitstellung von Remote-Hilfe für Benutzer und versuchen, das Problem auf dem ersten Anruf zu lösen. Erstellen Sie Vorkommnisse mit klaren und expliziten Informationen und weisen Sie gegebenenfalls Level 2 Teams zu. Aktualisierung der Wissensdokumentation und -verfahren. Arbeitszeit: Wochentage, Schichtabdeckung von 07:30 bis 19:00 Uhr. Ihr Profil Help Desk Institute Certification (CFC) oder gleichwertig. Eine erste erfolgreiche Erfahrung in einem Help Desk Service ist obligatorisch. Microsoft Operating System Certification(s) wird ein Asset sein. Die Zertifizierung der ITIL Foundation wird ein Vorteil sein. Expertise in Microsoft Windows 11 und Microsoft 365 (Office 365) Erfahrung mit Citrix und VDI-Umgebungen und mit Remote Access-Verbindung (RSA Secure ID, Citrix Workspace). Kenntnisse von, Active Directory, GPO, SCCM, Networking. Wissen über Mobilität: iOS und iPhone, iPad. JIRA Service Management Werkzeug Wissen. Flöten in Französisch und Englisch; zusätzliche Sprachen betrachteten einen Vermögenswert. Kompetenzen Ausgezeichnetes analytisches Denken und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten. Ausgezeichnete mündliche und schriftliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. Sehr kundenorientierter Service. Prioritätseinstellung, Multitask-Fähigkeit. Teamplayer bereit, Besitz zu nehmen. Fähigkeit, in einer sich schnell verändernden Umgebung zu arbeiten. Kernkompetenzen: Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission Basée dans notre bureau principal à Genève, vous rejoindrez l'équipe Global Service Desk, fournissant un soutien de première ligne à environ 3 000 collègues de l'Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) dans le monde entier. Principales responsabilités Répondez à la ligne téléphonique Global Service Desk pour tous les utilisateurs de UBP dans le monde entier. Gérer les courriels envoyés à Global Service Desk. Gérer la charge de travail à partir de notre outil d'auto-titrage. Fournir une assistance à distance aux utilisateurs et essayer de résoudre le problème au premier appel. Créer des incidents avec des informations claires et explicites et affecter aux équipes de niveau 2 si nécessaire. Documentation sur les connaissances et mises à jour des procédures. Heures de travail: en semaine, couverture de 7h30 à 19h. Certification de l'institut d'aide à votre profil (CFC) ou équivalent. Une première expérience réussie dans un service de dépannage est obligatoire. Microsoft Certification du système d'exploitation sera un atout. La certification ITIL Foundation sera un atout. Expertise dans Microsoft Windows 11 et Microsoft 365 (Office 365) Expérience avec Citrix et les environnements VDI et avec connexion à distance (RSA Secure ID, Citrix Workspace). Connaissance de, Active Directory, GPO, SCCM, Réseautage. Connaissance de la mobilité : iOS et iPhone, iPad. Connaissance des outils de gestion des services JIRA. Fluent en français et en anglais; langues supplémentaires considérées comme un atout. Compétences Excellente pensée analytique et compétences en résolution de problèmes. Excellentes compétences en communication orale et écrite. Très orienté service client. Définition des priorités, capacité multitâche. Joueur d'équipe prêt à prendre possession. Capacité de travailler dans un environnement en évolution rapide. Compétences de base : Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.title: Head of Internal Audit
jobs.description:
Job description 
 Head of Internal Audit, UBP UK 
 
 

 NAME: 
 
 
 CORPORATE JOB TITLE: 
 Head of Internal Audit, London 
 
 CORPORATE TITLE: 
 TBC 
 
 REPORTS TO: 
 CEO, UBP UK & 
 Group Head of Internal Audit & 
 Head of the Audit Committee (Member of the Board of Directors) 
 
 SENIOR MANAGEMENT FUNCTION (YES/NO): 
 Yes 
 
 PRESCRIBED RESPONSBILITY: 
 SMF 5 
 
 MATERIAL RISK TAKER (YES/NO): 
 Yes 
 
 CERTIFIED (YES/NO): 
 No 
 
 CERTIFIED FUNCTIONS: 
 
 
 
 LAST UPDATED: 
 March 2026 
 
 Main Responsibilities 
 This role will hold overall responsibility for Internal Audit across the UBP UK, providing risk-based objective assurance, advice and insight. UBP Internal Audit follows the standards of the profession, as well as the regulatory requirements and UBP Group policies and procedures. 
 The Head of Internal Audit is responsible for independent and objective audits reviews of all UBP UK activities, aiming at providing the Group with assurance as to how effectively it is controlling its operations, advises on improvements. The role also assesses the quality of risk management within an audited scope, the appropriateness and effectiveness of the permanent control framework, the risk sensitivity of management and compliance with codes of conduct and expected professional practices. 
 Role Duties 
 
• The Head of Audit is responsible for managing, planning, and administering the internal audit function in the UK, Channel Islands and Gibraltar regions for all activities of UBP UK. 

• Plan, supervise and take part in audits across all activities of UBP UK including financial, regulatory, compliance, operational audits as needed. 

• Develop and maintain good relationships with the head and key management personnel of all activity pillars across UBP UK. 

• Make recommendations for organisational and internal controls improvements of UBP UK. 

• Prepare Audit reports, and summaries of findings and audit reports and recommendations to the Group Audit department, as well as key management stakeholders of UBP UK. 

• Follow-up of Audit Recommendations until their implementation. 

• Make recommendations for improving the efficiency and effectiveness of the audit process. 

• Managing and engaging with various stakeholders across all departments of UBP UK at a senior level. 

• Liaise with external auditors and regulators. 
 
 
 The job description is not exhaustive and may include other duties as assigned from time to time by management. 
 
 Management and Supervision 
 
• Current line management responsibility for one Internal Audit Manager. 

• Set goals and objectives for all staff under direct supervision, complete performance appraisals and arrange appraisal interviews and ensure that the UBP UK guidelines are appropriately updated and communicated to staff. 
 
 Statements of Responsibility 
 Prescribed Responsibilities and Local Responsibilities for the Head of Internal Audit are set out in the Statements of Responsibility which is maintained as a separate document. 
 
 Conduct Rules 
 This role is required to comply with the Financial Conduct Authority’s (FCA) Individual Conduct Rules, which are: 
 
 
• To act with integrity; 

• To act with due skill, care and diligence; 

• To be open and cooperative with the FCA, the Prudential Regulation Authoritity (PRA) and other regulators; 

• To pay due regard to the interests of customers and treat them fairly; 

• To observe proper standards of market conduct; and 

• To act to deliver good outcomes for retail customers. 
 
 In addition, this role must also comply with the Senior Manager Conduct Rules, which are: 
 
 
• To take reasonable steps to ensure that the business of the firm for which you are responsible is controlled effectively. 

• To take reasonable steps to ensure that the business of the firm for which you are responsible complies with the relevant requirements and standards of the regulatory system. 

• To take reasonable steps to ensure that any delegation of your responsibilities is to an appropriate person and that you oversee the discharge of the delegated responsibility effectively. 

• To disclose appropriately any information of which the FCA or PRA would reasonably expect notice. 
 
 Person Specification 
 Knowledge, Skills & Experience 
 
 Qualifications 
 
• Qualifications: Professional Audit/Accounting qualification or Degree is preferred (ACA, ACCA, CIA, etc.) 

• Good knowledge of accounting principles and professional audit standards. 

• Solid experience at a Head of Internal Audit or Senior Audit Manager level with an audit firm or a financial institution. 

• Working experience in both wealth management (essential) and asset management industries (preferred). 

• Experience managing audits across a broad range of activities, including financial, compliance, regulatory, operational, systems, etc. 

• Able to influence senior stakeholders whilst maintaining objectivity and independence 

• Written skills for preparing and delivering quality audit reports, as well as strong relationship building and communication skills to ensure the best outcome. 

• Knowledge of UK banking legislation, regulations and rules (PRA/FCA) 

• Excellent communicator and able to build relationships with internal and external stakeholders including regulators 

• Ability to influence senior stakeholders 

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to assess complex situations and make sound decisions. 

• Demonstrated experience in developing and implementing compliance policies, and procedures. 

• On-going CPD (Continuous Professional Development) to ensure that adequate knowledge of the UK regulatory environment is maintained. 

• Suitably qualified to hold SMF 5. 
 
 Competencies and Values Required Level 
 
 Shows the drive to perform and be successful 5 
 Persistent in following-up and through on issues 5 
 Upholds the legal, regulatory and ethical standard of the UBP Group 5 
 Good product knowledge 4 
 Knowledge of legal regulatory and industry requirements 5 
 Business Development 3 
 Communication - listening, written and verbal with clients 5 
 Influencing 5 
 Relationship Building - internal and external 5 
 Strategic & commercial awareness 4 
 Planning & organising 4 
 Ethics and values 5 
 Customer focus 5 
 Explanation: 1: low level of competence / skill required, 2-3: average level of competence / skill required, 4-5: high level of competence skill required

Competencies and Values Required Level Shows the drive to perform and be successful 5 Persistent in following-up and through on issues 5 Upholds the legal, regulatory and ethical standard of the UBP Group 5 Good product knowledge 4 Knowledge of legal regulatory and industry requirements 5 Business Development 3 Communication - listening, written and verbal with clients 5 Influencing 5 Relationship Building - internal and external 5 Strategic & commercial awareness 4 Planning & organising 4 Ethics and values 5 Customer focus 5 Explanation: 1: low level of competence / skill required, 2-3: average level of competence / skill required, 4-5: high level of competence skill required

jobs.title: Facilities Officer (Temporary)
jobs.description:
• Mission 
 Veiller à la maintenance et à la sécurité des locaux tout en assurant le bien-être de leurs occupants.
Capacité à trouver des solutions efficaces et pragmatiques répondant aux besoins techniques des utilisateurs
 
 
• Main responsibilities 
• Répondre aux demandes des collaborateurs sur les problématiques liées aux locaux et équipements.

• Effectuer les petites réparations et interventions de maintenance de premier niveau.

• Contrôler l'état général des bâtiments et signaler les anomalies.

• Coordonner et accompagner les prestataires lors des interventions en s'assurant du respect des règles de sécurité de la banque.

• Vérifier visuellement les installations techniques et remonter les différents problèmes.

• Participer à l'organisation des espaces de travail.

• Effectuer des déménagements internes et des mises en place de mobiliers.

• Participer à la gestion des stocks de fournitures et passer les commandes validées par le responsable.

• Vérifier le bon fonctionnement des équipements de sécurité.

• Appliquer les consignes de sécurité de la banque.

• Participer au piquet technique.
 
 

• Your Profile 
• Expérience attendue de Facilities officer en interne ou dans une société de service. 

• Connaissances en bâtiment. 
o Electricité : vérification des installations et relamping. 
o Plomberie : Débouchage de canalisations simples et entretien des sanitaires. 
o Serrurerie/Menuiserie : Ajustement portes des fenêtres et du mobilier, changement des serrures. 
o Revêtement : remplacement de revêtement sols.

• Polyvalence et autonomie dans l'exécution des tâches. 

• Réactivité et capacité à gérer les urgences. 

• Sens du service et excellent relationnel. 

• Rigueur et respect des consignes. 
 
 

• Background 
• High School/ Maturité / Baccalauréat 

• Connaissances en sécurité incendie et accessibilité des bâtiments. 

• Excel, GMAO, Ticketing. 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Per garantire la manutenzione e la sicurezza dei locali, assicurando al contempo il benessere dei loro occupanti. Capacità di trovare soluzioni efficaci e pragmatiche che rispondano alle esigenze tecniche degli utenti Principali responsabilità Risponde alle esigenze dei dipendenti in materia di locali e attrezzature. Eseguire riparazioni minori e interventi di manutenzione di primo livello. Monitorare le condizioni generali di edifici e segnalare anomalie. Coordinare e supportare i fornitori in interventi garantendo il rispetto delle regole di sicurezza bancaria. Controllare visivamente le installazioni tecniche e tracciare i vari problemi. Partecipa all'organizzazione di spazi di lavoro. Internamente mobili e l'installazione di mobili. Partecipa alla gestione delle scorte di forniture e degli ordini di posto convalidati dal gestore. Controllare il corretto funzionamento delle apparecchiature di sicurezza. Applicare le istruzioni di sicurezza della banca. Partecipa al picket tecnico. La tua esperienza di profilo si aspettava da Servizi ufficiali in-house o in una società di servizi. Costruire la conoscenza. o Elettricità: verifica della struttura e rilamping. o Plumbing: Semplice apertura tubi e manutenzione sanitaria. o Serrature/Menuiserie: Regolazione di porte finestre e mobili, cambio di serrature. o Rivestimento: rivestimento pavimento sostituzione. Versatilità e autonomia nell'esecuzione dei compiti. Reattività e capacità di gestire le emergenze. Senso di servizio e rapporto eccellente. Rigor e conformità. Sfondo High School/Maturity / Corso di laurea Conoscenza della sicurezza antincendio e accessibilità degli edifici. Excel, GMAO, Ticketing. Competenze fondamentali: appartenenza alla società - conformità con le normative e le linee guida interne
descriptionByLocale.en: Mission To ensure the maintenance and safety of the premises while ensuring the well-being of their occupants. Ability to find effective and pragmatic solutions that meet the technical needs of users Main responsibilities Respond to the demands of employees on issues related to premises and equipment. Perform minor repairs and first-level maintenance interventions. Monitor general condition of buildings and report anomalies. Coordinate and support providers in interventions by ensuring compliance with bank security rules. Visually check the technical installations and trace the various problems. Participate in the organization of work spaces. Internally moving and installing furniture. Participate in the management of supplies stocks and place orders validated by the manager. Check the proper functioning of safety equipment. Apply the bank's security instructions. Participate in the technical picket. Your Profile Experience expected from Facilities officer in-house or in a service company. Building knowledge. o Electricity: facility verification and relamping. o Plumbing: Simple pipe opening and sanitary maintenance. o Locks/Menuiserie: Adjustment of windows and furniture doors, change of locks. o Coating: floor covering replacement. Versatility and autonomy in the performance of tasks. Reactivity and capacity to manage emergencies. Service sense and excellent relationship. Rigor and compliance. Background High School/Maturity / Bachelor's degree Knowledge of fire safety and accessibility of buildings. Excel, GMAO, Ticketing. Core Competencies : Adherence to the company - Compliance with regulations and internal guidelines
descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Um die Wartung und Sicherheit der Räumlichkeiten zu gewährleisten und gleichzeitig das Wohlbefinden ihrer Insassen zu gewährleisten. Fähigkeit, effektive und pragmatische Lösungen zu finden, die den technischen Bedürfnissen der Nutzer gerecht werden Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Beantworten Sie den Anforderungen der Mitarbeiter zu Fragen im Zusammenhang mit Räumlichkeiten und Ausrüstung. Führen Sie kleinere Reparaturen und erstklassige Wartungseingriffe durch. Überwachen Sie den allgemeinen Zustand von Gebäuden und melden Sie Anomalien. Koordinierende und unterstützende Anbieter in Interventionen, indem die Einhaltung der Banksicherheitsvorschriften gewährleistet wird. Überprüfen Sie die technischen Installationen visuell und verfolgen Sie die verschiedenen Probleme. Nehmen Sie an der Organisation von Arbeitsräumen teil. Intern bewegen und installieren Möbel. Beteiligen Sie sich an der Verwaltung von Vorräten und Ortsaufträgen, die vom Manager validiert wurden. Überprüfen Sie die ordnungsgemäße Funktion der Sicherheitsausrüstung. Bewerben Sie die Sicherheitshinweise der Bank. Beteiligen Sie sich am technischen Picket. Ihre Profil-Erfahrung erwartet von Facilities Officer in-house oder in einem Service-Unternehmen. Wissen aufbauen. o Elektrizität: Anlagenverifikation und -wiederholung. o Sanitär: Einfache Rohröffnung und sanitäre Wartung. o Schlösser/Menuiserie: Einstellen von Fenstern und Möbeltüren, Wechsel von Schlössern. o Beschichtung: Bodenbelag Ersatz. Vielseitigkeit und Autonomie bei der Erfüllung von Aufgaben. Reaktivität und Fähigkeit, Notfälle zu verwalten. Service Sinn und ausgezeichnete Beziehung. Rigor und Compliance. Hintergrund High School/Maturity / Bachelor-Studie Kenntnisse der Brandsicherheit und Zugänglichkeit von Gebäuden. Excel, GMAO, Ticketing. Kernkompetenzen: Haftung für das Unternehmen - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien

jobs.title: Graduate Programme - Operations office team

titleByLocale.fr: Programme d'études supérieures - équipe du bureau des opérations

jobs.description:
The Bank’s entire operations are managed by COO Division and are headed up by the Chief Operating Officer. It strives to provide both in-house and external clients with a first-rate service to ensure our business operates efficiently and at the best possible cost. The COO division comprises Operations, Finance, Information Management, Human Resources and Logistics. COO employees are committed to providing, with professionalism and enthusiasm, an efficient, proactive, high-quality service that meets the needs of clients within the context of the Bank’s overall strategy. 
 
• Mission : 

• Permanent contract and training programme of 12 months, based on a rotation through various departments of the COO team 

• The purpose is to acquire targeted professional skills as well as practical experience 

• You will learn to manage projects, build stakeholder relationships, and conduct change management 

• You will be supported by a mentor, and a “buddy” during the entire programme 

• This programme is dedicated to young graduates, with a Master’s degree and a maximum of 12 months’ global professional experience, seeking to discover the Banking industry 

• It includes the prospect of obtaining a permanent role within UBP Operations Team 
 

• Main responsibilities : 
 1. Operations – Monitoring and Reconciliations 
 
• Understand the role of the Operations department, and the roles of the different teams within Operations 

• Understand Operations processes and propose process improvements where applicable 

• Participate in coordination tasks of transversal topics / projects within Operations department 

• Help to realise reportings and collect inputs from other teams on regular reportings 

• Understand and support Reconciliation’s activity and investigations 
 

 2. Banking Operations 
 
• Join an Operations team 

• Understand the role of the Operations department, and the roles of the different teams within Operations 

• Understand Operations processes and propose process improvements where applicable 

• Support the processes of the teams in line with internal procedures and policies 

• Support the cash services and securities services by discovering transfers, treasury operations, stock exchange and settlement activities. 

 
 3. Risk management department 
 
• Join the risk management team 

• Understand the different roles within the risk team 

• Understand Operational risk going through incident management, RCSA… 

• Support risk processes 

 
 
• Your Profile : 

• Master’s degree in finance or Information Technology obtained recently at a highly recognised university 

• Maximum 12 months’ professional experience 

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, ability to partner with other teams 

• Fluent in French and English; any other language would be a plus 

• Excellent knowledge of the Microsoft Office suite especially Excel, programming skills is a plus 

• Strong critical thinking, analytical and problem-solving skills 

• Team player 

 
 
• Others : 
• Swiss Residence
 
 
 Applications : 
 Applications must be made through our careers website and must include a CV and a cover letter. 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

Si sforza di fornire sia clienti interni che esterni con un servizio di prima classe per garantire il nostro business funziona in modo efficiente e al miglior costo possibile. La divisione COO comprende operazioni, finanza, gestione dell'informazione, risorse umane e logistica. I dipendenti di COO si impegnano a fornire, con professionalità ed entusiasmo, un servizio efficiente, proattivo, di alta qualità che soddisfi le esigenze dei clienti nel contesto della strategia globale della Banca. Missione: Programma di contratto e di formazione permanente di 12 mesi, basato su una rotazione attraverso vari dipartimenti del team COO Lo scopo è quello di acquisire competenze professionali mirate e l'esperienza pratica Imparerai a gestire progetti, costruire relazioni con gli stakeholder e condurre la gestione dei cambiamenti Sarete sostenuti da un mentore, e un “buddy” durante l’intero programma Questo programma è dedicato ai giovani laureati, con un Master e un massimo di 12 mesi di esperienza professionale globale, cercando di scoprire il settore bancario Comprende la prospettiva di ottenere un ruolo permanente all’interno del Team Operazioni UBP Principali responsabilità: 1. descriptionByLocale.de: Die gesamten Geschäfte der Bank werden von der Division COO verwaltet und vom Chief Operating Officer geleitet. Es ist bestrebt, sowohl interne als auch externe Kunden mit einem erstklassigen Service zu versorgen, um sicherzustellen, dass unser Unternehmen effizient und zu bestmöglichen Kosten arbeitet. Die Division COO umfasst Operationen, Finanzen, Informationsmanagement, Personal und Logistik. COO-Mitarbeiter sind verpflichtet, mit Professionalität und Begeisterung einen effizienten, proaktiven, hochwertigen Service zu bieten, der den Bedürfnissen der Kunden im Rahmen der Gesamtstrategie der Bank entspricht. Mission : Ständiges Vertrags- und Ausbildungsprogramm von 12 Monaten, basierend auf einer Rotation durch verschiedene Abteilungen des COO-Teams Ziel ist es, gezielte berufliche Fähigkeiten sowie praktische Erfahrungen zu erwerben Sie werden lernen, Projekte zu verwalten, Stakeholder-Beziehungen aufzubauen und Change Management durchzuführen Sie werden von einem Mentor und einem „Buddy“ während des gesamten Programms unterstützt. Dieses Programm ist jungen Absolventen gewidmet, mit einem Master-Abschluss und maximal 12 Monate globale Berufserfahrung, die Suche nach der Banking Industrie Es umfasst die Aussicht auf eine dauerhafte Rolle innerhalb des UBP Operations Teams Hauptverantwortlichkeiten: 1. Operationen – Monitoring und Konsiliamente Verstehen Sie die Rolle der Abteilung Operationen, und die Rollen der verschiedenen Teams innerhalb der Operationen Verstehen Operationen Prozesse und schlagen Prozessverbesserungen vor, soweit zutreffend. Banking Operations Begleiten Sie ein operatives Team Die Rolle der operativen Abteilung und die Rolle der verschiedenen Teams innerhalb der operativen Prozesse verstehen und gegebenenfalls Prozessverbesserungen vorschlagen Unterstützung der Prozesse der Teams im Einklang mit internen Verfahren und Politiken Unterstützung der Cash Services und Wertpapierdienstleistungen durch die Entdeckung von Transfers, Treasury-Operationen, Börsen- und Abwicklungsaktivitäten. 3. Risikomanagement-Abteilung Nehmen Sie dem Risikomanagement-Team die verschiedenen Rollen innerhalb des Risikoteams zu verstehen Operationelles Risiko durch Vorfallmanagement, RCSA... Ihr Profil : Master-Abschluss in der Finanz- oder Informationstechnologie vor kurzem an einer anerkannten Universität erhalten Maximale 12 Monate Berufserfahrung Ausgezeichnete Kommunikation und zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten, die Fähigkeit, mit anderen Teams zusammenzuarbeiten Flöten in Französisch und Englisch; jede andere Sprache wäre ein Plus Ausgezeichnete Kenntnisse der Microsoft Office-Suite vor allem Excel, Programmierkenntnisse sind ein Plus starkes kritisches Denken, analytisches und Problem-Lösungsfähigkeit Teamplayer Andere: Swiss Residence Applications durch Kernkompetenzen: Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'ensemble des opérations de la Banque est géré par la Division des opérations de maintien de la paix et dirigé par le chef de l'exploitation. Il s'efforce de fournir aux clients internes et externes un service de premier ordre pour assurer le fonctionnement efficace de notre entreprise au meilleur coût possible. La division du COO comprend les opérations, les finances, la gestion de l'information, les ressources humaines et la logistique. Les employés du COO s'engagent à fournir, avec professionnalisme et enthousiasme, un service efficace, proactif et de haute qualité qui répond aux besoins des clients dans le contexte de la stratégie globale de la Banque. Mission : Contrat permanent et programme de formation de 12 mois, basé sur une rotation par l'intermédiaire de différents départements de l'équipe COO. Vous apprendrez à gérer des projets, à établir des relations avec les intervenants et à gérer le changement. Vous serez soutenu par un mentor, et un "buddy" pendant tout le programme Ce programme est dédié aux jeunes diplômés, avec un Master et un maximum de 12 mois d'expérience professionnelle mondiale, cherchant à découvrir le secteur bancaire Il comprend la perspective d'obtenir un rôle permanent au sein de l'équipe des opérations de l'UBP Principales responsabilités : 1. Opérations – Surveillance et rapprochements Comprendre le rôle du département des opérations, et les rôles des différentes équipes au sein des opérations Comprendre les processus des opérations et proposer des améliorations de processus, le cas échéant Participer aux tâches de coordination des sujets transversaux / projets au sein du département des opérations Aider à réaliser les rapports et recueillir les commentaires d'autres équipes sur les rapports réguliers Comprendre et appuyer les activités et les enquêtes de réconciliation 2. Opérations bancaires Rejoindre une équipe des opérations Comprendre le rôle du service des opérations, et les rôles des différentes équipes au sein des opérations Comprendre les processus des opérations et proposer des améliorations de processus, le cas échéant Appuyer les processus des équipes conformément aux procédures et politiques internes Appuyer les services de trésorerie et les services de valeurs mobilières en découvrant les transferts, les opérations de trésorerie, la bourse et les activités de règlement. 3. Département de gestion des risques Rejoindre l'équipe de gestion des risques Comprendre les différents rôles au sein de l'équipe de risque Comprendre le risque opérationnel en passant par la gestion des incidents, RCSA... Supporter les processus de risque Votre profil : Master en finance ou en technologie de l'information obtenu récemment dans une université hautement reconnue Maximum 12 mois d'expérience professionnelle Excellente communication et aptitudes interpersonnelles, capacité de partenariat avec d'autres équipes Fluent en français et en anglais ; toute autre langue serait un plus Excellente connaissance de la suite Microsoft Office en particulier Excel, compétences en programmation est un plus Forte pensée critique, capacités d'analyse et de résolution de problèmes Joueur d'équipe Autres : Résidence suisse Applications : Les candidatures doivent être faites sur notre site web de carrière et doivent comprendre un CV et une lettre de motivation. Compétences de base : Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.title: Graduate Programme – Group Risk Management team

titleByLocale.it: Programma di laurea – Gruppo Risk Management team
titleByLocale.en: Graduate Programme – Group Risk Management team
titleByLocale.fr: Graduate Programme – Group Risk Management team

jobs.description:
The Group’s risk management activities are overseen by Group Risk Management, led by the Group Head of Risk Management (Chief Risk Officer / CRO). In Switzerland, Group Risk Management teams are responsible for overseeing the Bank’s activities, while ensuring local alignment with Group standards at an international level. They coordinate methodologies, implement transversal risk management initiatives and lead key local projects in close collaboration with Group-level risk representatives. The Swiss Risk Management function is structured into specialized teams covering Treasury & Trading, Asset Management, Wealth Management and Operational Risk. In addition a dedicated Project team provides cross-functional support for key initiatives led by the CRO or team heads. Acting as a second line of defense, the Risk teams serve as trusted advisors to the Business, participate to local committees, perform independent controls and support the definition and implementation of mitigation plans in coordination with risk owners (1st line of defense).
 
 Mission 
As of 1 September 2026, Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is offering a permanent position within its Group Risk Management teams (2nd line of defense) in Geneva, starting with a 12‑month training program that includes regular interactions with other Bank functions and Legal Entity representatives across the Group.
The purpose is to acquire targeted professional skills as well as practical experience with a strong orientation on risk management and secondly on project management.
 
• Rotations: The program includes four, three-month rotations across different teams.
 

• Main responsibilities 
 
 
 During the program, under the supervision of the team managers in their role of mentor, the Graduate is expected to provide support on all teams’ activities as well as assist them in their daily tasks, with in particular:

 
 
• Gain hands-on experience in the oversight of control framework and risk assessments across Wealth Management activities

• Build a strong foundation in risk management framework and contribute to the continuous enhancement of risk and control methodologies

• Perform control activities and deliver clear and insightful analysis to internal stakeholders

• Get involved in projects and support their implementation

• Contribute to thematic reviews and identify value-added improvement opportunities

• Contribute to the improvement of risk management reporting to Senior Management and communication methods with the 1 LoD (the Business) through innovative, technology-driven enhancements.
 
 During the program, you will also have the possibility to start a certification related to Banking sector and/or your function, for examples the CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) or CIA (Certified Internal Auditor), further enhancing your professional development.
 Your Profile 
 Background 
 
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in finance, business management recently obtained from a highly recognised university or equivalent.

• Maximum 12-months’ professional experience.
 Knowledges 

• Good understanding of banking / financial sector, interest for Private Banking model and challenge / regulations.

• Knowledge of risk management and/or control activities an expectation. 

• Experience in project management a plus.

• Strong analytical skills, strong presentation skills.
 Technical Skills 

• Excellent knowledge of the Microsoft Office tools especially Excel, PowerPoint.

• Knowledge in Power BI a plus.

• Fluent in English and French (minimum C1 in both).
 Specific Competencies 

• High motivation, attention to details, excellent organization skills and strong attention to deadline 

• Discretion as a need-to-have

• Multi-tasking and solutions oriented

• Very strong team spirit and capable to work independently

• Candidate must hold a valid work permit or be eligible to work in the locations 

• Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives. 
 
 Applications 
 
• Applications must include a CV, diploma(s) and a cover letter.

descriptionByLocale.it: Le attività di gestione dei rischi con il Gruppo sono supervisionate da Group Risk Management, guidato dal Group Head of Risk Management (“CRO”). I team di gestione del rischio situati in Svizzera sono incaricati di supervisionare le attività bancarie in Svizzera e di coordinare metodologie, implementare attività di rischio trasversale e progetti chiave con i rappresentanti della gestione del rischio locale a livello di Gruppo. In Svizzera, i team sono composti da Treasury and Trading Team, Asset Management Team, Wealth Management Team e Operational Risk Team, mentre un team di progetto fornisce un supporto trasversale a progetti o iniziative chiave guidate da CRO o Team Heads. In qualità di seconda linea di difesa, tutti i team forniscono consulenza a Business, partecipano ai comitati locali, svolgono controlli, sfida e supportano le valutazioni dei rischi e i loro piani di risposta in coordinamento con i proprietari di rischio. A partire dal 1° settembre 2026, Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) sta offrendo una posizione permanente all'interno dei suoi team di Group Risk Management (2a linea di difesa) a Ginevra, a partire da un programma di formazione di 12 mesi che include interazioni regolari con altre funzioni della Banca e rappresentanti Legal Entity in tutto il Gruppo. Lo scopo è quello di acquisire competenze professionali mirate e l'esperienza pratica con un orientamento forte sulla gestione del rischio e, in secondo luogo, sulla gestione del progetto. Rotazioni Il programma consiste in quattro rotazioni di tre mesi tra i seguenti team: Gruppo Risk Management Project Team Wealth Management Team, 1a linea di difesa Risk Management Team, 2a linea di difesa (Lussemburgo) Bank’s Change Management Team (Progetti Trasversali), parte dei team di COO Gruppo Principali responsabilità Durante il programma, sotto la supervisione dei team manager nel loro ruolo di mentore, il Graduate è previsto per fornire supporto giornaliero su tutte le attività di team Suggerisci rischi e/o metodi di controllo miglioramenti. Eseguire le attività di controllo e il risultato attuale internamente. Partecipa a progetti, in collaborazione con team e Soggetto-Matter-Experts. Partecipare ed eseguire recensioni tematiche e formulare opportunità di miglioramento. Preparare la segnalazione a Senior Management. Durante il programma, avrete anche la possibilità di avviare una certificazione relativa al settore bancario e/o alla vostra funzione, per esempio il CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) o la CIA (Certified Internal Auditor), migliorando ulteriormente il vostro sviluppo professionale. Corso di laurea o master in finanza, gestione aziendale recentemente ottenuto da un'università o equivalente altamente riconosciuta. Esperienza professionale massima di 12 mesi. Buona comprensione del settore bancario / finanziario, interesse per il modello Private Banking e la sfida / regolamenti. Conoscenza delle attività di gestione del rischio e/o controllo un'aspettativa. Esperienza nella gestione del progetto un plus. Forte capacità analitiche, forti capacità di presentazione. Conoscenza eccellente degli strumenti Microsoft Office in particolare Excel, PowerPoint. Conoscenza nel potere BI un plus. Fluente in inglese e francese (minimo C1 in entrambi). Competenze specifiche Alta motivazione, attenzione ai dettagli, eccellenti capacità organizzative e forte attenzione alla scadenza Discrezione come un bisogno per avere Multi-tasking e soluzioni orientate Molto forte spirito di squadra e in grado di lavorare indipendentemente Il candidato deve tenere un valido permesso di lavoro o essere idoneo a lavorare nelle sedi Competenze fondamentali: Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility e Responsabilità - Compliance con regolamenti e direttive interne. Le domande devono includere un CV, un diploma o una lettera di presentazione.
descriptionByLocale.en: The Group’s risk management activities are overseen by Group Risk Management, led by the Group Head of Risk Management (Chief Risk Officer / CRO). In Switzerland, Group Risk Management teams are responsible for overseeing the Bank’s activities, while ensuring local alignment with Group standards at an international level. They coordinate methodologies, implement transversal risk management initiatives and lead key local projects in close collaboration with Group-level risk representatives. The Swiss Risk Management function is structured into specialized teams covering Treasury & Trading, Asset Management, Wealth Management and Operational Risk. In addition a dedicated Project team provides cross-functional support for key initiatives led by the CRO or team heads. Acting as a second line of defense, the Risk teams serve as trusted advisors to the Business, participate to local committees, perform independent controls and support the definition and implementation of mitigation plans in coordination with risk owners (1st line of defense). Mission As of 1 September 2026, Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is offering a permanent position within its Group Risk Management teams (2nd line of defense) in Geneva, starting with a 12‑month training program that includes regular interactions with other Bank functions and Legal Entity representatives across the Group. The purpose is to acquire targeted professional skills as well as practical experience with a strong orientation on risk management and secondly on project management. • Rotations: The program includes four, three-month rotations across different teams. • Main responsibilities During the program, under the supervision of the team managers in their role of mentor, the Graduate is expected to provide support on all teams’ activities as well as assist them in their daily tasks, with in particular: • Gain hands-on experience in the oversight of control framework and risk assessments across Wealth Management activities • Build a strong foundation in risk management framework and contribute to the continuous enhancement of risk and control methodologies • Perform control activities and deliver clear and insightful analysis to internal stakeholders • Get involved in projects and support their implementation • Contribute to thematic reviews and identify value-added improvement opportunities • Contribute to the improvement of risk management reporting to Senior Management and communication methods with the 1 LoD (the Business) through innovative, technology-driven enhancements. During the program, you will also have the possibility to start a certification related to Banking sector and/or your function, for examples the CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) or CIA (Certified Internal Auditor), further enhancing your professional development. Your Profile Background • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in finance, business management recently obtained from a highly recognised university or equivalent. • Maximum 12-months’ professional experience. Knowledges • Good understanding of banking / financial sector, interest for Private Banking model and challenge / regulations. • Knowledge of risk management and/or control activities an expectation. • Experience in project management a plus. • Strong analytical skills, strong presentation skills. Technical Skills • Excellent knowledge of the Microsoft Office tools especially Excel, PowerPoint. • Knowledge in Power BI a plus. • Fluent in English and French (minimum C1 in both). Specific Competencies • High motivation, attention to details, excellent organization skills and strong attention to deadline • Discretion as a need-to-have • Multi-tasking and solutions oriented • Very strong team spirit and capable to work independently • Candidate must hold a valid work permit or be eligible to work in the locations • Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives. Applications • Applications must include a CV, diploma(s) and a cover letter.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Risikomanagement-Aktivitäten mit der Gruppe werden von Group Risk Management überwacht, geleitet von der Konzernleitung Risikomanagement („CRO“). Risikomanagement-Teams in der Schweiz sind dafür verantwortlich, die Aktivitäten der Bank in der Schweiz zu überwachen und Methoden zu koordinieren, transversale Risikoaktivitäten und Schlüsselprojekte mit lokalen Risikomanagement-Repräsentanten auf Konzernebene einzusetzen. In der Schweiz werden die Teams von Treasury and Trading Team, Asset Management Team, Wealth Management Team und Operational Risk Team komponiert, während ein Projektteam eine transversale Unterstützung für wichtige Projekte oder Initiativen von CRO oder Team Heads bietet. Als 2. Verteidigungslinie beraten Teams alle Unternehmen, beteiligen sich an lokalen Komitees, führen Kontrollen, Herausforderungen und unterstützen Risikobewertungen und ihre Reaktionspläne in Abstimmung mit Risikoinhabern. Mission Ab dem 1. September 2026 bietet Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) in Genf eine dauerhafte Position innerhalb seiner Teams des Konzerns Risk Management (2. Verteidigungslinie) an, beginnend mit einem 12-Monats-Trainingsprogramm, das regelmäßige Interaktionen mit anderen Bankfunktionen und Legal Entity-Vertretern im gesamten Konzern umfasst. Ziel ist es, gezielte berufliche Fähigkeiten sowie praktische Erfahrungen mit einer starken Ausrichtung auf das Risikomanagement und zweitens auf das Projektmanagement zu erwerben. Drehung Das Programm besteht aus vier drei Monaten Rotationen in den folgenden Teams: Group Risk Management Project Team Wealth Management Team, 1. Zeile des Verteidigungsrisikomanagement Teams, 2. Zeile der Verteidigung (Luxembourg) Bank Change Management Team (Transversal Projects), Teil der Gruppe COO Teams Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Während des Programms, unter der Aufsicht der Teammanager in ihrer Rolle des Mentors, wird der Graduate erwartet, dass sie Unterstützung für alle Teams Aktivitäten bieten. Risiko- und/oder Kontrollmethoden verbessern. Durchführung von Kontrolltätigkeiten und gegenwärtigen Ergebnissen intern. Erwarten Sie Projekte, in Zusammenarbeit mit Teams und Fachexperten. Erwarten und führen thematische Rezensionen und formulieren Verbesserungsmöglichkeiten. Melden Sie sich an Senior Management. Während des Programms haben Sie auch die Möglichkeit, eine Zertifizierung im Zusammenhang mit Banking Sektor und/oder Ihre Funktion zu starten, für Beispiele die CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) oder CIA (Certified Intern Auditor), die Ihre berufliche Entwicklung weiter zu verbessern. Ihr Profil Hintergrund Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss in Finanzen, Business-Management vor kurzem von einer anerkannten Universität oder gleichwertig. Maximale 12-monatige Berufserfahrung. Wissen Gutes Verständnis des Bank- / Finanzsektors, Interesse für Private Banking Modell und Herausforderung / Verordnungen. Kenntnisse des Risikomanagements und/oder der Steuerungsaktivitäten eine Erwartung. Erfahrung im Projektmanagement ein Plus. Starke analytische Fähigkeiten, starke Präsentationsfähigkeiten. Technische Fähigkeiten Ausgezeichnete Kenntnisse der Microsoft Office-Tools vor allem Excel, PowerPoint. Wissen in Power BI ein Plus. Fluent in Englisch und Französisch (mindestens C1 in beiden). Spezifische Kompetenzen Hohe Motivation, Aufmerksamkeit auf Details, ausgezeichnete organisatorische Fähigkeiten und starke Aufmerksamkeit auf die Frist Diskretion als bedarfsgerechte Multi-tasking und Lösungen orientiert Sehr starker Teamgeist und fähig, selbständig zu arbeiten Candidate muss eine gültige Arbeitserlaubnis halten oder in der Lage sein Kernkompetenzen zu arbeiten : Adherence to the company’s Values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with Regulations and intern Directives. Bewerbungen Bewerbungen müssen einen Lebenslauf, Diplome und einen Brief umfassen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Les activités de gestion des risques avec le Groupe sont supervisées par la Gestion des risques du Groupe, dirigée par le Chef du Groupe de la gestion des risques. Les équipes de gestion des risques situées en Suisse sont chargées de superviser les activités de la Banque en Suisse et de coordonner les méthodes, de déployer des activités de gestion des risques transversales et des projets clés avec les représentants locaux de la gestion des risques au niveau du Groupe. En Suisse, les équipes sont composées de Treasury and Trading Team, Asset Management Team, Wealth Management Team et Operational Risk Team, tandis qu'une équipe de projet fournit un soutien transversal sur des projets ou des initiatives clés menés par CRO ou Team Heads. En tant que deuxième ligne de défense, les équipes fournissent toutes des conseils aux entreprises, participent aux comités locaux, effectuent des contrôles, contestent et appuient les évaluations des risques et leurs plans d'intervention en coordination avec les propriétaires de risques. Mission À compter du 1er septembre 2026, l'Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) offre un poste permanent au sein de ses équipes de gestion des risques du Groupe (2e ligne de défense) à Genève, en commençant par un programme de formation de 12 mois comprenant des interactions régulières avec d'autres fonctions de la Banque et des représentants des entités juridiques dans l'ensemble du Groupe. L'objectif est d'acquérir des compétences professionnelles ciblées ainsi qu'une expérience pratique avec une forte orientation sur la gestion des risques et ensuite sur la gestion de projets. Rotations Le programme se compose de quatre rotations de trois mois entre les équipes suivantes : Équipe de gestion des risques de groupe Équipe de gestion des richesses, 1ère ligne d'équipe de gestion des risques de défense, 2e ligne de défense (Luxembourg) Équipe de gestion des changements (Projets transversaux), une partie des équipes de COO du groupe Principales responsabilités Au cours du programme, sous la supervision des gestionnaires d'équipe dans leur rôle de mentor, le diplômé est censé fournir un soutien à toutes les équipes et les aider dans leurs tâches quotidiennes, en particulier : Participer aux évaluations des risques et aux exercices d'évaluation du contrôle dans l'ensemble de la Banque / l'emplacement. Proposer des améliorations aux méthodes de contrôle et/ou de risque. Effectuer des activités de contrôle et présenter les résultats en interne. Participer à des projets, en collaboration avec des équipes et des experts-sujets. Participer et réaliser des examens thématiques et formuler des possibilités de renforcement. Préparer les rapports à la haute direction. Pendant le programme, vous aurez également la possibilité de commencer une certification liée au secteur bancaire et/ou à votre fonction, par exemple la FCA (Analyste financier Chartered) ou la CIA (Auditeur interne certifié), en améliorant votre perfectionnement professionnel. Votre profil Contexte Baccalauréat ou maîtrise en finance, gestion d'entreprise récemment obtenu d'une université hautement reconnue ou équivalent. Maximum 12 mois d'expérience professionnelle. Connaissances Bonne compréhension du secteur bancaire et financier, intérêt pour le modèle de la banque privée et défi / règlement. Connaissance des activités de gestion du risque et/ou de contrôle d'une attente. Expérience en gestion de projet a plus. De solides compétences analytiques, de solides compétences en présentation. Compétences techniques Excellente connaissance des outils Microsoft Office en particulier Excel, PowerPoint. Connaissance de la puissance BI a plus. Fluent en anglais et en français (minimum C1 dans les deux). Compétences spécifiques Motivation élevée, attention aux détails, excellentes compétences organisationnelles et forte attention à la date limite Discrétion en tant que nécessité de disposer de solutions multitâches et orientées Très fort esprit d'équipe et capable de travailler de façon indépendante Le candidat doit détenir un permis de travail valide ou être admissible à travailler sur les lieux Compétences de base : Adhérence à l'entreprise Valeurs : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Conformité aux règlements et directives internes. Demandes Les demandes doivent comprendre un CV, un diplôme et une lettre de motivation.

jobs.title: Stock exchange / Settlement Officer
jobs.description:
TEMPORARY MISSION - 9 MONTHS 
 
 Mission : 
 
• 

• Settlement of equities, bonds, structured products​ and investment funds transactions. 
 
 

• Main duties : 

• Monitoring of pending transactions. 

• Control and monitoring positions. 

• Contact with traders, custodians and counterparties. 

• Respect the process and its implementation in relation to operational requirements and volumes as directed by the bank. 
 
 

• Core competencies : 
 
 • Think in "Problem-Action-Results" terms 
 • Show strong client service ethic 
 • Be proactive and driven 
 • Express opinions and criticism in a constructive way 
 • Be a continuous learner 
 • Adopt change with a positive attitude 
 • Consistently comply with internal & external regulations 
 • Go beyond specific assignments, walk the extra mile 
 • Seek opportunities to improve the existing 
 • Be open to other's idea's 
 • Balance personal and team interests 
 • Seek opportunities to improve quality in all features of the work environment 
 • Maintain quality standards despite schedule pressures 

 
 
• Specific Competencies : 

• The complete flow of a transaction 

• The parties involved on the market (counterparties, custodians, clearing, companies) 

• Financial instruments (equities, bonds, structured products, investment funds) 

• Good management priorities and ability to deal with sensitive situations 

 
 
• Other Skills/Abilities : 

• CFC bank or equivalent 

• Ability to work within a team 

• French/English 

• MS Office / banking software / Swift 

• Knowledge of Omgeo and Euclid is a plus 

 
 
• Others : 
 
• Swiss Residence 
 

• Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

titleByLocale.en: Institutional Client Service Officer (M/F) - 12 Months Temporary Contract
titleByLocale.de: Institutional Client Service Officer (M/F) - 12 Months Temporary Contract
titleByLocale.fr: Institutional Client Service Officer (M/F) - 12 Months Temporary Contract

jobs.description:
Mission 
 Through the Asset Management division, we offer to institutional clients’ investment management capabilities organised across the business lines Long-Only Platform, Alternative Investment Solutions, Private Markets Group, Partnerships, Asset Allocation & DPM. 
 The Institutional Client Service Team serves as the primary contact for large and complex institutional clients globally, supporting sales teams in engaging institutional and wholesale clients. The team plays a vital role in enhancing profitability and driving growth within the Asset Management business. 
 We are seeking a dynamic candidate with a strong interest in Asset Management to join the Institutional Client Service team in Frankfurt . This role involves close collaboration with the German sales team, reporting locally to the Head of Wholesale EMEA and centrally to the COO - Institutional Clients & Head of the Client Service Team. The position covers activities with both institutional and wholesale clients in the DACH region (Germany, German-speaking Switzerland, and Austria) This position is for 12 months, but it may be renewed or offer other opportunities. 
 
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Assist Asset Management Sales teams in supporting German-speaking client-base. 

• Manage, execute, and follow up on client requests and inquiries. 

• Collaborate with internal teams throughout the client lifecycle to ensure client satisfaction and retention. 

• Coordinate the onboarding process and oversee the end-to-end transition. 

• Involve in the implementation and monitoring of the local sales strategy. 

• Support the team in their prospecting initiatives, including the preparation of marketing materials and conducting market research. 

• Contribute to the optimization of processes through the application of AI technologies. 

• Act as the local CRM champion, supporting and training the sales team to meet Salesforce requirements and ensure data accuracy. 

• Organise local events and roadshows. 

• Perform office management tasks. 

 
 Your Profile 
 
• Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Marketing, or a related field is beneficial. 

• Excellent organizational skills and capability to work independently. 

• Accuracy and attention to detail. 

• Advanced skills in standard IT applications (MS Office). 

• Mother tongue German and fluency in English is a “MUST”; French is a “nice to have”. 

 
 Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is a family-owned company, driven by an entrepreneurial vision, innovation and independence. UBP is one of the most strongly-capitalised private banks. 
 By joining UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A. you will embrace a team of supportive high qualified professionals in Private Banking that will lead you to develop your career to the top level. We encourage continuous learning, development and knowledge sharing. We foster a culture of Agility, Conviction, Dedication and high degree of Responsibility. 
 UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A encourages all suitable qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity or expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity. 
 In accordance with the provisions of the Luxembourg law of 23 July 2016 amending the law of 29 March 2013, retained candidate will be required to provide an extract from their criminal record as a part of UBP screening process.

The team plays a vital role in enhancing profitability and driving growth within the Asset Management business. This role involves close collaboration with the German sales team, reporting locally to the Head of Wholesale EMEA and centrally to the COO - Institutional Clients & Head of the Client Service Team. The position covers activities with both institutional and wholesale clients in the DACH region (Germany, German-speaking Switzerland, and Austria) This position is for 12 months, but it may be renewed or offer other opportunities. Main responsibilities • Assist Asset Management Sales teams in supporting German-speaking client-base. • Manage, execute, and follow up on client requests and inquiries. • Collaborate with internal teams throughout the client lifecycle to ensure client satisfaction and retention. • Coordinate the onboarding process and oversee the end-to-end transition. • Involve in the implementation and monitoring of the local sales strategy. • Support the team in their prospecting initiatives, including the preparation of marketing materials and conducting market research. • Contribute to the optimization of processes through the application of AI technologies. • Act as the local CRM champion, supporting and training the sales team to meet Salesforce requirements and ensure data accuracy. • Organise local events and roadshows. • Perform office management tasks. Your Profile • Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Marketing, or a related field is beneficial. • Excellent organizational skills and capability to work independently. • Accuracy and attention to detail. • Advanced skills in standard IT applications (MS Office). • Mother tongue German and fluency in English is a “MUST”; French is a “nice to have”. Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is a family-owned company, driven by an entrepreneurial vision, innovation and independence. UBP is one of the most strongly-capitalised private banks. By joining UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A. you will embrace a team of supportive high qualified professionals in Private Banking that will lead you to develop your career to the top level. We encourage continuous learning, development and knowledge sharing. We foster a culture of Agility, Conviction, Dedication and high degree of Responsibility. UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A encourages all suitable qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity or expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity. In accordance with the provisions of the Luxembourg law of 23 July 2016 amending the law of 29 March 2013, retained candidate will be required to provide an extract from their criminal record as a part of UBP screening process.
