jobs.title: Client Documentation Specialist

titleByLocale.fr: Spécialiste de la documentation auprès des clients

jobs.description:
• Mission 
 
 As part of the Client Documentation team, the Client Documentation Specialist is a key element to ensure:
 
• A smooth documents process flow between the different departments of the bank, especially regarding change in circumstances 

• The quality, coherence and the accuracy of the client's data in the bank's systems 

• The relevance of clients' instructions by performing control signature

• An efficient support to the other departments of the bank and the branches
 

• Main responsibilities 
 
 Day to day business 
 
 
• Review the documentation received from the clients for certain change in circumstances on an existing account or an account closing and verify that it complies with the local and international regulations (e.g. CDB20, Common Reporting Standards (CRS) and FATCA/QI rules) and the Bank's directives and procedures from (i) a formal point of view (e.g. the correct version of the document is signed, all the required fields have been completed) and (ii) that the information is consistent across the documents provided by the clients (IDs, corporate documents, bank's forms, etc…)

• Verify that the information entered in the Bank's systems by the Wealth Management is complete according to the documentation signed

• Perform 4 eyes controls and regular internal controls to ensure respect of the procedures 

• Ensure a good quality of service by providing accurate feedback to the Wealth Management on any error, missing document and answering in a timely manner to any query related to his/her mission and duties
 
 Coordination and central point of contact 
 
• Build a bridge and create synergy within the Client Documentation team and other key players (Legal, Compliance, IT…), create/maintain an efficient flow of communication that ensures all remain aware of important information and that it is consistent

• Act as a business partner by bringing his/her expertise and the relevant support and input to the other departments of the bank (Wealth Management, Compliance, Legal…) when required (on a complex situation, on the implementation of new regulations or bank's decisions, new projects)

• Coordinate efforts to help a smooth flow in the processes and always seek for improvements

• Facilitate problem solving and collaboration

• Create an environment oriented to trust, open communication and cohesive team effort
 
 Projects and Change management 
 
• Be up to date on any changes in the regulations, perform the assessment for internal changes, communicate with the relevant departments involved and to the team, implement them or launch projects, requests to IT as needed

• Participate in any project impacting the team, either required by a new regulation or initiated by the Bank, hence participate to workshops, meetings, upon the management delegation (for defining the business requirements, performing the testings, and any other required tasks)

• Involve the other team members as required

• Participate in the change management within the team by communicating proactively on the various projects and accompany the team in the change 

• Make sure that the procedures and processes are updated accordingly and communicated to all stakeholders, including the Client Documentation teams within the different branches.
 
 
 
• Your Profile 
 

• Education: Bachelors Degree

• Experience Technical skills: At ease with Microsoft tools, especially Excel

• Languages: English is a requirement, German/Italian or other language is a plus 

• Personal skills : Client service oriented, Curiosity and good interpersonal skills

• Swiss Residence mandatory 
 
 Core Competencies : 
 
• Open mind and team orientation: Be open to other's ideas. / Balance personal & team interests. / Express opinion and criticism in a constructive way.

• Innovation and development: Seek opportunities to improve the existing. / Be a continuous learner. / Adopt change with a positive attitude.

• Professional business culture: Think in 'Problem-Action-Results' terms. / Walk the extra mile. / Be proactive and driven. / Show strong client service ethic. / Build lasting client relationships.

• Quality, internal & external regulations: Consistently comply with internal & external regulations. / Seek opportunities to improve quality in all features of the work environment.

• Analytical Ability : Ability to assimilate procedures and to implement them. / Ability to identify issues and raise them in a structured way. / Ability to make process improvements. / Attention to detail.

• Solid organization and time management skills: Ability to organize the tasks efficiently based on priorities with anticipation of events. / Reaction and decision-making ability in face of unforeseen circumstances.

• Communication: Ability to raise issues via the right channel and in a constructive way. / Ability to expose constraints and opportunities. / Express opinions and criticism in a constructive way.

• Adaptability: Ability to change, be flexible. / Maintain quality standards despite schedule pressures.

• Team Spirit : Ability to proactively help the others. / Ability to finalize the common goal.

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Nell'ambito del team di documentazione del cliente, il Client Documentation Specialist è un elemento chiave per garantire: un flusso di documenti fluidi tra i diversi dipartimenti della banca, soprattutto per quanto riguarda il cambiamento nelle circostanze Qualità, coerenza e accuratezza dei dati del cliente nei sistemi bancari La pertinenza delle istruzioni dei clienti eseguendo la firma di controllo Un supporto efficiente agli altri dipartimenti della banca e delle filiali Principali responsabilità Da giorno a giorno di affari Verificare la documentazione ricevuta dai clienti per determinati cambiamenti in circostanze su un conto esistente o una chiusura del conto e verificare che sia conforme alle normative locali e internazionali (ad esempio CDB20, Common Reporting Standards (CRS) e FATCA/QI) e le direttive e le procedure della Banca da (i) un punto di vista formale (es. Verificare che le informazioni inserite nei sistemi della Banca da parte della Wealth Management siano complete secondo la documentazione firmata Perform 4 controlli degli occhi e controlli interni regolari per garantire il rispetto delle procedure Assicurare una buona qualità del servizio, fornendo un feedback accurato alla Wealth Management su qualsiasi errore, documento mancante e rispondendo in modo tempestivo a qualsiasi domanda relativa alla sua missione e ai suoi doveri Coordinamento e punto centrale di contatto Coordinare gli sforzi per aiutare un flusso regolare nei processi e cercare sempre miglioramenti Facilitate problem solving e collaborazione Creare un ambiente orientato alla fiducia, alla comunicazione aperta e allo sforzo di squadra coesivo Progetti e gestione dei cambiamenti Sii aggiornato su qualsiasi cambiamento delle normative, eseguire la valutazione per i cambiamenti interni, comunicare con i servizi interessati e per il team, implementarli o lanciare progetti, le richieste a IT come necessario Partecipare a qualsiasi progetto che colpisca il team, Coinvolgere gli altri membri del team come richiesto Partecipare alla gestione dei cambiamenti all'interno del team comunicando in modo proattivo sui vari progetti e accompagnando il team nella modifica Assicurarsi che le procedure e i processi siano aggiornati di conseguenza e comunicati a tutti gli stakeholder, compresi i team di Documentazione clienti all'interno dei diversi rami. Il tuo profilo Istruzione: Bachelors Degree Experience Capacità tecniche: A proprio agio con gli strumenti Microsoft, in particolare Excel Lingue: l'inglese è un requisito, il tedesco/italiano o altra lingua è un plus competenze personali: Servizio clienti orientato, Curiosità e buone abilità interpersonali Swiss Residence obbligatori Competenza core: mentalità aperta e orientamento del team: Sii aperto alle idee altrui. / Equilibrio interessi personali e di squadra. / esprimere l'opinione e la critica in modo costruttivo. Innovazione e sviluppo: cercate opportunità per migliorare l'esistente. / Sii un continuo apprendista. / Adottare il cambiamento con un atteggiamento positivo. Cultura aziendale professionale: Pensa in termini 'Problem-Action-Results'. / Camminare il miglio in più. / Sii proattivo e guidato. / Mostra forte servizio client etico. / Costruire relazioni cliente durature. Qualità, normative interne ed esterne: conforme alle normative interne ed esterne. / Cercate opportunità per migliorare la qualità in tutte le caratteristiche dell'ambiente di lavoro. Potere analitico: Capacità di assimilare le procedure e di attuarle. / Capacità di identificare i problemi e sollevarli in modo strutturato. / Capacità di migliorare il processo. / Attenzione ai dettagli. Solida capacità di organizzazione e gestione del tempo: capacità di organizzare i compiti in modo efficiente basato sulle priorità con l'anticipazione degli eventi. / Reazione e capacità decisionale di fronte a circostanze impreviste. Comunicazione: Capacità di sollevare problemi attraverso il canale giusto e in modo costruttivo. / Capacità di esporre vincoli e opportunità. / esprimere opinioni e critiche in modo costruttivo. Adattabilità: Capacità di cambiare, essere flessibile. / Mantenere standard di qualità nonostante le pressioni di programma. Spirito di squadra: Capacità di aiutare proattivamente gli altri. / Capacità di finalizzare l'obiettivo comune.

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Im Rahmen des Client Documentation Teams ist der Client Documentation Specialist ein Schlüsselelement, um sicherzustellen: Ein reibungsloser Dokumentenablauf zwischen den verschiedenen Abteilungen der Bank, insbesondere in Bezug auf die Veränderung der Umstände Qualität, Kohärenz und Genauigkeit der Daten des Kunden in den Systemen der Bank Die Relevanz der Anweisungen der Kunden durch die Ausführung der Kontrollunterschrift Eine effiziente Unterstützung für die anderen Abteilungen der Bank und der Filialen Hauptverantwortlichen Tag für Tag Geschäft Überprüfen Sie die von den Kunden für bestimmte Änderungen der Umstände auf einem vorhandenen Konto oder ein Konto schließen und überprüfen Sie, dass es den lokalen und internationalen Vorschriften (z.B. CDB20, Common Reporting Standards (CRS) und FATCA/QI-Regeln) und die korrekten Bankrichtlinien und -Verfahren von (i) ein formales Dokument der Ansicht (e. Vergewissern Sie sich, dass die Informationen, die in den Systemen der Bank durch das Wealth Management eingegeben werden, nach der unterzeichneten Dokumentation vollständig sind. Führen Sie 4 Augenkontrollen und regelmäßige interne Kontrollen durch, um die Einhaltung der Verfahren sicherzustellen. Stellen Sie eine gute Qualität des Dienstes sicher, indem Sie dem Wealth Management genaue Rückmeldungen zu jedem Fehler, fehlenden Dokument und Antworten auf jede Anfrage im Zusammenhang mit seiner Mission und seinen Aufgaben erstellen. Koordinierende Anstrengungen, um einen reibungslosen Ablauf in den Prozessen zu unterstützen und immer nach Verbesserungen zu suchen. Nehmen Sie die anderen Teammitglieder wie erforderlich an der Änderungsverwaltung innerhalb des Teams teil, indem Sie proaktiv auf die verschiedenen Projekte kommunizieren und das Team in der Änderung begleiten Stellen Sie sicher, dass die Verfahren und Prozesse entsprechend aktualisiert und an alle Stakeholder, einschließlich der Client-Dokumentationsteams in den verschiedenen Branchen, kommuniziert werden. Ihr Profil Ausbildung: Bachelor-Studiengänge Erfahrung Technische Fähigkeiten: Leicht mit Microsoft-Tools, insbesondere Excel Sprachen: Englisch ist eine Anforderung, Deutsch/Italienisch oder andere Sprache ist ein Plus Persönliche Fähigkeiten: Client-Service orientiert, Kuriosität und gute zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten Swiss Residence obligatorisch Kernkompetenzen: Offener Geist und Teamorientierung: Sei offen für andere Ideen. / Balance persönliche und Teaminteressen. / Express Meinung und Kritik auf konstruktive Weise. Innovation und Entwicklung: Chancen für eine Verbesserung der bestehenden. / Sei ein kontinuierlicher Lernender. / Wechseln mit einer positiven Einstellung. Professional Business Culture: Denken Sie in Begriffen "Problem-Action-Results". / Gehen Sie die extra Meile. / Sei proaktiv und getrieben. / Zeigen Sie starke Kundendienst-Ethik. / Erstellen dauerhafte Kundenbeziehungen. Qualität, interne und externe Vorschriften: Konsequent mit internen und externen Vorschriften. / Sehen Sie Möglichkeiten, die Qualität in allen Funktionen der Arbeitsumgebung zu verbessern. Analytische Fähigkeit: Fähigkeit, Verfahren zu assimilieren und zu implementieren. / Fähigkeit, Probleme zu identifizieren und sie strukturiert zu erhöhen. / Fähigkeit, Prozessverbesserungen zu machen. / Achtung zum Detail. Solide Organisations- und Zeitmanagementfähigkeiten: Fähigkeit, die Aufgaben effizient zu organisieren, basierend auf Prioritäten mit Vorfreude der Ereignisse. / Reaktion und Entscheidungsfähigkeit angesichts unvorhergesehener Umstände. Kommunikation: Fähigkeit, Probleme über den richtigen Kanal und konstruktiv zu lösen. / Fähigkeit, Zwänge und Möglichkeiten auszuschließen. / Meinungen und Kritik konstruktiv ausdrücken. Anpassungsfähigkeit: Fähigkeit zu ändern, flexibel sein. / Qualitätsstandards trotz Zeitplandruck beibehalten. Team Spirit: Fähigkeit, den anderen proaktiv zu helfen. / Fähigkeit, das gemeinsame Ziel zu beenden.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission Dans le cadre de l'équipe de documentation de la clientèle, le spécialiste de la documentation de la clientèle est un élément clé pour s'assurer : qu'un processus de documentation fluide circule entre les différents services de la banque, en particulier en ce qui concerne les changements de circonstances Qualité, cohérence et exactitude des données du client dans les systèmes de la banque La pertinence des instructions des clients en exécutant la signature de contrôle Un soutien efficace aux autres ministères de la banque et des succursales Principales responsabilités Jour après jour Examiner les documents reçus des clients pour certains changements dans les circonstances sur un compte existant ou une fermeture de compte et vérifier qu'ils sont conformes aux règlements locaux et internationaux (p. ex. CDB20, Normes communes de déclaration (CRS) et règles FATCA/QI) ainsi qu'aux directives et procédures de la Banque (i) d'un point de vue officiel (p. ex., la version correcte du document est signée, tous les champs requis ont été remplis) et (ii) que l'information est cohérente entre les documents fournis par les clients (ID, documents corporatifs, formulaires bancaires, etc.) Vérifier que les informations saisies dans les systèmes de la Banque par la Gestion de patrimoine sont complètes conformément à la documentation signée Effectuer des contrôles à quatre yeux et des contrôles internes réguliers pour assurer le respect des procédures Assurer une bonne qualité de service en fournissant une rétroaction exacte à la Gestion de patrimoine sur toute erreur, document manquant et en répondant en temps opportun à toute question liée à sa mission et à ses fonctions Coordination et point de contact central Construire un pont et créer une synergie au sein de l'équipe de documentation client et d'autres acteurs clés (juridique, conformité, TI...), créer/maintenir un flux de communication efficace qui assure que tous restent conscients de l'importance de l'information et qu'il est cohérent en tant que partenaire d'affaires en apportant son expertise ainsi que le soutien et les commentaires pertinents aux autres départements de la Banque (gestion de la masse, conformité, juridique...) lorsque cela est nécessaire (sur une situation complexe, sur la mise en oeuvre de nouveaux règlements ou décisions de la banque, de nouveaux projets) Coordonner les efforts visant à faciliter la fluidité des processus et à toujours chercher des améliorations Faciliter la résolution des problèmes et la collaboration Créer un environnement axé sur la confiance, la communication ouverte et la cohésion de l'effort d'équipe Projets et gestion du changement Soyez à jour sur tout changement apporté aux règlements, effectuez l'évaluation des changements internes, communiquez avec les ministères concernés et avec l'équipe, mettez-les en oeuvre ou lancez des projets, demandes à l'informatique au besoin Participer à tout projet ayant une incidence sur l'équipe, que ce soit en vertu d'un nouveau règlement ou en vertu de la Banque, participer ainsi aux ateliers, réunions, à la délégation de gestion (pour définir les besoins opérationnels, effectuer les essais et toute autre tâche requise) Faire participer les autres membres de l'équipe au besoin Participer à la gestion du changement au sein de l'équipe en communiquant de façon proactive sur les différents projets et en accompagnant l'équipe dans le changement Assurez-vous que les procédures et les processus sont mis à jour en conséquence et communiqués à tous les intervenants, y compris les équipes de documentation client des différentes directions générales. Votre profil Éducation: Baccalauréat Expérience Compétences techniques: A l'aise avec les outils Microsoft, en particulier Excel Langues: L'anglais est une exigence, l'allemand/italien ou une autre langue est un plus Compétences personnelles : Service à la clientèle, Curiosité et bonnes compétences interpersonnelles Swiss Residence obligatoire Compétences de base : Soyez ouvert aux idées des autres. / Équilibrer les intérêts personnels et d'équipe. / Exprimer l'opinion et la critique de manière constructive. Innovation et développement: recherche d'opportunités pour améliorer l'existant / Soyez un apprenant continu. / Adopter le changement avec une attitude positive. Culture professionnelle d'affaires: Pensez en termes 'Problème-Action-Résultats'. / Marcher le mille supplémentaire. / Soyez proactif et animé. / Montrez une forte éthique de service à la clientèle. / Construire des relations client durables. Qualité, réglementation interne et externe : Respect constant des réglementations internes et externes. / Chercher des occasions d'améliorer la qualité de tous les aspects du milieu de travail. Aptitude à l'analyse : Aptitude à assimiler les procédures et à les mettre en œuvre. / Capacité de cerner les problèmes et de les soulever de façon structurée. / Capacité d'améliorer les processus. / Attention aux détails. Compétences solides en matière d'organisation et de gestion du temps : Capacité d'organiser efficacement les tâches en fonction des priorités et de l'anticipation des événements. / Capacité de réaction et de prise de décision face à des circonstances imprévues. Communication : Capacité de soulever des questions par la bonne voie et de manière constructive. / Capacité d'exposer les contraintes et les possibilités. / Exprimer des opinions et des critiques de manière constructive. Capacité d'adaptation : Capacité de changer, être flexible. / Maintenir les normes de qualité malgré les pressions du calendrier. Team Spirit : Capacité à aider les autres de façon proactive. / Capacité de finaliser l'objectif commun.

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Senior Legal Advisor - Management Company (M/F)
jobs.description:
• Mission 
 As a Senior Legal Advisor specialized in investment funds, you will play a central role within UBP Management Company, UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A. You will be involved in a broad range of fund related legal and regulatory matters, including regulatory compliance, fund governance, and structuring of new products. 
 You will work closely with all stakeholders of the Management Company, providing legal expertise to support the company’s strategic and operational activities. You will also collaborate daily with our Product Management team and actively contributing to the structuring, management, and evolution of investment products. This key role will allow you to work on diverse projects and collaborate with multidisciplinary teams in a dynamic and international environment. 
 You will also be in charged of the corporate governance of the _Management Company and its branches. 
 
 
• Your main responsibilities will be: 
 
• Legal Advice : 
• Provide legal advice on the company’s activities, particularly in corporate law, investment fund law, and financial law. 

• Ensure the company’s activities comply with local and European regulations (CSSF, AIFMD, UCITS, etc.). 

• Draft, review, and negotiate contracts, partnership agreements, management mandates, and other legal documents. 
 

• Collaboration with the Product Management Team: 
• Work closely with the Product Management team on the structuring, implementation, and management of investment products. 

• Provide legal support for the development of new products and the update of existing ones. 
 

• Fund Management: 
• Oversee the creation, structuring, and legal management of investment funds (UCITS, AIF, SICAV, FIS, RAIF, etc.). 

• Prepare and update legal documentation for funds (prospectus, articles of association, management regulations, etc.). 

• Manage relationships with regulatory authorities (CSSF) and follow up on regulatory requests. 
 

• Compliance and Regulatory Monitoring : 
• Conduct legal and regulatory monitoring to anticipate legislative changes and their impact on the company’s activities. 

• Collaborate with the compliance team to ensure adherence to legal and regulatory obligations. 
 

• Litigation Management : 
• Handle potential disputes in collaboration with external law firms. 

• Defend the company’s interests in litigation or judicial proceedings. 
 

• Training and Support: 
• Train and raise awareness among internal teams about regulatory developments and best legal practices. 

• Provide legal support to various departments within the company. 
 
 
 
• Your Profile: 

• Master’s degree in Business Law, Corporate Law, or Financial Law. 

• Specialization in investment fund law or financial law is an asset. 

• 5 to 10 years of experience as a legal counsel in a Management Company, law firm, or financial institution in Luxembourg. 

• Proved experience in managing investment funds (UCITS, AIF, etc.). 

• Excellent knowledge of corporate law, investment fund law, and Luxembourg and European financial regulations (CSSF, AIFMD, UCITS, etc.). 

• Proficiency in the processes of structuring and managing investment funds. 

• Ability to draft and negotiate complex contracts in both French and English. 

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail. 

• Excellent analytical and synthesis skills. 

• Ability to work independently while effectively collaborating with multidisciplinary teams. 

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

• Discretion and respect for confidentiality (knowledge of German or Luxembourgish is an asset). 
 
 Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is a family-owned company, driven by an entrepreneurial vision, innovation and independence. UBP is one of the most strongly-capitalised private banks. 
 By joining UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A. you will embrace a team of supportive high qualified professionals in Private Banking that will lead you to develop your career to the top level. We encourage continuous learning, development and knowledge sharing. We foster a culture of Agility, Conviction, Dedication and high degree of Responsibility. 
 UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A encourages all suitable qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity or expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity. 
 In accordance with the provisions of the Luxembourg law of 23 July 2016 amending the law of 29 March 2013, retained candidate will be required to provide an extract from their criminal record as a part of UBP screening process.

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Graduate Programme Jersey, 2026, Wealth Management

titleByLocale.it: Programma Laureati Jersey, 2026, Gestione del Patrimonio

jobs.description:
Job Description - Please note we do not offer sponsorship
 
This is a unique 12-month programme based on a permanent contract within our Wealth Management Team in Jersey. We are offering an exceptional opportunity for a recent master’s graduate to join our exclusive programme, designed to provide in-depth exposure to Wealth Management at a renowned Private Bank.
The programme offers a comprehensive learning experience, enabling you to gain valuable insights into the finance industry and develop essential skills for a successful career in private banking.
 
The graduate programme consists of 3 rotations each lasting 4 months. These rotations take place in different teams, all closely connected to Wealth Management and Treasury and Trading, providing an excellent opportunity to build a broad internal network of colleagues and experts. Furthermore, you will benefit from shadowing experiences, gaining valuable exposure to various aspects of the bank’s operation.
This programme is specifically designed for young graduates holding a master’s degree, with a maximum of 12 months of professional experience since graduation. You will have the opportunity to transition into a permanent role within the team after completing the programme.
 
Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) – Wealth Management:
Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is one of the largest family-owned private banks in the world. But what makes UBP unique is its corporate culture, which combines modernity and tradition. Although UBP was founded in 1969, its origins can be traced back to the 17th century and the start of a long line of financiers and diplomats of whom Edgar de Picciotto and his descendants are the successors. Today, the Bank's staff draw their inspiration and drive from the founding family's subtle blend of strong moral values and pragmatism, which to this day remain the key to UBP’s success.
 
As it plays such a major part in our strategy, we are investing significantly in Wealth Management to fuel our growth, particularly in Europe, the Middle East, Eastern Europe, Latin America, and Asia. We provide a complete range of private banking products and services, including a variety of investment management and advisory mandates, tailored to our clients’ specific requirements, objectives, and risk profiles. Among UBP professional partners, over 300 independent asset managers have chosen us as their custodian bank, valuing our personalised, flexible services and our transparent fee structure.
 
 Role Description:
 
You will be part of the Wealth Management Team in Jersey:
Relationship with private clients and marketing
With the guidance of relationship managers and experts:

Cultivate relationships with clients

Respond to clients’/prospects’ needs with investments proposals

Ensure that contractual documents and supporting paperwork are signed and up to date

Comply with the Bank’s internal directives, considering the client’s profile and types of transactions
Assisting relationship managers With the guidance of relationship managers and experts:

Follow up on and execute administrative tasks: account paperwork filing, transaction executions, trade executions, transfers, discretionary management and advisory mandate processing, client query responses

Ensure clients’ transactions/instructions/requests (stock market orders, transfers, tax report requests, product information, etc.) are executed and addressed correctly and swiftly

Provide administrative support to the relationship managers by preparing visits and trips, filing client data and documents, and checking that clients’ investments are consistent with their risk profiles
UNION BANCAIRE PRIVÉE, UBP SA | WM GRADUATE PROGRAMME | MARCH26 2 | 3

Carry out first-level checks as per internal directives, where applicable, and escalate transactions or situations putting the Bank at risk, to the line manager
Treasury and Trading
With the guidance of the Treasury and Trading Manager

Forecast near and long-term cash follows across the entity

Maintain buffers and contingency liquidity

Coordinate intercompany funding and optimise notional/physical pooling
Funding and Capital Markets
With the guidance of the Treasury and Trading Manager

Plan and execute short- and long-term funding, i.e. bonds and loans

Maintain bank and investor relationships

Monitor costs of funds and refinance risk, manage maturities
Risk Management
With the guidance of the Treasury and Trading Manager

Identify exposures

Set and enforce risk limits, hedging and effective metrics

Execute hedges via forward, swaps and options

Stress testing, sensitivity analysis and scenario planning
Compliance with regulations and internal directives

Learn to know and strictly apply all internal directives and rules, baking laws and regulations, such as those regarding entering business relations with clients, contacts/relations with clients (existing or prospective), anti-money-laundering, cross-border business, investment policies, investor protection, business travel

Attend the Bank's compulsory training session
Requirements:

Educational Background: Master’s degree in financial economics recently obtained from a highly recognised university

Work Experience: Relevant initial work experience in the finance industry (internships), preferably within Private Banking or Wealth Management

Technical Skills: Strong knowledge of Excel

Language Proficiency: Fluency in English is required

Key Skills: Strong analytical skills, structured approach, excellent communication, and a proactive, adaptable mindset. Ability to collaborate across business and technical teams, with a self-motivated, results-driven attitude

Work Authorisation: Applicants must have the legal right to work in the UK and Jersey at the time of application. We do not offer sponsorship

Jersey residential and employment status
Applications Process: We only accept online applications submitted through our official website, ensure that your application includes the following documents:

CV

Motivation Letter

Grade Transcript & Diplomas

Reference Letters
UNION BANCAIRE PRIVÉE, UBP SA | WM GRADUATE PROGRAMME | MARCH26 3 | 3
Key Dates: ¦ Programme start date: 1st September 2026 ¦ Duration of programme: 12 months (permanent contract) ¦ Interviews Period: March to June 2026

descriptionByLocale.en: Job Description - Please note we do not offer sponsorship This is a unique 12-month programme based on a permanent contract within our Wealth Management Team in Jersey. We are offering an exceptional opportunity for a recent master’s graduate to join our exclusive programme, designed to provide in-depth exposure to Wealth Management at a renowned Private Bank. The programme offers a comprehensive learning experience, enabling you to gain valuable insights into the finance industry and develop essential skills for a successful career in private banking. The graduate programme consists of 3 rotations each lasting 4 months. These rotations take place in different teams, all closely connected to Wealth Management and Treasury and Trading, providing an excellent opportunity to build a broad internal network of colleagues and experts. Furthermore, you will benefit from shadowing experiences, gaining valuable exposure to various aspects of the bank’s operation. This programme is specifically designed for young graduates holding a master’s degree, with a maximum of 12 months of professional experience since graduation. You will have the opportunity to transition into a permanent role within the team after completing the programme. Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) – Wealth Management: Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is one of the largest family-owned private banks in the world. But what makes UBP unique is its corporate culture, which combines modernity and tradition. Although UBP was founded in 1969, its origins can be traced back to the 17th century and the start of a long line of financiers and diplomats of whom Edgar de Picciotto and his descendants are the successors. Today, the Bank's staff draw their inspiration and drive from the founding family's subtle blend of strong moral values and pragmatism, which to this day remain the key to UBP’s success. As it plays such a major part in our strategy, we are investing significantly in Wealth Management to fuel our growth, particularly in Europe, the Middle East, Eastern Europe, Latin America, and Asia. We provide a complete range of private banking products and services, including a variety of investment management and advisory mandates, tailored to our clients’ specific requirements, objectives, and risk profiles. Among UBP professional partners, over 300 independent asset managers have chosen us as their custodian bank, valuing our personalised, flexible services and our transparent fee structure. jobs.title: Accounts Payable Officer
jobs.description:
• Mission 
 The Invoice Officer in Accounts Payable is responsible for the accurate processing of invoices and ensuring timely payments to vendors (approximately 350 invoices per month). 
 This role involves maintaining financial records, resolving discrepancies, and supporting the overall account payable function. 
 The Invoice Officer will also collaborate closely with IT procurement and business IT partners to enhance operational efficiency and ensure alignment with financial practices. 
 
 
• Main responsibilities include but not limited to : 
 
 1. Invoice Processing: 
 - Review and verify invoices for accuracy and completeness. 
 - Enter invoices into the information system (Coupa/Dynamics Navision) and ensure proper coding. 
 - Participate in projects focused on processes transformation 
 
 2. Payment Processing: 
 - Prepare and process payment runs. 
 - Monitor payment schedules and ensure timely payments to vendors. 
 
 3. Vendor Management: 
 - Communicate with vendors regarding invoice status and payment inquiries. 
 - Assist in resolving any disputes or discrepancies. 
 
 4. Record Keeping: 
 - Maintain accurate and organized accounts payable records. 
 - Prepare and manage monthly accruals to ensure accurate financial reporting and compliance with accounting standards. 
 - Provide detailed business allocation of depreciation for projects 
 - Ensure all invoices are filed according to company policy. 
 
 5. Reporting: 
 - Assist in generating accounts payable reports for management review. 
 - Support month-end closing activities related to accounts payable. 
 - Provide detailed report related to mobile communication costs on a quarterly basis. 
 
 6. Compliance: 
 - Ensure compliance with company policies and accounting standards. 
 - Assist in audits by providing necessary documentation and information. 
 
 
• Qualifications: 
 

• Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field preferred. 

• Previous experience in accounts payable or a similar role is mandatory. 

• Previous experience with Coupa and MS Dynamics is preferable 

• Proficient in accounting software and Microsoft Office Suite. 

• Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in data entry and financial reporting. 

• Proficient verbal and written communication skills in both French and English for effective collaboration with vendors and internal teams. 

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team. 
 
 
• Others 
• Swiss Residence 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione L'Invoice Officer in Accounts Payable è responsabile per l'accurata elaborazione delle fatture e per assicurare pagamenti tempestivi ai venditori (circa 350 fatture al mese). Questo ruolo comporta il mantenimento di record finanziari, la risoluzione di discrepanze e il supporto della funzione di pagamento del conto generale. L'Invoice Officer collaborerà anche a stretto contatto con i partner IT e IT aziendali per migliorare l'efficienza operativa e garantire l'allineamento con le pratiche finanziarie. Le principali responsabilità includono, ma non limitate, : 1. Elaborazione delle fatture: - Rivedere e verificare le fatture per accuratezza e completezza. - Inserire le fatture nel sistema informativo (Coupa/Dynamics Navision) e garantire la corretta codifica. - Partecipare a progetti incentrati sulla trasformazione dei processi 2. Elaborazione dei pagamenti: - Preparare e processare i pagamenti. - Monitorare gli orari di pagamento e garantire pagamenti tempestivi ai fornitori. 3. Gestione del Fornitore: - Comunicare con i fornitori per quanto riguarda lo stato della fattura e le richieste di pagamento. - Assistere nella risoluzione di eventuali controversie o discrepanze. 4. Mantenere il record: - Mantenere i conti accurati e organizzati record pagabili. - Preparare e gestire gli adempimenti mensili per garantire un report finanziario accurato e il rispetto degli standard contabili. - Fornire una dettagliata allocazione aziendale di ammortamento per i progetti - Assicurarsi che tutte le fatture siano archiviate secondo la politica aziendale. 5. Reporting: - Assistere nella generazione di conti pagabili report per la revisione di gestione. - Supporta le attività di chiusura di fine mese relative ai conti pagabili. - Fornire report dettagliati relativi ai costi di comunicazione mobile su base trimestrale. 6. Compliance: - Assicurare il rispetto delle politiche aziendali e degli standard contabili. - Assistere in audit fornendo documentazione e informazioni necessarie. Qualifiche: Associate’s o Bachelor’s degree in Contabilità, Finanza, o un campo relativo preferito. L'esperienza precedente nei conti pagabili o un ruolo simile è obbligatoria. Esperienza precedente con Coupa e MS Dynamics è preferibile Proficiente nel software di contabilità e Microsoft Office Suite. Ottima attenzione ai dettagli e accuratezza nell'inserimento dei dati e nel reporting finanziario. Competenti competenze di comunicazione verbale e scritta sia in francese che in inglese per una collaborazione efficace con fornitori e team interni. Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente e come parte di una squadra. Competenze obbligatorie di Swiss Residence: Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità - Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Der Invoice Officer in Accounts Payable ist für die genaue Abwicklung von Rechnungen verantwortlich und gewährleistet rechtzeitige Zahlungen an Verkäufer (etwa 350 Rechnungen pro Monat). Diese Rolle beinhaltet die Aufrechterhaltung von Finanzaufzeichnungen, die Auflösung von Diskrepanzen und die Unterstützung der Gesamtrechnungsfunktion. Der Invoice Officer wird auch eng mit IT-Beschaffungs- und Geschäftspartnern zusammenarbeiten, um die operative Effizienz zu verbessern und eine Ausrichtung auf die Finanzpraxis zu gewährleisten. Zu den wichtigsten Aufgaben gehören unter anderem: Invoice Processing: - Überprüfung und Überprüfung von Rechnungen für Genauigkeit und Vollständigkeit. - Geben Sie Rechnungen in das Informationssystem (Coupa/Dynamics Navision) ein und stellen Sie eine ordnungsgemäße Codierung sicher. - Beteiligen Sie sich an Projekten, die sich auf die Prozesstransformation 2. Payment Processing: - Vorbereitung und Prozesszahlung läuft. - Überwachen Sie die Zahlungspläne und stellen Sie rechtzeitige Zahlungen an Händler. 3. Vendor Management: - Kommunizieren Sie mit Anbietern über Rechnungsstatus und Zahlungsanfragen. - Bei der Lösung von Streitigkeiten oder Diskrepanzen. 4. Record Keeping: - Bewahren Sie genaue und organisierte Konten zu zahlen Aufzeichnungen. - Bereiten und verwalten Sie monatliche Akzente, um eine genaue Finanzberichterstattung und Einhaltung der Rechnungslegungsstandards zu gewährleisten. - Bereitstellung einer detaillierten Geschäftsverteilung der Abschreibungen für Projekte - Stellen Sie sicher, dass alle Rechnungen nach der Unternehmenspolitik eingereicht werden. 5. Berichterstattung: - Besteht bei der Erstellung von fälligen Berichten für die Managementüberprüfung. - Unterstützung der monatlichen Abschlussarbeiten im Zusammenhang mit den zu zahlenden Konten. - Geben Sie einen detaillierten Bericht über mobile Kommunikationskosten auf vierteljährlicher Basis an. 6. Compliance: - Gewährleistung der Einhaltung von Unternehmensrichtlinien und Rechnungslegungsstandards. - Besteht in Audits durch die Bereitstellung von notwendigen Unterlagen und Informationen. Qualifikationen: Associates oder Bachelor-Abschluss in Buchhaltung, Finanzen oder ein verwandten Bereich bevorzugt. Vorherige Erfahrungen in zahlbaren Konten oder einer ähnlichen Rolle sind obligatorisch. Vorherige Erfahrungen mit Coupa und MS Dynamics sind bevorzugt Proficient in der Buchhaltungssoftware und Microsoft Office Suite. Ausgezeichnete Aufmerksamkeit auf Detail und Genauigkeit in der Dateneingabe und Finanzberichterstattung. Professionelle mündliche und schriftliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Französisch und Englisch für eine effektive Zusammenarbeit mit Anbietern und internen Teams. Fähigkeit, unabhängig und als Teil eines Teams zu arbeiten. Sonstige Swiss Residence Kernkompetenzen: Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission L'agent des factures dans les comptes créditeurs est responsable du traitement exact des factures et du respect des délais de paiement aux fournisseurs (environ 350 factures par mois). Ce rôle consiste à tenir des dossiers financiers, à résoudre les écarts et à appuyer la fonction globale des comptes créditeurs. L'agent de facturation collaborera également étroitement avec les fournisseurs de TI et les partenaires informatiques pour améliorer l'efficacité opérationnelle et assurer l'harmonisation avec les pratiques financières. Les principales responsabilités comprennent notamment : 1. Traitement des factures : - Examiner et vérifier les factures pour en vérifier l'exactitude et l'exhaustivité. - Entrer les factures dans le système d'information (Coupa/Dynamics Navision) et veiller à ce que le codage soit correct. - Participer à des projets axés sur la transformation des processus 2. - Surveiller les calendriers de paiement et assurer les paiements en temps opportun aux fournisseurs. 3. Gestion des fournisseurs : - Communiquer avec les fournisseurs au sujet de l'état des factures et des demandes de paiement. - Aider à résoudre les différends ou les divergences. 4. Tenue de registres : - Tenue de registres exacts et organisés des comptes créditeurs. - Préparer et gérer les comptes d'exercice mensuels afin d'assurer l'exactitude des rapports financiers et le respect des normes comptables. - Fournir une répartition détaillée de l'amortissement des projets - S'assurer que toutes les factures sont déposées conformément à la politique de l'entreprise. 5. Rapports : - Aider à produire des rapports sur les comptes créditeurs pour examen par la direction. - Activités de clôture de fin de mois liées aux comptes créditeurs. - Fournir un rapport détaillé trimestriel sur les coûts de communication mobile. 6. Conformité : - Assurer le respect des politiques et des normes comptables de la société. - Aider à la vérification en fournissant la documentation et l'information nécessaires. Qualifications: Associates ou Baccalauréat en comptabilité, finance, ou un domaine connexe préféré. L'expérience antérieure en matière de comptes créditeurs ou d'un rôle similaire est obligatoire. Expérience antérieure avec Coupa et MS Dynamics est préférable Compétence en logiciel de comptabilité et Microsoft Office Suite. Excellente attention aux détails et à l'exactitude de la saisie des données et des rapports financiers. Compétences en communication orale et écrite en français et en anglais pour une collaboration efficace avec les fournisseurs et les équipes internes. Capacité de travailler de façon indépendante et en équipe. Autres Swiss Residence Compétences fondamentales : Adhérence à l'entreprise Valeurs : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.title: Process Transformation Officer

titleByLocale.fr: Spécialiste de la transformation des processus

jobs.description:
Mission: 
 Support the continuous improvement of Financial Crime Compliance (FCC) processes (AML, KYC, Sanctions) by working closely with Compliance, Business, and IT teams. Contribute to aligning Compliance requirements with operational processes and IT tools while enhancing process efficiency and establishing a robust control framework. 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Support the analysis of business needs and contribute to integrating compliance requirements into financial crime prevention processes (AML, KYC, Sanctions). Assist in identifying process improvement opportunities and implementing solutions validated by stakeholders (Compliance, Front Office, IT, etc.). 

• Design and implement streamlined, scalable, and effective processes to enhance operational performance and compliance with regulatory requirements. 

• Participate in the documentation and updating of processes related to compliance, including Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), ensuring alignment with current practices and regulatory requirements. 

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g. Tools & Projects teams, etc.) for the development, maintenance, and testing of compliance applications (IMTF, smartKYC, Pythagoras, etc.). 

• Contribute to change management , particularly by supporting training and communication initiatives for users. 

• Participate in functional testing of implemented solutions, using provided methodologies and tools, and ensuring rigorous follow-up of results. 

• Support the improvement of control frameworks related to compliance tools, including monitoring incidents, analyzing data quality, and collecting user feedback. 

• Assist in monitoring compliance tools , ensuring the proper functioning of data flows, updating parameters, and conducting regular review exercises in collaboration with IT and Tools & Projects teams. 

• Contribute to project management related to AML, KYC, and sanctions by participating in local or group initiatives and engaging in project management methodologies (Agile, Waterfall). 

• Participate in technological watch and identify opportunities to improve compliance tools and processes. 

• Support the follow-up of audit recommendations related to operational compliance processes, ensuring their implementation within the required deadlines. 

 
 Your Profil 
 
• Education and experience: experience in compliance financial crime, risk management, or operational processes is preferred. At least 5 years of experience and experience in a consulting firm (Big 4 ou equivalent) is an asset 

• Analytical skills: Ability to analyze processes, identify ineficciencies, gaps and areas for improvement, and propose appropriate solutions. 

• Communication skills: Proficiency in drafting clear and structured documents, as well as communicating effectively with various stakeholders. 

• Team spirit: Ability to collaborate effectively with multidisciplinary teams (Compliance, Business, IT) and adapt to different interlocutors. 

• Organization and rigor: Ability to manage multiple tasks and projects simultaneously while respecting deadlines and priorities. 

• Technical knowledge: familiarity with compliance technology solutions, data analytics tools, and automation platforms. Experience or interest in data management, reporting, or process modeling tools is a plus. 

• Languages: Proficiency in French and English, both written and spoken. 

• Swiss residence: Mandatory 

 Core competencies 
 
• Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility, and Responsibility. 

• Compliance with regulations and internal directives 

• Curiosity and willingness to learn in a constantly evolving environment. 

 Why Join Our Team? 
 You will join a dynamic and collaborative team where you will have the opportunity to develop your skills in compliance and project management while benefiting from guidance and support to advance your career. You will be involved in strategic and innovative projects at the heart of FCC department. 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione: Sostenere il continuo miglioramento dei processi di Compliance finanziaria (FCC) (AML, KYC, Sanzioni) lavorando a stretto contatto con i team di Compliance, Business e IT. Contribuire ad allineare i requisiti di conformità con i processi operativi e gli strumenti IT, migliorando l'efficienza del processo e stabilendo un quadro di controllo robusto. Sostenere l'analisi delle esigenze aziendali e contribuire ad integrare i requisiti di conformità nei processi di prevenzione della criminalità finanziaria (AML, KYC, Sanzioni). Assistere nell'individuazione delle opportunità di miglioramento del processo e nell'implementazione di soluzioni convalidate dagli stakeholder (Compliance, Front Office, IT, ecc.). Progettare e implementare processi semplificati, scalabili ed efficaci per migliorare le prestazioni operative e il rispetto dei requisiti normativi. Partecipa alla documentazione e all'aggiornamento dei processi relativi alla conformità, comprese le procedure operative standard (SOP), garantendo l'allineamento con le pratiche attuali e i requisiti normativi. Collabora con team interfunzionali (ad esempio team di Tools & Projects, ecc.) per lo sviluppo, la manutenzione e il test delle applicazioni di conformità (IMTF, smartKYC, Pythagoras, ecc.). Contribuire alla gestione dei cambiamenti, in particolare sostenendo iniziative di formazione e comunicazione per gli utenti. Partecipa a test funzionali di soluzioni implementate, utilizzando metodologie e strumenti forniti e garantendo un rigoroso follow-up dei risultati. Supporta il miglioramento dei quadri di controllo relativi agli strumenti di conformità, inclusi gli incidenti di monitoraggio, analizzando la qualità dei dati e raccogliendo feedback degli utenti. Assistere nel monitoraggio degli strumenti di conformità, assicurando il corretto funzionamento dei flussi di dati, aggiornando i parametri e conducendo regolari esercizi di revisione in collaborazione con i team IT e Tools & Projects. Contribuire alla gestione dei progetti relativi a AML, KYC e sanzioni partecipando a iniziative locali o di gruppo e impegnandosi in metodologie di gestione dei progetti (Agile, Cascata). Partecipare all'orologio tecnologico e identificare le opportunità per migliorare gli strumenti e i processi di conformità. Sostenere il follow-up delle raccomandazioni di audit relative ai processi di conformità operativa, garantendo la loro attuazione entro le scadenze richieste. La vostra formazione e l'esperienza Profil: è preferibile l'esperienza nel rispetto della criminalità finanziaria, della gestione del rischio o dei processi operativi. Almeno 5 anni di esperienza e di esperienza in una società di consulenza (Big 4 ou equivalente) è un bene Capacità analitiche: Capacità di analizzare i processi, identificare ineficcie, lacune e aree di miglioramento e proporre soluzioni adeguate. Competenze di comunicazione: competenza nella redazione di documenti chiari e strutturati, oltre a comunicare efficacemente con vari stakeholder. Spirito di squadra: Capacità di collaborare efficacemente con team multidisciplinari (Compliance, Business, IT) e adattarsi a diversi interlocutori. Organizzazione e rigore: Capacità di gestire più compiti e progetti contemporaneamente nel rispetto delle scadenze e delle priorità. Conoscenza tecnica: familiarità con le soluzioni tecnologiche di conformità, strumenti di analisi dei dati e piattaforme di automazione. L'esperienza o l'interesse per la gestione dei dati, il reporting o gli strumenti di modellazione di processo è un plus. Lingue: competenza in francese e inglese, sia scritta che parlata. Residenza svizzera: competenze obbligatorie di base Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità. Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne Curiosità e disponibilità ad imparare in un ambiente in continua evoluzione. Perché entrare nella nostra squadra? Ti unirai a un team dinamico e collaborativo in cui avrai l'opportunità di sviluppare le tue competenze nel rispetto e nella gestione del progetto, approfittando della guida e del supporto per migliorare la tua carriera. Sarete coinvolti in progetti strategici e innovativi nel cuore del dipartimento FCC. Competenze fondamentali: Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità - Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission: Unterstützung der kontinuierlichen Verbesserung der Financial Crime Compliance (FCC) Prozesse (AML, KYC, Sanctions) durch enge Zusammenarbeit mit Compliance-, Business- und IT-Teams. Um Compliance-Anforderungen an operative Prozesse und IT-Tools auszurichten und die Prozesseffizienz zu verbessern und einen robusten Steuerungsrahmen zu schaffen. Verantwortlichkeiten unterstützen die Analyse der Geschäftsanforderungen und tragen dazu bei, die Compliance-Anforderungen in die Prozesse der Prävention von Finanzkriminalität (AML, KYC, Sanctions) zu integrieren. Besteht bei der Identifizierung von Prozessverbesserungsmöglichkeiten und Umsetzung von Lösungen, die von Stakeholdern validiert werden (Compliance, Front Office, IT, etc.). Entwerfen und implementieren Sie optimierte, skalierbare und effektive Prozesse, um die operative Leistungsfähigkeit und die Einhaltung regulatorischer Anforderungen zu verbessern. Beteiligen Sie sich an der Dokumentation und Aktualisierung von Prozessen im Zusammenhang mit Compliance, einschließlich Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), um die Übereinstimmung mit aktuellen Praktiken und regulatorischen Anforderungen zu gewährleisten. Zusammenarbeit mit funktionsübergreifenden Teams (z.B. Tools & Projects Teams, etc.) für die Entwicklung, Wartung und Prüfung von Compliance-Anwendungen (IMTF, smartKYC, Pythagoras, etc.). Beitrag zum Change Management, insbesondere durch Unterstützung von Schulungs- und Kommunikationsinitiativen für Nutzer. Beteiligen Sie sich an der Funktionsprüfung von implementierten Lösungen unter Verwendung von bereitgestellten Methoden und Werkzeugen und gewährleisten eine strenge Folge von Ergebnissen. Unterstützung der Verbesserung von Kontrollrahmen im Zusammenhang mit Compliance-Tools, einschließlich der Überwachung von Vorfällen, der Analyse der Datenqualität und der Erfassung von Nutzer-Feedbacks. Unterstützung bei der Überwachung von Compliance-Tools, die Gewährleistung des ordnungsgemäßen Funktionierens von Datenflüssen, die Aktualisierung von Parametern und die Durchführung regelmäßiger Überprüfungsübungen in Zusammenarbeit mit IT- und Tools & Projects-Teams. Beitrag zum Projektmanagement im Zusammenhang mit AML, KYC und Sanktionen durch Beteiligung an lokalen oder Gruppeninitiativen und Beteiligung an Projektmanagement-Methoden (Agile, Waterfall). Nehmen Sie an technologischer Uhr teil und identifizieren Sie Möglichkeiten zur Verbesserung der Compliance-Tools und -Prozesse. Unterstützung der Nachverfolgung von Auditempfehlungen im Zusammenhang mit operativen Compliance-Prozessen, um ihre Umsetzung innerhalb der erforderlichen Fristen sicherzustellen. Ihr Profil Ausbildung und Erfahrung: Erfahrung in der Einhaltung von Finanzkriminalität, Risikomanagement oder operativen Prozessen wird bevorzugt. Mindestens 5 Jahre Erfahrung und Erfahrung in einem Beratungsunternehmen (Big 4 ou Äquivalent) ist ein Vermögen Analytische Fähigkeiten: Fähigkeit, Prozesse zu analysieren, Ineffizienzen, Lücken und Verbesserungsbereiche zu identifizieren und geeignete Lösungen vorzuschlagen. Kommunikationsfähigkeiten: Effizienz bei der Erstellung klarer und strukturierter Dokumente sowie die effektive Kommunikation mit verschiedenen Akteuren. Teamgeist: Fähigkeit, effektiv mit multidisziplinären Teams (Compliance, Business, IT) zusammenzuarbeiten und sich an verschiedene Gesprächspartner anzupassen. Organisation und Strenge: Fähigkeit, mehrere Aufgaben und Projekte gleichzeitig unter Einhaltung von Fristen und Prioritäten zu verwalten. Technisches Wissen: Vertrautheit mit Compliance-Technologielösungen, Datenanalyse-Tools und Automatisierungsplattformen. Erfahrung oder Interesse an Datenmanagement, Berichterstattung oder Prozessmodellierungstools ist ein Plus. Sprachen: Französisch und Englisch, geschrieben und gesprochen. Schweizer Wohnsitz: Mandatäre Kernkompetenzen Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung. Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien Curiosität und Bereitschaft, in einem sich ständig weiterentwickelnden Umfeld zu lernen. Warum unserem Team beitreten? Sie werden einem dynamischen und kollaborativen Team beitreten, in dem Sie die Möglichkeit haben, Ihre Fähigkeiten im Compliance- und Projektmanagement zu entwickeln, während Sie von der Beratung und Unterstützung profitieren, um Ihre Karriere voranzubringen. Sie werden im Herzen der FCC-Abteilung an strategischen und innovativen Projekten beteiligt sein. Kernkompetenzen: Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission : Appuyer l'amélioration continue des processus de conformité en matière de criminalité financière (AML, KYC, Sanctions) en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de conformité, d'affaires et de TI. Contribuer à l'harmonisation des exigences de conformité avec les processus opérationnels et les outils informatiques tout en améliorant l'efficacité des processus et en établissant un cadre de contrôle solide. Responsabilités Appuyer l'analyse des besoins opérationnels et contribuer à intégrer les exigences de conformité dans les processus de prévention de la criminalité financière (AML, KYC, Sanctions). Aider à identifier les possibilités d'amélioration des processus et à mettre en oeuvre des solutions validées par les intervenants (Compliance, Front Office, TI, etc.). Concevoir et mettre en oeuvre des processus rationalisés, évolutifs et efficaces pour améliorer le rendement opérationnel et la conformité aux exigences réglementaires. Participer à la documentation et à la mise à jour des processus liés à la conformité, y compris les procédures opérationnelles normalisées (PON), en assurant l'harmonisation avec les pratiques actuelles et les exigences réglementaires. Collaborer avec des équipes interfonctionnelles (p. ex. équipes Outils et Projets, etc.) pour le développement, la maintenance et l'essai des applications de conformité (IMTF, smartKYC, Pythagore, etc.). Contribuer à la gestion du changement, notamment en appuyant les initiatives de formation et de communication pour les utilisateurs. Participer à l'essai fonctionnel des solutions mises en œuvre, en utilisant les méthodologies et les outils fournis et en assurant un suivi rigoureux des résultats. Appuyer l'amélioration des cadres de contrôle liés aux outils de conformité, y compris la surveillance des incidents, l'analyse de la qualité des données et la collecte des commentaires des utilisateurs. Aider à surveiller les outils de conformité, assurer le bon fonctionnement des flux de données, mettre à jour les paramètres et effectuer des exercices d'examen réguliers en collaboration avec les équipes de TI et d'outils et de projets. Contribuer à la gestion de projets liés à la LAM, à la CJA et aux sanctions en participant à des initiatives locales ou de groupe et en participant à des méthodes de gestion de projets (Agile, Cascade). Participer à la veille technologique et identifier les occasions d'améliorer les outils et les processus de conformité. Appuyer le suivi des recommandations d'audit relatives aux processus de conformité opérationnelle, en veillant à ce qu'elles soient mises en œuvre dans les délais prescrits. Votre profil Éducation et expérience : l'expérience de la conformité en matière de criminalité financière, de gestion des risques ou de processus opérationnels est préférée. Au moins 5 ans d'expérience et d'expérience dans une entreprise de conseil (Big 4 ou équivalent) est un atout Compétences analytiques : Capacité d'analyser les processus, de cerner les lacunes, les lacunes et les domaines à améliorer, et de proposer des solutions appropriées. Compétences en communication : Compétence en rédaction de documents clairs et structurés et en communication efficace avec divers intervenants. Esprit d'équipe : Capacité de collaborer efficacement avec des équipes multidisciplinaires (Compliance, Business, IT) et de s'adapter à différents interlocuteurs. Organisation et rigueur : Capacité de gérer simultanément plusieurs tâches et projets tout en respectant les échéances et les priorités. Connaissances techniques : connaissance des solutions technologiques de conformité, des outils d'analyse de données et des plateformes d'automatisation. L'expérience ou l'intérêt pour les outils de gestion des données, de rapport ou de modélisation des processus est un atout. Langues : Connaissance du français et de l'anglais, écrits et parlés. Résidence suisse : Obligatoire Compétences fondamentales Respect des valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, condamnation, agilité et responsabilité. Respect des règlements et des directives internes Curiosité et volonté d'apprendre dans un environnement en constante évolution. Pourquoi rejoindre notre équipe? Vous rejoindrez une équipe dynamique et collaborative où vous aurez l'occasion de développer vos compétences en conformité et en gestion de projet tout en bénéficiant de conseils et de soutien pour faire progresser votre carrière. Vous participerez à des projets stratégiques et innovateurs au cœur du département de FAC. Compétences de base : Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.title: Phone Operator
jobs.description:
• Mission 
• Manage a high-volume, high-standard French/English switchboard (additional languages are an asset), administer the VOIP system (AGILE), and handle CFF travel arrangements.

• Join a private bank and interact with a wide range of stakeholders: various departments, VIPs, and senior executives.

 

• Main responsibilities 
 
 
• CISCO VOIP system management: 
 
 
• Handle external and internal calls with strict confidentiality and exceptional courtesy.

• Rigorously enforce security standards, particularly regarding phishing attempts and malicious calls.

• Manage call transfers and message taking using the Samwin operator console. 

• Cover Executive Management calls during assistants’ breaks and absences, as well as for certain management groups.

 

• CFF travel management: 
 
• Provide support and advice for domestic CFF travel. 

• Process requests for international travel. 

• Manage the renewal of CFF subscriptions.

 

• Ticketing and facilities requests: 
 
• Administer the ticketing system for facility management requests (e.g., ventilation). 

• Coordinate with relevant stakeholders, ensure follow-up, and close action items.

 
 

• Your Profile 

• Experience: 
 
 At least 5 years of experience in a similar role within a highly demanding environment is required Technical skills 
 

• Languages: 
• French and English must be mastered perfectly (minimum C1 level). 

• Any additional language is an asset. 
 

• Personal skills: 
• Motivated, dynamic, proactive, and compassionate professional with a service mindset. 

• Natural aptitude for pedagogy, able to make technical topics accessible and easy to understand. 

• Active listening skills with both internal and external stakeholders. 

• Strong stress management, maintaining composure in all circumstances. 

• Discreet and tactful, exercising restraint and professionalism at all times. 

• Team-oriented, committed to sharing knowledge, fostering collective intelligence, and learning from the surrounding experience. 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Gestire un switchboard francese/inglese ad alto volume (le lingue aggiuntive sono un bene), amministrare il sistema VOIP (AGILE) e gestire le modalità di viaggio CFF. Unisciti a una banca privata e interagire con una vasta gamma di stakeholder: vari dipartimenti, VIP e dirigenti senior. Gestione del sistema CISCO VOIP: gestire chiamate esterne e interne con riservatezza rigorosa e cortesia eccezionale. Rigorosamente rispettare gli standard di sicurezza, in particolare per quanto riguarda i tentativi di phishing e le chiamate dannose. Gestisci trasferimenti di chiamate e messaggi utilizzando la console operatore Samwin. Copertura Executive Management richiede durante le pause e le assenze degli assistenti, così come per alcuni gruppi di gestione. Gestione dei viaggi CFF: fornire supporto e consulenza per i viaggi CFF nazionali. Richieste di processo per viaggi internazionali. Gestisci il rinnovo degli abbonamenti CFF. Richieste di biglietteria e strutture: Amministrare il sistema di biglietteria per le richieste di gestione delle strutture (ad esempio, ventilazione). Coordinare con le parti interessate pertinenti, garantire il follow-up e gli elementi di azione ravvicinati. La vostra esperienza di profilo: almeno 5 anni di esperienza in un ruolo simile all'interno di un ambiente altamente esigente è necessaria competenze tecniche Lingue: francese e inglese devono essere masterizzati perfettamente (livello minimo C1). Qualsiasi lingua aggiuntiva è un bene. Competenze personali: professionale motivato, dinamico, proattivo e compassionevole con una mentalità di servizio. Aptitude naturale per la pedagogia, in grado di rendere gli argomenti tecnici accessibili e facili da capire. Competenze di ascolto attive con parti interessate interne ed esterne. Forte gestione dello stress, mantenendo la compostezza in tutte le circostanze. Discreto e tattile, esercitando il controllo e la professionalità in ogni momento. Il team-oriented, impegnato a condividere la conoscenza, promuovere l'intelligenza collettiva e imparare dall'esperienza circostante. Competenze fondamentali: Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità - Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Verwalten Sie eine hochvolumige, hochklassige französische/englische Schalttafel (Zusatzsprachen sind ein Vermögenswert), verwalten Sie das VOIP-System (AGILE) und behandeln Sie CFF-Reisevereinbarungen. Begleiten Sie eine private Bank und interagieren Sie mit einer Vielzahl von Interessenvertretern: verschiedene Abteilungen, VIPs und leitende Führungskräfte. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten CISCO VOIP Systemmanagement: Externe und interne Anrufe mit strenger Vertraulichkeit und außergewöhnlicher Höflichkeit auslösen. Bedauerlicherweise durchsetzen Sicherheitsstandards, insbesondere in Bezug auf Phishing-Ansätze und schädliche Anrufe. Rufübertragungen und Nachrichten verwalten, die die Samwin-Operator-Konsole verwenden. Übernehmen Sie Executive Management Anrufe während der Pausen und Abwesenheiten von Assistenten sowie für bestimmte Managementgruppen. CFF-Reisemanagement: Unterstützung und Beratung für die heimische CFF-Reise. Prozessanfragen für internationale Reisen. Verwalten Sie die Erneuerung der CFF-Abonnements. Ticketing und Ausstattungsanfragen: Verwalten Sie das Ticketing-System für Facility Management-Anfragen (z.B. Belüftung). Koordinieren Sie mit relevanten Interessenvertretern, stellen Sie die Nachverfolgung und die engen Aktionspunkte sicher. Ihre Profilerfahrung: Mindestens 5 Jahre Erfahrung in einer ähnlichen Rolle innerhalb einer anspruchsvollen Umgebung ist erforderlich Technische Fähigkeiten Sprachen: Französisch und Englisch müssen perfekt beherrscht werden (mindestens C1-Ebene). Jede weitere Sprache ist ein Vermögenswert. Persönliche Fähigkeiten: Motivierte, dynamische, proaktive und mitfühlende Profis mit einem Service Mindset. Natürliche Eignung für Pädagogik, in der Lage, technische Themen zugänglich und leicht zu verstehen. Aktive Hörfähigkeiten mit internen und externen Akteuren. Starkes Stressmanagement, unter allen Umständen Komposure zu halten. Bescheiden und taktvoll, immer Rückhalte- und Professionalität ausüben. Teamorientiert, engagiert, um Wissen zu teilen, kollektive Intelligenz zu fördern und von der umliegenden Erfahrung zu lernen. Kernkompetenzen: Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission Gérer un tableau de bord français/anglais de grande qualité (les langues supplémentaires sont un atout), administrer le système VOIP (AGILE) et gérer les voyages du CFF. Rejoignez une banque privée et interagissez avec un large éventail d'intervenants : divers ministères, VIP et cadres supérieurs. Principales responsabilités Gestion du système CISCO VOIP : Gérer les appels externes et internes avec une stricte confidentialité et une courtoisie exceptionnelle. Appliquer rigoureusement les normes de sécurité, en particulier en ce qui concerne les tentatives d'hameçonnage et les appels malveillants. Gérer les transferts d'appels et la prise de message en utilisant la console de l'opérateur Samwin. Couvrir les appels de la haute direction pendant les pauses et les absences des assistants, ainsi que pour certains groupes de gestion. Gestion des voyages CFF : Fournir un soutien et des conseils pour les voyages CFF intérieurs. Traiter les demandes de voyage international. Gérer le renouvellement des abonnements CFF. Demande de billetterie et d'installations : Administrer le système de billetterie pour les demandes de gestion de l'installation (p. ex. ventilation). Coordonner avec les parties intéressées, assurer le suivi et mettre en place des mesures de suivi. Votre profil Expérience : Au moins 5 ans d'expérience dans un rôle similaire dans un environnement très exigeant sont requis Compétences techniques Langues : Le français et l'anglais doivent être parfaitement maîtrisés (niveau minimum C1). Toute autre langue est un atout. Compétences personnelles : Professionnel motivé, dynamique, proactif et compatissant avec un état d'esprit de service. Aptitude naturelle à la pédagogie, capable de rendre les sujets techniques accessibles et faciles à comprendre. Capacité d'écoute active avec des intervenants internes et externes. Forte gestion du stress, en maintenant le calme en toutes circonstances. Discrète et tact, faisant preuve de retenue et de professionnalisme en tout temps. Une équipe axée sur le partage des connaissances, la promotion de l'intelligence collective et l'apprentissage de l'expérience environnante. Compétences de base : Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Funds Execution Officer

titleByLocale.fr: Fonctionnaire chargé de l ' exécution des fonds

jobs.description:
• Mission 
 Ensure the accurate and timely execution of client fund orders across Mutual Funds, Hedge Funds, and Private Equity Funds for all UBP branches, while maintaining strict compliance with internal processes and regulatory requirements. Deliver exceptional service to clients to ensure seamless end-to-end fund order processing.
 
• Main responsibilities 
 
 Execute client fund orders across Mutual Funds, Hedge Funds, Private Equity. Mutual funds are processed primarily via SWIFT through a global custodian while Alternatives (HF/PE) are placed directly with fund administrators, including completion of required subscription/redemption documentation and KYC/AML. Coordinate funding, settlement, and confirmations; manage pre-funding, notice periods, and specific terms (gates/lock-ups).
 
• Your Profile 
 
 
• Education and Technical Skills 

• Bachelor’s degree in Economics (or equivalent). 

• Proficient in Microsoft Office tools (Excel, Word, Outlook, VBA a plus). 

• Familiarity with fund order workflows and transfer agent processes environments is an asset
 

• Personal Skills 

• Think in “Problem–Action–Results” terms; proactive and driven. 

• Strong client service ethic; clear and professional communicator. 

• Highly organized with excellent attention to detail; able to manage tight deadlines and work under pressure in a high-volume setting. 

• Strong analytical skills with the ability to identify issues, propose solutions, and follow through to completion. 

• Constructive, collaborative, and committed to continuous learning. 

• Adaptable, self-motivated, and a team player. 

• Sound understanding of operational risks in fund execution with disciplined control and timely escalation. 
 
 
• Languages 

• French and English: fluent (written and spoken).
 
 
• Others 
• Swiss Residence 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Assicurare l'esecuzione accurata e tempestiva degli ordini del fondo clienti attraverso fondi Mutual, fondi di copertura e fondi privati per tutte le filiali UBP, mantenendo al contempo la stretta conformità con i processi interni e i requisiti normativi. Fornire un servizio eccezionale ai clienti per garantire l'elaborazione senza soluzione di continuità dell'ordine del fondo. Eseguire gli ordini del fondo clienti attraverso fondi Mutual, fondi di copertura, equità privata. I fondi Mutual vengono elaborati principalmente tramite SWIFT attraverso un depositario globale, mentre Alternative (HF/PE) sono posizionati direttamente con gli amministratori del fondo, compreso il completamento della documentazione di abbonamento/rimborso richiesta e KYC/AML. Coordinate il finanziamento, l'insediamento e le conferme; gestite il prefinanziamento, i periodi di preavviso e i termini specifici (gate/blocco). Il tuo profilo Istruzione e competenze tecniche Laurea in Economia (o equivalente). Proficiente negli strumenti Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, VBA a plus). La familiarità con i flussi di lavoro di ordine di fondo e gli ambienti di processi di agente di trasferimento è un bene Personal Skills Think in termini “Problem–Action–Results”; proattivo e guidato. Forte servizio clienti etico; comunicatore chiaro e professionale. Altamente organizzato con eccellente attenzione ai dettagli; in grado di gestire scadenze strette e lavorare sotto pressione in un ambiente ad alto volume. Forte capacità analitiche con la capacità di identificare i problemi, proporre soluzioni e seguire fino al completamento. Costruttivo, collaborativo e impegnato nell'apprendimento continuo. Adattabile, automotivato, e un giocatore di squadra. Comprensione dei rischi operativi nell'esecuzione dei fondi con controllo disciplinato e tempestiva escalation. Lingue Francese e Inglese: fluente (scritto e parlato). Competenze obbligatorie di Swiss Residence: Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità - Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne
