jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Investment Content Designer (Temporary 12 months)

titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire de contenu marketing d'investissement (temporaire 12 mois)

jobs.description:
Mission 
 A creative role at the heart of investment.
Within Investment Marketing, we are looking for a talented designer. You will be a full member of the Investment Management team, helping define how our investment thinking is structured, articulated, and presented to Wealth Management, to clients, to investors.
At the intersection of portfolio management, strategy and other business lines, you transform complex financial expertise into clear, structured and visually compelling materials.
You ensure that investment communication is rigorous, compliant with regulatory requirements, and fully aligned with the identity and standards of an international investment group.
 
• You design the materials that shape how investment specialists communicate their conviction.

• Your output has immediate visibility with investment digital platforms.

• You have real influence over the visual and editorial standards of the Investment Management team
 
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
• Investment Content 
Structure and formalise investment views
Translate complex financial analysis into clear, pedagogical narratives
Ensure consistency between investment philosophy and client communication
Contribute to multi-asset strategy articulation and portfolio frameworks

• Editorial & Visual Design 
Lead the design of strategic presentations, outlook publications and investment solutions documentation
Maintain high visual standards aligned with private banking expectations
Build clear message hierarchies and rigorous visual architecture
Ensure coherence across asset classes and publication formats

• Digital Integration 
Oversee content production in Adobe InDesign, related design tools and adapt for digital platforms
Contribute to the investment content distribution strategy
Enhance client experience across digital investment platform

• Governance & Standards 
Coordinate cross-functional initiatives within Investment Management
Ensure regulatory soundness of all materials in close collaboration with Compliance
Drive continuous improvement of production, validation and deployment processes
Define and harmonise editorial and visual standards at group level
 
 
 Profile 
 
• Experience 
Background in private banking, asset management or investment banking
Demonstrated ability to structure complex investment content
Experience in a regulated financial communication environment
Strong interest in the digital evolution of investment content

• Education 
Higher education in finance, economics or a related discipline.
A background in graphic communication or design is considered a strong advantage.

• Languages 
French - fluent or native
English - fluent, written and spoken
Additional languages are an advantage

• Technical skills 
Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign — essential
Illustrator and Photoshop — an advantage
Familiarity with regulated financial communication requirements
Experience adapting investment materials for digital platforms
Understanding of multi-asset reporting frameworks

 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione - All'interno della gestione degli investimenti, si gioca un ruolo chiave nella concezione, strutturazione e presentazione strategica dei contenuti di investimento in tutte le classi di asset. - No. All'incrocio tra gestione del portafoglio, strategia e altre linee di business, si trasformano competenze finanziarie complesse in materiali chiari, strutturati e visivamente convincenti. - No. Assicurarsi che la comunicazione degli investimenti sia rigorosa, conforme ai requisiti normativi, e pienamente allineato con l'identità e gli standard di un gruppo di investimento internazionale. ## Responsabilità chiave ## #Struttura strategica dei contenuti degli investimenti - Lavorare a stretto contatto con gli stakeholder della gestione degli investimenti per formalizzare e strutturare le opinioni sugli investimenti. - Tradurre analisi finanziarie complesse in narrazioni chiare, pedagogiche e strategicamente coerenti. - Assicurare la coerenza tra filosofia di investimento, costruzione di portafoglio e comunicazione cliente. - Contribuire all'articolazione di strategie multi asset e framework di architettura portafoglio. #### Editorial Leadership & Financial Design - Guida lo sviluppo editoriale e visivo dei materiali di investimento, incluse presentazioni strategiche, pubblicazioni di prospettiva, documentazione di fondo e contenuti digitali. - Mantenere elevati standard visivi e editoriali in linea con le aspettative bancarie private. - Strutturare lo storytelling finanziario attraverso una chiara gerarchia dei messaggi e una rigorosa architettura visiva. - Assicurare coerenza tra classi di attività e pubblicazioni. ### Digital Integration - Superare la produzione di contenuti utilizzando Adobe InDesign e coordinare l'adattamento per le piattaforme di investimento digitali. - Contribuire attivamente alla strategia di distribuzione dei contenuti di investimento. - Supporta la valorizzazione dell'esperienza del cliente e dell'utente attraverso i canali digitali. #### Governance & Coordination - Sostenere il responsabile del progetto di investimento nel coordinare le iniziative funzionali cross all'interno della gestione degli investimenti. - Lavorare a stretto contatto con Compliance per garantire la solidità normativa di tutti i materiali. - Contribuire al miglioramento continuo dei processi di produzione, convalida e distribuzione. - Partecipare alla definizione e all'armonizzazione degli standard editoriali e visivi a livello di gruppo. ## Profilo ## Esperienza - Esperienza comprovata all'interno di private banking, asset management o investment banking. - Solida comprensione dei mercati finanziari e delle principali classi di asset. - Capacità dimostrata di strutturare e formalizzare contenuti di investimento complessi. - Competenza avanzata in Adobe InDesign. La conoscenza di Illustrator e Photoshop è un vantaggio. - Esperienza operativa in un ambiente finanziario regolamentato. - Forte interesse per l'evoluzione digitale della comunicazione degli investimenti. ### Key Skills - Comunicazione di architettura degli investimenti - Strutturazione narrativa degli investimenti - Progettazione editoriale applicata alla finanza - Coordinamento funzionale trasversale con i team di investimento - Integrazione dei contenuti di investimento digitale - Forte consapevolezza degli standard istituzionali e premium ## Education - Istruzione superiore in finanza, economia o un campo relativo. - Un doppio background in finanza e comunicazione o design è considerato un forte vantaggio. ### Lingue - Francese: fluente o nativo - Inglese: fluente, scritto e parlato - Le lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio ## competenze tecniche - Forte comprensione dei requisiti di comunicazione finanziaria regolamentati - Esperienza di adattamento dei materiali di investimento per piattaforme digitali - Comprensione dei framework di reporting multi asset ## Competenza core - Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility e Responsibility - Conformance con le direttive interne
descriptionByLocale.en: Mission A creative role at the heart of investment. Within Investment Marketing, we are looking for a talented designer. You will be a full member of the Investment Management team, helping define how our investment thinking is structured, articulated, and presented to Wealth Management, to clients, to investors. At the intersection of portfolio management, strategy and other business lines, you transform complex financial expertise into clear, structured and visually compelling materials. You ensure that investment communication is rigorous, compliant with regulatory requirements, and fully aligned with the identity and standards of an international investment group. • You design the materials that shape how investment specialists communicate their conviction. • Your output has immediate visibility with investment digital platforms. • You have real influence over the visual and editorial standards of the Investment Management team Key Responsibilities • Investment Content Structure and formalise investment views Translate complex financial analysis into clear, pedagogical narratives Ensure consistency between investment philosophy and client communication Contribute to multi-asset strategy articulation and portfolio frameworks • Editorial & Visual Design Lead the design of strategic presentations, outlook publications and investment solutions documentation Maintain high visual standards aligned with private banking expectations Build clear message hierarchies and rigorous visual architecture Ensure coherence across asset classes and publication formats • Digital Integration Oversee content production in Adobe InDesign, related design tools and adapt for digital platforms Contribute to the investment content distribution strategy Enhance client experience across digital investment platform • Governance & Standards Coordinate cross-functional initiatives within Investment Management Ensure regulatory soundness of all materials in close collaboration with Compliance Drive continuous improvement of production, validation and deployment processes Define and harmonise editorial and visual standards at group level Profile • Experience Background in private banking, asset management or investment banking Demonstrated ability to structure complex investment content Experience in a regulated financial communication environment Strong interest in the digital evolution of investment content • Education Higher education in finance, economics or a related discipline. A background in graphic communication or design is considered a strong advantage. • Languages French - fluent or native English - fluent, written and spoken Additional languages are an advantage • Technical skills Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign — essential Illustrator and Photoshop — an advantage Familiarity with regulated financial communication requirements Experience adapting investment materials for digital platforms Understanding of multi-asset reporting frameworks Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives
descriptionByLocale.de: Mission - Innerhalb des Investment Managements spielen Sie eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Konzeption, Strukturierung und strategischen Präsentation von Anlageinhalten in allen Assetklassen. - Ja. An der Schnittstelle von Portfoliomanagement, Strategie und anderen Geschäftsfeldern transformieren Sie komplexe finanzielle Expertise in klare, strukturierte und visuell überzeugende Materialien. - Ja. Sie stellen sicher, dass die Investitionskommunikation streng ist, den regulatorischen Anforderungen entspricht und die Identität und die Standards einer internationalen Investmentgruppe vollständig angepasst sind. ### Strategische Strukturierung von Investitionsinhalten - Arbeiten Sie eng mit den Interessenvertretern des Investment Managements zusammen, um Investment-Ansichten zu formalisieren und zu strukturieren. - Übersetzen Sie komplexe Finanzanalysen in klare, pädagogische und strategisch kohärente Erzählungen. - Gewährleistung der Konsistenz zwischen Investitionsphilosophie, Portfolio-Bau und Kundenkommunikation. - Beitrag zur Artikulation von Multi Asset-Strategien und Portfolio-Architektur-Rahmen. ### Editorial Leadership & Financial Design - Führen Sie die redaktionelle und visuelle Entwicklung von Investitionsmaterialien, einschließlich strategischer Präsentationen, Ausblickveröffentlichungen, Fondsdokumentation und digitaler Inhalte. - Bewahren Sie hohe visuelle und redaktionelle Standards im Einklang mit den Erwartungen der Privatbanken. - Struktur finanzielles Storytelling durch klare Botschaft Hierarchie und strenge visuelle Architektur. - Gewährleistung der Kohärenz in allen Assetklassen und Publikationen. ### Digitale Integration - Übersehen Sie die Content-Produktion mit Adobe InDesign und Koordinatenanpassung für digitale Investmentplattformen. - Aktiver Beitrag zur Strategie der Investment Content Distribution. - Unterstützung der Verbesserung der Kunden- und Nutzererfahrung über digitale Kanäle. ### Governance & Coordination - Unterstützung des Investment Project Managers bei der Koordination von funktionsübergreifenden Initiativen im Investment Management. - Arbeiten Sie eng mit Compliance zusammen, um die regulatorische Klangfähigkeit aller Materialien zu gewährleisten. - Beitrag zur kontinuierlichen Verbesserung der Produktions-, Validierungs- und Bereitstellungsprozesse. - Erwarten Sie die Definition und Harmonisierung der redaktionellen und visuellen Standards auf Gruppenebene. Â Profil ### Erfahrung - Bewährte Erfahrung im Private Banking, Asset Management oder Investment Banking. - Solides Verständnis der Finanzmärkte und der wichtigsten Vermögensklassen. - Demonstrierte Fähigkeit, komplexe Anlageinhalte zu strukturieren und zu formalisieren. - Fortgeschrittene Kenntnisse in Adobe InDesign. Das Wissen von Illustrator und Photoshop ist ein Vorteil. - Erfahrung in einem geregelten Finanzumfeld. - Starkes Interesse an der digitalen Entwicklung der Investitionskommunikation. ### Key Skills - Investment-Architektur-Kommunikation - Investment narrative Strukturierung - Editorial Design angewendet, um zu finanzieren - Cross-funktionelle Koordination mit Investment-Teams - Digitale Investment-Inhalte-Integration - Starke institutionellen und Premium-Standards Bewusstsein ### Bildung - Höhere Bildung in Finanzen, Wirtschaft oder ein verwandten Bereich. - Ein doppelter Hintergrund in Finanzen und Kommunikation oder Design gilt als ein starker Vorteil. ### Sprachen - Französisch: fließend oder native - Englisch: fließend, schriftlich und gesprochen - Zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Vorteil ### Technische Fähigkeiten - Starkes Verständnis der regulierten Finanzkommunikationsanforderungen - Erleben Sie die Anpassung von Anlagematerialien für digitale Plattformen - Verständnis von Multi Asset Reporting Frameworks
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission - Au sein de la gestion des investissements, vous jouez un rôle clé dans la conception, la structuration et la présentation stratégique du contenu des investissements dans toutes les classes d'actifs. - Oui. À l'intersection de la gestion de portefeuille, de la stratégie et d'autres secteurs d'activité, vous transformez une expertise financière complexe en documents clairs, structurés et visuellement convaincants. - Oui. Vous veillez à ce que la communication des investissements soit rigoureuse, conforme aux exigences réglementaires et pleinement conforme à l'identité et aux normes d'un groupe d'investissement international. ## Principales responsabilités ### Structure stratégique du contenu des investissements - Collaborer étroitement avec les intervenants de la gestion des investissements pour formaliser et structurer les points de vue sur les investissements. - Traduire l'analyse financière complexe en récits clairs, pédagogiques et stratégiquement cohérents. - Assurer la cohérence entre la philosophie d'investissement, la construction de portefeuilles et la communication avec les clients. - Contribuer à l'élaboration de stratégies multiactifs et de cadres d'architecture de portefeuille. ### Leadership éditorial et conception financière - Diriger le développement éditorial et visuel du matériel d'investissement, y compris les présentations stratégiques, les publications de perspectives, la documentation de fonds et le contenu numérique. - Maintenir des normes visuelles et éditoriales élevées en fonction des attentes des banques privées. - Structurer l'histoire financière par une hiérarchie claire des messages et une architecture visuelle rigoureuse. - Assurer la cohérence entre les classes de biens et les publications. ### Intégration numérique - Surveiller la production de contenu en utilisant Adobe InDesign et coordonner l'adaptation pour les plateformes d'investissement numériques. - Contribuer activement à la stratégie de distribution des contenus d'investissement. - Soutenir l'amélioration de l'expérience client et utilisateur à travers les canaux numériques. ### Gouvernance et coordination - Aider le gestionnaire de projet d'investissement à coordonner les initiatives interfonctionnelles au sein de la gestion des investissements. - Collaborer étroitement avec la conformité pour assurer la solidité réglementaire de tous les matériaux. - Contribuer à l'amélioration continue des processus de production, de validation et de déploiement. - Participer à la définition et à l'harmonisation des normes éditoriales et visuelles au niveau du groupe. ## Profil ### Expérience - Expérience éprouvée au sein des banques privées, de la gestion d'actifs ou des banques d'investissement. - Une bonne compréhension des marchés financiers et des grandes classes d'actifs. - Capacité démontrée de structurer et de formaliser des contenus d'investissement complexes. - Compétence avancée en Adobe InDesign. La connaissance de l'illustrateur et de Photoshop est un avantage. - Expérience dans un environnement financier réglementé. - Un fort intérêt pour l'évolution numérique de la communication d'investissement. ### Compétences clés - Architecture de l'investissement communication - Structure narrative de l'investissement - Conception éditoriale appliquée au financement - Coordination interfonctionnelle avec les équipes d'investissement - Intégration du contenu de l'investissement numérique - Forte sensibilisation aux normes institutionnelles et haut de gamme ### Éducation - Enseignement supérieur en finance, en économie ou dans un domaine connexe. - Une double expérience en finance et communication ou conception est considérée comme un avantage important. ### Langues - Français : couramment ou natif - Anglais : couramment, écrit et parlé - D'autres langues sont un avantage ### Compétences techniques - Forte compréhension des exigences réglementaires en matière de communication financière - Expérience d'adaptation du matériel d'investissement pour les plateformes numériques - Compréhension des cadres de rapports multiactifs ## Compétences de base - Respect des valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Corporate Action Specialist
jobs.description:
• Daily business responsibilities 

• Handle activities of one of the following pools: 

• Receipt of information: 

• Cross analyze information received: custodians swifts, agent/Funds prospectus and financial providers (such as Bloomberg, Telekurs) 

• Create adequate corporate event in the corporate action database 

• Answer to questions from Relationship Managers, other internal departments, external parties including clients. 

• Notification of information: 

• Write announcement to Relationship Managers and Clients 

• Instruction processing: 

• Reconcile holdings, determine entitlements, manage pending positions. 

• Collect and follow up on instructions 

• Transmit instructions to our correspondents, Funds manager and/or other external parties, control of their safe delivery and acceptance 

• Allocation to clients: 

• Book corporate actions events in clients’ accounts (cash and/or securities) 

• Review the overnight bookings 

• 

• Overall responsibilities 

• Follow-up on various topics and issues over the lifecycle of a Corporate Action 

• Interchange from one pool to the other, depending on needs 

• Collaborate with others team members outside the assigned pool 

• Core competencies 

• Think in "Problem-Action-Results" terms 

• Be proactive and driven 

• Show strong client service ethic 

• Maintain quality standards despite schedule pressures 

• Highly organized, manage tight deadlines within a high-risk environment, ability to work under pressure 

• Strong analytical skills with an ability to identify problems and propose solutions. 

• Express opinions and criticism in a constructive way 

• Be a continuous learner 

• Adaptability, self-motivation and teamwork 
 

• Good understanding of the risks inherent to the corporate actions environment and demonstrate good discipline around control and escalation. 

• Build lasting client relationships 

• Consistently comply with internal & external regulations 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: WM Data Scientist (Zurich, 100%)
jobs.description:
Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is a leading Private Bank specializing in Wealth Management (WM), offering tailored financial solutions to a diverse international clientele. Data analytics plays a key role in strengthening operational oversight, improving client understanding, and enhancing compliance and risk management processes.
 As a WM Data Scientist within the COO Wealth Management office, you will work at the intersection of data science, WM operational processes, and compliance analytics. The role focuses on analyzing internal data to identify patterns in client activity, operational workflows, and risk indicators, helping the organization better detect anomalies, improve client monitoring frameworks, and strengthen decision-making.
 This position goes beyond traditional reporting. You will apply statistical methods, behavioral analytics, and quantitative modelling to improve rule-based monitoring frameworks, support client lifecycle analytics, and optimize operational risk controls.
 The role also includes contributing to the definition of analytical frameworks and data specifications that will support future AI initiatives within the Wealth Management COO organization.
 
 Mission 
 Development of intelligent analytical solutions to complex operational and risk-related problems by extracting, transforming, modelling, and analysing data across multiple banking systems.
 The role focuses particularly on analytical challenges at the intersection of WM operations, compliance monitoring, and business risk controls, including the optimisation of monitoring alerts and detection frameworks.
 You will be mentored by the Head of WM Reporting & Dashboards located in our Zurich office, with occasional travel to Geneva.
 
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Extract, transform, and structure data from multiple internal banking systems and operational processes

• Perform advanced statistical analysis and data exploration to identify behavioural patterns in client activity and operational processes

• Analyse and refine rule-based monitoring scenarios and threshold parameters used in transaction monitoring frameworks

• Develop quantitative models and analytical approaches to improve client segmentation, lifecycle analysis, and risk indicators

• Contribute to the optimisation of monitoring alerts and detection frameworks related to client activity and transaction behaviour

• Translate analytical findings into clear insights and recommendations for operational, compliance, and management stakeholders

• Contribute to defining analytical specifications and data frameworks supporting future advanced analytics and AI initiatives

 
 
 
 
 Qualifications 
 
• Academic degree (BA/MA) in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field 

• At least 5 years of experience in a similar role 

• Banking experience strongly preferred, or experience in a similar data science environment

• International work experience desired for this role

• Fluent in English; additional languages are an advantage

• Experience working with large datasets and applying statistical or quantitative methods to operational, compliance, or risk-related problems

• Experience analysing rule-based monitoring frameworks, risk indicators, or behavioural patterns in financial data is highly valued

• Strong technical skills in SQL and Python

• Experience with data visualisation or business intelligence tools (e.g. Power BI) is beneficial but not the primary focus of the role

• Exposure to transaction monitoring, KYT/KYC processes, or compliance analytics is a must

• Strong analytical and curious mind with excellent research, communication, and presentation skills

• Self-discipline, quality conscious and goal-oriented approach and readiness for an agile working environment

 
 
 Candidates must have the legal right to work in Switzerland at the time of hire. This position is 100% on-site in Zurich, Switzerland. 
 Start: asap

Main responsibilities • Extract, transform, and structure data from multiple internal banking systems and operational processes • Perform advanced statistical analysis and data exploration to identify behavioural patterns in client activity and operational processes • Analyse and refine rule-based monitoring scenarios and threshold parameters used in transaction monitoring frameworks • Develop quantitative models and analytical approaches to improve client segmentation, lifecycle analysis, and risk indicators • Contribute to the optimisation of monitoring alerts and detection frameworks related to client activity and transaction behaviour • Translate analytical findings into clear insights and recommendations for operational, compliance, and management stakeholders • Contribute to defining analytical specifications and data frameworks supporting future advanced analytics and AI initiatives Qualifications • Academic degree (BA/MA) in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field • At least 5 years of experience in a similar role • Banking experience strongly preferred, or experience in a similar data science environment • International work experience desired for this role • Fluent in English; additional languages are an advantage • Experience working with large datasets and applying statistical or quantitative methods to operational, compliance, or risk-related problems • Experience analysing rule-based monitoring frameworks, risk indicators, or behavioural patterns in financial data is highly valued • Strong technical skills in SQL and Python • Experience with data visualisation or business intelligence tools (e.g. Power BI) is beneficial but not the primary focus of the role • Exposure to transaction monitoring, KYT/KYC processes, or compliance analytics is a must • Strong analytical and curious mind with excellent research, communication, and presentation skills • Self-discipline, quality conscious and goal-oriented approach and readiness for an agile working environment Candidates must have the legal right to work in Switzerland at the time of hire. This position is 100% on-site in Zurich, Switzerland. Start: asap

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Tax Specialist
jobs.description:
• Mission 
 As part of the Tax Services team, the Tax Specialist is a key element to ensure the quality and accuracy of the reporting done by the Bank, as a regulatory obligation, in an environment which is subject to constant changes and evolutions. Within the Daily Regulatory Reporting team, the employee’s mission also includes constant monitoring and reconciliation of the data to be reported. The tax and regulatory topics include MIFID II/ EMIR / FMIA / FINFRAG / Duty to disclose.
 
• Main responsibilities 
• Daily monitoring and control of regulatory reporting (MIFID II / EMIR / FMIA / FINFRAG) sent to the reporting platform(s) (i.e. locals regulators)

• Monthly reconciliations, quality control and statistics of the data reported

• Manage inquiries and investigate questions and issues about the taxes or regulatory reporting from other departments of the Bank or from external counterparties

• Understand regulatory risk sensitivity and has an end-to-end view of the Bank’s flow/process

• Correction of consistency issues, update reporting tool’s database

• Liaising and coordinating with the department responsible for the underlying data for the necessary corrections, explanations, data input and resubmission of the corrected report(s)

• Communication with the reporting engine providers (ARM, APA, TR)

• Performing regular and ad-hoc reporting related to statistics for internal and external parties

• Contribute to all testing linked to regulatory and reporting updates

• Active participation in EMIR/MIFID/DTD projects (Audit inquiries, Provider specifications changes & Regulator inquiries) including data mining and in-depth investigation
 
 

• Open mind and team orientation: 
Be open to other’s ideas.
Express and accept constructive criticism.

• Innovation and development: 
Propose and seek improvement of the current tools and processes.
Be positive towards change and seek opportunities to improve the quality of the working environment.
Conitunuously work on knowledge improvement.

• Corporate culture: 
Be ‘solution oriented’ and have a strong sense of customer services.
Be proactive and driven.
Developp and maintain a relationship network within the various Bank departments.
Comply consistently with internal and external regulations.
 

• Your Profile 
• Good knowledge of the financial products and associated transactions

• 3-5 years of experience in banking or financial services

• Project management experience

• Strong Excel, Access skills

• Strong analytical skills, able to make complex data reconciliation

• Ability to efficiently manage priorities

• Be able to work independently but also as a team

• Seek opportunities to improve the existing set-up

• Go beyond specific assignments, walk the extra mile

• Consistently comply with internal & external regulations

• Maintain quality standards despite schedule pressures

• Fluent in French and English
 
 

• Others 
• Swiss Residence 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Financial Controller - Retrocession Specialist
jobs.description:
Mission 
Your primary mission is to calculate retrocessions (commissions) payable to External Asset Managers (EAMs) and business introducers across the Group.
 Main responsibilities 
 
• Receive, digitize, and file contracts.

• Enter base data into the dedicated commission system.

• Control and correct source data used in commission calculations.

• Verify calculations, including VAT computation.

• Interact with and respond to questions from Group Accounting, the EAM department, and Relationship Managers.

• Verify provisions related to retrocessions.

• Run simulation scenarios for retrocession calculations for new contracts.

• Enter and validate non-full-STP (non-automated) retrocession domains.

• Produce various reports (statistics, accounting entries creation, supporting documents dispatch).
 
 General competencies 
 
• Consistently comply with internal and external regulations.

• Seek opportunities to improve the quality of the working environment at all levels.

• Maintain quality standards while meeting deadlines.
 
 Your Profile 
 
• 5+ years’ experience desired in accounting or administration.

• Precision, flexibility, rigor, adaptability, strong sense of responsibility and service, stress resilience, and ability to meet deadlines.

• Strong organizational skills and discretion.

• Good command of standard office tools (Excel, Word; Business Objects is a plus). Knowledge of the

• Quartal Commission system is a strong advantage.
 
 Languages 
 Native French or bilingual level; very good command of English (spoken and written).
 Personal skills 
 
• Open and transparent communication.

• Critical thinking.

• Strong capacity for innovation (open to new ideas and continuous improvements).

• Firm and mature approach in challenging situations.
 
 Others 
 
• Familiarity with commission processes and VAT rules in a financial institution is an asset.

• Comfort working with partial or non-automated workflows and validating edge cases.
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Financial Controller - Transfer Pricing & Analytics

titleByLocale.it: Controllore finanziario - Prezzi di trasferimento e analisi

jobs.description:
Mission 
Support the bank’s Management Control function by structuring and governing the profit-center hierarchy, driving transfer pricing (SLA) calculations and revenue allocations, and enhancing profitability analyses. Lead data quality and automation initiatives (primarily in Excel/VBA, with Business Objects/SQL/Power BI as assets) to deliver reliable monthly reporting, budgeting, and forecasting in close collaboration with Accounting, IT, and Business teams.
 Main responsibilities 
 
 Hierarchy and governance: 
 
• Manage and maintain the profit-center hierarchy, including AuM and revenue splits by legal entities, business lines, and geographies.

• Validate reference data (cost/profit centers, P&L by management groups) to ensure consistency, traceability, and auditability.
 
 Transfer pricing (SLA): 
 
• Participate in transfer pricing calculations and allocate revenues across accounting entities.

• Document allocation rules, trace methodologies, and contribute to coherence controls and reconciliations.
 
 Profitability calculations: 
 
• Contribute to profitability calculations and models (formulas, inputs, simulations) for products, clients, and business units.

• Prepare variance analyses and validation materials for management review and governance committees.
 
 Data, tools, and automation: 
 
• Develop ad hoc automation projects (Excel/VBA/Business Objects/SQL) to streamline data flows and reporting processes.

• Improve data quality through controls, alerts, and accounting vs. management reporting reconciliations.

• Produce and enhance dashboards and KPIs (AuM, revenues, profitability by BU/product/client).
 
 

 Support and coordination: 
 
• Provide support to the Head of Management Control for monthly reporting, budget, and forecast cycles.

• Collaborate with Accounting, IT, and Business stakeholders to align processes, ensure data integrity, and deliver accurate outputs.
 
 Your Profile 
 Education 
 Bachelor’s degree in Economics, Finance, Management, or HES (University of Applied Sciences) in Business/Economics/Finance.
 
 Experience and Technical skills 
 
• Initial experience in management control, audit, or finance within a banking environment.

• Solid foundations in management accounting: cost and revenue allocation, profitability analysis.

• Excellent command of Excel with VBA and a strong appetite for process automation.

• Knowledge of Business Objects, SQL, and/or Power BI is an advantage.

• Familiarity with banking KPIs (AuM, revenues, margins) and multi-axis reporting (entity, business line, geography) is advantageous.

• Comfort working with SLAs, documented allocation rules, and traceable methodologies.
 
 Languages 
 Professional proficiency in English; additional languages are an asset.
 
 Personal skills 
 
• Rigorous, analytical, autonomous, and detail-oriented, with strong critical thinking.

• Strong documentation mindset and attention to data quality and controls.

• Collaborative, able to coordinate with cross-functional teams (Accounting, IT, Business).

• Problem-solving mindset and ability to work under deadlines in a monthly closing context.
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

Data, tools, and automation: • Develop ad hoc automation projects (Excel/VBA/Business Objects/SQL) to streamline data flows and reporting processes. • Improve data quality through controls, alerts, and accounting vs. management reporting reconciliations. • Produce and enhance dashboards and KPIs (AuM, revenues, profitability by BU/product/client). Support and coordination: • Provide support to the Head of Management Control for monthly reporting, budget, and forecast cycles. • Collaborate with Accounting, IT, and Business stakeholders to align processes, ensure data integrity, and deliver accurate outputs. Your Profile Education Bachelor’s degree in Economics, Finance, Management, or HES (University of Applied Sciences) in Business/Economics/Finance. Experience and Technical skills • Initial experience in management control, audit, or finance within a banking environment. • Solid foundations in management accounting: cost and revenue allocation, profitability analysis. • Excellent command of Excel with VBA and a strong appetite for process automation. • Knowledge of Business Objects, SQL, and/or Power BI is an advantage. • Familiarity with banking KPIs (AuM, revenues, margins) and multi-axis reporting (entity, business line, geography) is advantageous. • Comfort working with SLAs, documented allocation rules, and traceable methodologies. Languages Professional proficiency in English; additional languages are an asset. Personal skills • Rigorous, analytical, autonomous, and detail-oriented, with strong critical thinking. • Strong documentation mindset and attention to data quality and controls. • Collaborative, able to coordinate with cross-functional teams (Accounting, IT, Business). • Problem-solving mindset and ability to work under deadlines in a monthly closing context. Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: Database administrator
jobs.description:
Mission 
 We are seeking a skilled and experienced Database Administrator (DBA) to join our team in Geneva. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of successfully installing, managing, and maintaining database systems. This role requires a proactive individual with a strong technical background, excellent problem-solving skills, and a commitment to ensuring the security, performance, and reliability of our database infrastructure. Experience with Data Guard and RMAN is highly desirable, and familiarity with data lake implementation is a plus.
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
 Database Administration 
• Install, configure, monitor, and maintain database systems, including Oracle, Sybase, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
• Perform database troubleshooting, including performance tuning, technical issue resolution, and backup/restore operations.
• Manage and administer corporate data to ensure consistency, accessibility, and security.
• Define and implement technical database architectures, including clustering, replication, and high-availability solutions.
• Provide database support for development teams, ensuring optimal performance and scalability of applications.
• Contribute to the design and implementation of data lake solutions (preferred but not mandatory).
 
 Security & Compliance 
• Adhere to and enforce the organization’s security framework, ensuring compliance with established policies and procedures.
• Maintain a strong awareness of security best practices to protect the organization from vulnerabilities and potential exploits.
• Collaborate with stakeholders to ensure database systems align with security and compliance requirements.
 
 Collaboration & Innovation 
• Work closely with cross-functional teams to support business objectives and deliver high-quality database solutions.
• Stay updated on emerging database technologies and trends, recommending improvements to existing systems and processes.
 
 Skills & Experience 
 
 Experience 
• Minimum of 3+ years of hands-on experience in database administration. 
• Proven expertise in managing and optimizing Sybase, Oracle, and SQL Server databases.
• Experience with Data Guard and RMAN is highly desirable.
• Experience in data lake implementation is a plus.
 
 Technical Skills 
• Proficiency in database management tools and technologies, including DataGuard, RMAN, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
• Strong knowledge of database performance tuning, backup and recovery strategies, and high-availability solutions.
• Familiarity with database security best practices and compliance standards.
 
 Soft Skills 
• Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams.
• Results-oriented mindset with a focus on delivering high-quality solutions.
• Detail-oriented, organized, and able to work efficiently under pressure.
• Flexible and adaptable to changing priorities and business needs.
 
 Languages 
• Fluency in English and French is required.
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives
